en.name: 傲剑情缘
en.short_description: 纷纷江湖路，萧萧武侠情。有人的地方就有江湖。我辈人才倍出，在江湖上呈现出了新的一场百家争鸣、八仙过海各显神通的精彩竞争。《傲剑情缘》是一款全新的以武侠江湖题材背景的RPG游戏。 精美的人物刻画、丰富真实的江湖场景、热血刺激的打斗渲染，给你身临其境的直观游戏感受。天纵英才群侠出，铁血豪情论英雄。这里有上百个极具特色、风格迥异的武侠等待你的召唤，与你一起结伴而行，共闯天涯路。
developers: 上海奇速网络科技有限公司

tc.short_description: 小心！這遊戲會令人上癮！等著你的，是全宇宙最爽、最快、最刺激、最具挑戰性的遊戲體驗！3SwitcheD™ 融合了經典遊戲模式和最新技術，利用最新的 3D 和 3D-ET 技術，將遊戲帶進了全新領域。 3D-ET™ 技術不單令遊戲的畫面疑幻疑真，更將你變成遊戲的一部分！配合視象鏡頭，你只需動一動頭和眼睛，遊戲就會隨之而即時調整視角，給你從未想像過的遊戲體驗！遊遊戲本身的內容亦紮實精彩，等著你的挑戰！你準備好了嗎？遊戲玩法隨你所好，挑戰六種遊戲模式，爭取最高得分！「一觸即發」模式將挑戰你的智慧和技巧！想體驗極速快感？那「移形換影」模式就最適合你！沒有最快，只有更快！「天翻地覆」模式則完全顛覆遊戲的常規，重新考驗你的技術！

Fight, learn, and lead your clan of vikings to glory!

en.name: Eiyuden Chronicle: Hundred Heroes

en.short_description: ADR1FT is the story of an astronaut who wakes up floating silently in space amongst the debris of destroyed space station…the only survivor of a catastrophic event, left with no memory, a critically damaged EVA suit leaking oxygen and no way home.

en.short_description: PIPE is a physics based BMX experience built for the BMX community designed to simulate realistic BMX motion. Perform over 50 aerial stunts, grind any corner, send big airs in the PIPE! PIPE also includes some fun Easter Eggs for those willing to explore and think outside the box.

tc.name: Ken Follett's The Pillars of the Earth
tc.short_description: 12 世紀，英國：在一個貧窮和戰爭的年代，一個小鎮開始建造一座大教堂，為人民爭取財富和生活保障。為了生存，他們的生命和命運交織在一起。遊戲改編自肯．弗雷特的世界暢銷書《上帝之柱》，涵蓋三部分。

en.name: WILL: A Wonderful World / WILL：美好世界

tc.name: 天堂島殺手

tc.short_description: 以「遊戲」為載體展現「你/少女」的世界。 以「視覺小說」為表現形式探索「你/少女/世界」的真相。

en.name: Downwell
en.short_description: Downwell is a curious game about a young person venturing down a well in search of untold treasures with only his Gunboots to protect him.

tc.name: Downwell
tc.short_description: 井下探險是一款有趣的遊戲，講述了一個年輕人僅僅在他槍靴的保護下，下井冒險尋找不為人知的寶藏的故事。

en.name: Devil May Cry 4
en.short_description: Devil May Cry® 4 immerses gamers in a gothic supernatural world, where a new protagonist clashes with a familiar hero. As the new leading man, Nero, players will unleash incredible attacks and non-stop combos using a unique new gameplay mechanic, his powerful "Devil Bringer" arm.

tc.name: Devil May Cry 4
tc.short_description: Devil May Cry 4讓玩家沉醉於哥德式的超自然世界之中；體驗一個新主角與熟悉的英雄發生衝突的故事。玩家操作新主角Nero，利用遊戲獨特的新系統──強大的「惡魔之手」能釋放令人難以置信的攻擊和製作出不間斷的連續技。

en.name: Boundless
en.short_description: Shape your citizen, forge your destiny and sculpt your world in this epic voxel sandbox MMO built on endless possibility.

tc.name: Boundless
tc.short_description: Shape your citizen, forge your destiny and sculpt your world in this epic voxel sandbox MMO built on endless possibility.

en.name: Megabyte Punch
en.short_description: Megabyte Punch is a fighting/beat ‘em up game in which you build your own fighter! As you travel through different environments, you battle other creatures to get their parts. Parts have their own powers and bonuses, like gun arms for a shoot ability or powerful hips for a devastating pelvic thrust attack.

tc.name: Megabyte Punch
tc.short_description: Megabyte Punch is a fighting/beat ‘em up game in which you build your own fighter! As you travel through different environments, you battle other creatures to get their parts. Parts have their own powers and bonuses, like gun arms for a shoot ability or powerful hips for a devastating pelvic thrust attack.

en.name: Redout: Enhanced Edition
en.short_description: Redout is a tribute to the old racing monsters such as F-Zero, WipeOut, Rollcage, and POD. It is designed to be an uncompromising, fast, tough and satisfying driving experience, soaked in that vertigo that stands at the core of the arcade racing genre.

tc.name: Redout: Enhanced Edition

en.name: rFactor 2
en.short_description: rFactor 2 is a realistic, easily extendable racing simulation that offers race customization, great graphics, outstanding multiplayer and the height of racing realism. It features mixed class road racing with ultra realistic dynamics, an immersive sound environment and stunning graphics.

tc.name: rFactor 2
tc.short_description: rFactor 2 is a realistic, easily extendable racing simulation that offers race customization, great graphics, outstanding multiplayer and the height of racing realism. It features mixed class road racing with ultra realistic dynamics, an immersive sound environment and stunning graphics.

en.name: Sanitarium
en.short_description: Originally released in 1998 on PC, and awarded as the Adventure Game of the Year, The timeless horror point-and-click, Sanitarium, is returning to frighten the bravest adventure game fans.

tc.name: Sanitarium
tc.short_description: Originally released in 1998 on PC, and awarded as the Adventure Game of the Year, The timeless horror point-and-click, Sanitarium, is returning to frighten the bravest adventure game fans.

en.name: GRANDIA II HD Remaster
en.short_description: Grandia II is back and better than ever! The classic Japanese RPG returns with enhanced visuals, new difficulty level, and features both keyboard and gamepad support!

tc.name: GRANDIA II HD Remaster
tc.short_description: 《冒險奇譚II》不但回來了，而且變得更棒！ 經典JRPG提升畫質回歸，提供新的難度、並支援鍵盤和手把操作！

en.name: Tiny Rogues
en.short_description: Tiny Rogues is a challenging fantasy rogue-lite bullet-hell dungeon crawler with rpg elements. Build a new unique character each run and fight one monster-infested room after another! Discover unique weapons, collect magical items and level up to become more and more powerful!

tc.name: Tiny Rogues
tc.short_description: Tiny Rogues is a challenging fantasy rogue-lite bullet-hell dungeon crawler with rpg elements. Build a new unique character each run and fight one monster-infested room after another! Discover unique weapons, collect magical items and level up to become more and more powerful!

en.name: Rogue: Genesia
en.short_description: Walk upon a new world and slay foes endangering it. Rogue : Genesia is an action rogue-lite game, where you fight relentless hordes consisting of hundreds and thousands of monsters, make your build, break the balance, defeat bosses and save one of the many worlds.

tc.name: Rogue : Genesia
tc.short_description: 在無窮無盡的怪物浪潮中殺出一條血路！在《羅格：救世傳說》中化身無所畏懼的殺戮者，這是一場無休止的屠殺盛宴！拿起你的武器，斬殺一切擋路的敵人，拯救無數世界！（中文已上線，持續打磨中！）

en.name: GoNNER
en.short_description: GoNNER is a tough as hell procedurally-generated 2D platformer with roguelike elements, following the largely misunderstood and altruistic Ikk on a journey to cheer up his only friend in this world - a giant landbound whale named Sally - by searching for just the right trinket in the deep and dark places nearby.

tc.name: GoNNER
tc.short_description: GoNNER is a tough as hell procedurally-generated 2D platformer with roguelike elements, following the largely misunderstood and altruistic Ikk on a journey to cheer up his only friend in this world - a giant landbound whale named Sally - by searching for just the right trinket in the deep and dark places nearby.

en.name: Bio Inc. Redemption
en.short_description: Bio Inc.: Redemption is a realistic simulation and strategy game in which you make life or death decisions. Create a deadly illness to infect and torment your victim or play as the head of a medical team and hopefully find a cure to save your human patient. Will you be the plague or preserve humanity?

en.short_description: CARMAGEDDON: MAX DAMAGE is HERE! And it's the antidote to Racing Games.

tc.name: Carmageddon: Max Damage
tc.short_description: CARMAGEDDON: MAX DAMAGE is HERE! And it's the antidote to Racing Games.

en.name: Gun Metal
en.short_description: Gun Metal is a futuristic action-packed experience where you take control of the fully transformable prototype combat vehicle known as the Havoc Suit.The Havoc Suit, a prototype combat vehicle, remains the only hope to save civilization from a tireless enemy.

tc.short_description: Gun Metal is a futuristic action-packed experience where you take control of the fully transformable prototype combat vehicle known as the Havoc Suit.The Havoc Suit, a prototype combat vehicle, remains the only hope to save civilization from a tireless enemy.

en.name: Spirit Hunters: Infinite Horde
en.short_description: You are the Spirit Hunters in this action rogue-lite. Slay huge waves of monsters and harvest their souls for ever increasing power. Unlock many playable characters, abilities, maps and more through a deep progression system.

tc.name: Spirit Hunters: Infinite Horde
tc.short_description: You are the Spirit Hunters in this action rogue-lite. Slay huge waves of monsters and harvest their souls for ever increasing power. Unlock many playable characters, abilities, maps and more through a deep progression system.

en.name: Chained Echoes
en.short_description: Take up your sword, channel your magic or board your Mech. Chained Echoes is a 16-bit style RPG set in a fantasy world where dragons are as common as piloted mechanical suits.

tc.name: Chained Echoes
tc.short_description: 拿起寶劍、吟唱魔法、乘上機甲。《Chained Echoes》是一款十六位元像素風格的角色扮演遊戲，背景設定在龍與機甲的日常風景得以並存的奇幻世界。

en.name: Indiana Jones® and the Fate of Atlantis™
en.short_description: The Man With The Hat Is Back In His Greatest Adventure Yet! 1939 - The eve of World War II. Nazi agents are about to get their hands on a weapon more dangerous than the atom bomb. Only Indy can stop them before they unleash the deadly secret that sank Atlantis.

tc.name: Indiana Jones® and the Fate of Atlantis™
tc.short_description: The Man With The Hat Is Back In His Greatest Adventure Yet! 1939 - The eve of World War II. Nazi agents are about to get their hands on a weapon more dangerous than the atom bomb. Only Indy can stop them before they unleash the deadly secret that sank Atlantis.

en.name: Crusaders of the Lost Idols
en.short_description: Crusaders of the Lost Idols is an idle game of heroic awesomeness! Create a band of fighters to fight monsters, earn gold and create strategies for the perfect formations over multiple campaigns! Upgrade your heroes, collect unique gear, and unlock new Crusaders in regular new events.

tc.name: Crusaders of the Lost Idols

Create a band of fighters to fight monsters, earn gold and create strategies for the perfect formations over multiple campaigns! Upgrade your heroes, collect unique gear, and unlock new Crusaders in regular new events.

en.name: FINAL FANTASY
en.short_description: The original FINAL FANTASY comes to life with completely new graphics and audio! A remodeled 2D take on the first game in the world-renowned FINAL FANTASY series! Enjoy the timeless story told through charming retro graphics.

tc.name: FINAL FANTASY
tc.short_description: 以嶄新的畫質與音質復活的《FINAL FANTASY》像素複刻版。著名RPG遊戲《FF》系列第一作現已通過精美鮮明的2D畫面回歸。 原版的氣氛與樂趣有了更大的提升，玩家可以更輕鬆地享受這一不朽篇章。

en.name: Expeditions: A MudRunner Game
en.short_description: Embark on scientific expeditions with this new off-road adventure game. Lead research missions as you drive a variety of all-terrain vehicles, using high-tech tools and managing your camp and crew to ensure your success in the wild.

tc.name: Expeditions: A MudRunner Game
tc.short_description: 這款全新的越野探險遊戲由《MudRunner》和《SnowRunner》的創作者打造，讓你踏上科學探險之旅。駕駛各種全地形車輛，使用高科技工具，管理營地和工作人員，確保在野外取得成功。

en.name: Phantom Brigade
en.short_description: Phantom Brigade 2.0 is a cinematic, tactical mech strategy game with a revolutionary timeline-based command system. See the future, predict enemy actions, and plot your counterattack on the timeline! Recruit and level up your squad of rebels to retake war-torn Fyrland from the Kaskad occupation.

tc.name: Phantom Brigade
tc.short_description: 《幻影軍團》是一款以電影感呈現的戰術機甲策略遊戲，採用革命性的「時間軸指令系統」。預知未來、預測敵軍行動，並且在時間軸上策畫反擊行動！招募並培育你的反抗小隊，從喀斯卡德的佔領下奪回戰火肆虐的菲而蘭。

en.name: Once in Yaissor
en.short_description: Summer, 2020, Ya'issor. Most people have become youtubers, streamers, and other scum, and almost no one wants to be a working bum. Nobody has an opinion of their own. Everyone thinks they are nihilists, atheists, reading intellectuals, and other elites.

tc.name: Once in Yaissor
tc.short_description: Summer, 2020, Ya'issor. Most people have become youtubers, streamers, and other scum, and almost no one wants to be a working bum. Nobody has an opinion of their own. Everyone thinks they are nihilists, atheists, reading intellectuals, and other elites.

en.name: Ultimate Zombie Defense
en.short_description: Team up or face it alone in this top down zombie slaying defense adventure! Featuring up to 4 player online co-op, cleanse the infected wave by wave and upgrade your base with traps & defenses to build the Ultimate Zombie Defense. Can YOU stop them?

tc.name: Ultimate Zombie Defense
tc.short_description: 自上而下式僵尸屠戮防御冒险游戏，适合组队或单人作战！这款游戏最多支持4人玩家在线游戏，玩家可以利用陷阱和防御来巩固和升级基地，构建终极僵尸防御（Ultimate Zombie Defense），清洗受感染的僵尸群。 你能守得住吗？

en.name: Grim Clicker
en.short_description: Grim Clicker is an IDLE/RPG clicker where you will find your own strategy to explore the lost worlds. Inspired by games such as Diablo, Grim Dawn, Dark Souls, etc., the game features a complex character development, many unique items, active and passive playstyle.

tc.name: Grim Clicker
tc.short_description: Grim Clicker is an IDLE/RPG clicker where you will find your own strategy to explore the lost worlds. Inspired by games such as Diablo, Grim Dawn, Dark Souls, etc., the game features a complex character development, many unique items, active and passive playstyle.

en.name: Colin McRae Rally
en.short_description: Hit the dirt in Colin McRae Rally - the classic off-road racing experience.

tc.name: Colin McRae Rally
tc.short_description: Hit the dirt in Colin McRae Rally - the classic off-road racing experience.

en.name: Shin Megami Tensei III Nocturne HD Remaster
en.short_description: Reawaken your inner demon in a modernized version of the acclaimed ATLUS classic, Shin Megami Tensei III Nocturne HD Remaster.

tc.name: 真・女神轉生III NOCTURNE HD REMASTER
tc.short_description: 於現代復甦的系列超級名作『真・女神轉生III NOCTURNE HD REMASTER』―― 讓體內的惡魔甦醒吧。

en.name: Frozen Flame
en.short_description: A challenging exploration and survival adventure, set in the dying world of Dragons. Only those who harness the power of Frozen Flame have the means to survive the harsh conditions of the realm and able to muster the strength to cleanse it for good.

tc.name: 冰封之焰
tc.short_description: 一款奇幻風格的開放世界角色扮演遊戲，你將經歷極具挑戰性的生存冒險。在遊戲中你可以自行建設家園、製作裝備，也可探索遺跡尋得寶藏，以面對無面者的末日軍團。目前遊戲支持超過4人的好友聯機，或10+人的自設伺服器。未來將開放容納更多玩家的生存模式官方伺服器。

en.name: Delicious! Pretty Girls Mahjong Solitaire
en.short_description: The Pretty Girls are back and they're delicious! Check out an upgraded version of Zoo's top selling Mahjong Solitaire with 8 new girls and a candy flavored theme. Match tile pairs to reveal a Pretty Girl in a sexy outfit hiding underneath. As you clear stages, the girls get more and more delicious!

tc.name: Delicious! Pretty Girls Mahjong Solitaire
tc.short_description: The Pretty Girls are back and they're delicious! Check out an upgraded version of Zoo's top selling Mahjong Solitaire with 8 new girls and a candy flavored theme. Match tile pairs to reveal a Pretty Girl in a sexy outfit hiding underneath. As you clear stages, the girls get more and more delicious!

en.name: YOU and ME and HER: A Love Story
en.short_description: YOU and ME and HER: A Love Story is the visual novel medium in its purest form. Will Shinichi choose Miyuki, the beautiful queen bee of the school, or the endearingly awkward misfit Aoi? With art by Tsuji Santa, these beautifully rendered romances will stay with you forever.

en.name: SOUTH PARK: SNOW DAY!
en.short_description: Play as the New kid in South Park and join Cartman, Stan, Kyle, and Kenny, in three-dimensional glory, to celebrate the most magical day in any young child’s life - a snow day!

tc.name: SOUTH PARK: SNOW DAY!
tc.short_description: 扮演南方公園的新屁孩，跟著阿ㄆ一ㄚˇ、屎蛋、凱子、阿尼加入3D的世界，歌頌所有孩子的生命裡最魔幻的一天：下雪天！

en.name: Summerland
en.short_description: Summerland is a first-person narrative game about morality and the afterlife. You take control of Matthew, a detective reliving the events of his past, being questioned on his morals along the way. In every door lies another memory, and every memory unlocks another door.

tc.name: Summerland
tc.short_description: Summerland is a first-person narrative game about morality and the afterlife. You take control of Matthew, a detective reliving the events of his past, being questioned on his morals along the way. In every door lies another memory, and every memory unlocks another door.

en.name: Taiji
en.short_description: Solve puzzle panels and uncover the meaning of the symbols within. Explore a dense world where secrets are hidden in plain sight.

tc.name: Taiji
tc.short_description: 解開面板上的謎題，揭開其中符號的含義。探索一個豐富多彩的世界，那裡的秘密都隱藏在眾目睽睽之下。

en.name: Epic Battle Fantasy 4
en.short_description: A light-hearted turn-based RPG, heavily inspired by old 2D classics. You will battle through waves of cute enemies, grow your characters, explore a diverse world, solve puzzles, and of course, save the world. (Just updated to version 3!)

en.name: First Class Trouble
en.short_description: First Class Trouble is a party game where players must work together and against each other to survive a disaster. The goal is to shut down a deadly A.I. Some players are impostors, secretly playing as human-looking killer robots intent on betraying the other players.

tc.name: First Class Trouble
tc.short_description: First Class Trouble是個玩家們爲了生存得互相合作，同時也得對付其他人的團體合作游戲。它的目的是關閉一部殺手人工智能。有些玩家是間諜，利用看起來像人類的殺手機器人準備背叛其他玩家。

en.name: Capsized
en.short_description: Capsized is a fast paced 2D platformer focused on intense action and exploration. As a intrepid space traveler, your ship has crash landed on a mysterious alien planet. You must navigate through the perilous environment and fight off blood-thirsty creatures to save your crewmates and escape with your lives!

tc.name: Capsized

You must navigate through the perilous environment and fight off blood-thirsty creatures to save your crewmates and escape with your lives!

en.name: Lovers in a Dangerous Spacetime
en.short_description: Explore a neon galaxy in your very own battleship in this 1- to 4-player couch co-op adventure.

tc.name: Lovers in a Dangerous Spacetime
tc.short_description: “爱的使者在危险时空”，激烈火爆。1 至 4 名玩家，置身巨型霓虹太空战舰中，训练太空射击协作。只有协同作战，你才能战胜反爱的邪恶力量，解救被绑架的太空兔，躲避真空死亡陷阱。

en.name: The House in Fata Morgana
en.short_description: A gothic suspense tale set in a cursed mansion. "The House in Fata Morgana" is a full-length visual novel spanning nearly a millennium that deals in tragedy, human nature, and insanity.

tc.name: The House in Fata Morgana
tc.short_description: A gothic suspense tale set in a cursed mansion. "The House in Fata Morgana" is a full-length visual novel spanning nearly a millennium that deals in tragedy, human nature, and insanity.

en.name: X-COM: UFO Defense
en.short_description: You are in control of X-COM: an organization formed by the world's governments to fight the ever-increasing alien menace.

tc.name: X-COM: UFO Defense
tc.short_description: You are in control of X-COM: an organization formed by the world's governments to fight the ever-increasing alien menace.

en.name: The Life and Suffering of Sir Brante — Chapter 1&2
en.short_description: A narrative-driven hardcore RPG set in a gritty world where the gods are real. Set out on a challenging lifetime journey, where every choice you make has a price to pay and consequence to it. Will you become an inquisitor, a judge, or conspire against the old order? Dare to decide!

tc.name: The Life and Suffering of Sir Brante — Chapter 1&2
tc.short_description: A narrative-driven hardcore RPG set in a gritty world where the gods are real. Set out on a challenging lifetime journey, where every choice you make has a price to pay and consequence to it. Will you become an inquisitor, a judge, or conspire against the old order? Dare to decide!

en.name: Ratropolis
en.short_description: A fusion of roguelite, tower defense, city-building, and deck-building! We created a new kind of real time strategy game filled with addictive and fast-paced gameplay. Create your deck, defend your city, and build the largest Ratropolis in history!

tc.name: Ratropolis
tc.short_description: 鼠之城邦是壹款使用卡牌來保衛城市，防禦敵人攻擊的遊戲。特別的是，遊戲具有即時戰略的特性，所以為了防禦即將到來的敵人，需要快速的判斷力和爆發力。通過遊戲獲得並使用卡牌來建設您的鼠之城邦吧!

en.name: Of Guards And Thieves
en.short_description: Of Guards and Thieves is a multiplayer stealth game in which high-powered guards face off against fast and elusive thieves in a contest of wits. Outsmarting the enemy and shooting your way through to the goal are equally valid strategies. Simple rules, emergent gameplay and high replayability.

tc.name: Of Guards And Thieves
tc.short_description: Of Guards and Thieves是一款多人隱形遊戲，其中高水平的後衛在斗智斗勇中與快速而難以捉摸的盜賊對峙。同樣，有效的策略是使敵人勝過對手並向目標射擊。 Of Guards and Thieves是一款具有簡單規則，突顯遊戲玩法和高重玩性的遊戲，一定會成為您遊戲系列中的佼佼者！

en.name: Vecter
en.short_description: Get in your ship, push the throttle to max, and try not to die. Daily leaderboards where your name stays forever if you're good enough. Custom colors, custom music, YouTube in-game. It's free. What are you waiting for?

tc.name: Vecter
tc.short_description: Get in your ship, push the throttle to max, and try not to die. Daily leaderboards where your name stays forever if you're good enough. Custom colors, custom music, YouTube in-game. It's free. What are you waiting for?

en.name: Ride 2
en.short_description: The fastest and most iconic bikes in the world's biggest digital garage!

tc.name: Ride 2
tc.short_description: The fastest and most iconic bikes in the world's biggest digital garage!

en.name: Hatoful Boyfriend
en.short_description: Congratulations! You’ve been accepted as the only human student at the prestigious St. PigeoNation’s Institute, a school for talented birds! Roam the halls and find love in between classes as a sophomore student at the world’s greatest pigeon high school.

tc.name: Hatoful Boyfriend
tc.short_description: Congratulations! You’ve been accepted as the only human student at the prestigious St. PigeoNation’s Institute, a school for talented birds! Roam the halls and find love in between classes as a sophomore student at the world’s greatest pigeon high school.

en.name: Detective Di: The Silk Rose Murders
en.short_description: A thrilling point-and-click adventure game where you play as Di Renjie, ancient China's most famous and gifted investigator, as he tracks a serial killer in the heart of the Tang Dynasty's capital city.

tc.name: Detective Di: The Silk Rose Murders | 狄仁杰之锦蔷薇
tc.short_description: A thrilling point-and-click adventure game where you play as Di Renjie, ancient China's most famous and gifted investigator, as he tracks a serial killer in the heart of the Tang Dynasty's capital city.

en.name: Rusty Lake Hotel
en.short_description: Are you ready to serve the guests in the Rusty Lake Hotel? Solve all mysteries in this dark and eerie puzzle game. Rusty Lake Hotel is a point-and-click adventure by the creators of the Rusty Lake & Cube Escape series.

tc.name: Rusty Lake Hotel
tc.short_description: 《鏽湖飯店》是一款獨特的益智遊戲，它離奇古怪的場景設置靈感源自於大衛‧林區的電視連續劇《雙峰》。

en.name: Hotel Renovator
en.short_description: Unleash your inner designer and renovate the hotel of your dreams! Embark on a makeover journey to turn this worn-out place into a successful getaway. Play with thousands of furniture pieces and accessories, and manage the hotel to get 5-star reviews!

tc.name: Hotel Renovator
tc.short_description: 釋放你的創造力，設計夢想中的酒店！展開一場改造之旅，將破舊酒店變成度假天堂。管理設施，設計精緻房間，打造讓黃金時代黯然失色的非凡勝地。獲得五星評價！

en.name: Blockland
en.short_description: Blockland is a non-linear sandbox game with no set goals, giving players the freedom to design and construct elaborate structures. Styled as a tiny minifigure, players build inside of the virtual world using bricks reminiscent of toy blocks.

tc.name: Blockland
tc.short_description: Blockland is a non-linear sandbox game with no set goals, giving players the freedom to design and construct elaborate structures. Styled as a tiny minifigure, players build inside of the virtual world using bricks reminiscent of toy blocks.

en.name: No More Heroes
en.short_description: Fight your way to the top in this HD remaster of everyone's favorite assassin action game! As all-American otaku Travis Touchdown, use your trusty beam katana to hack-and-slash though the competition and claim the title of world's #1 assassin!

tc.name: No More Heroes
tc.short_description: 在廣受喜愛的刺客動作遊戲高畫質復刻版中，披荊斬棘登上巔峰！ 玩家將以美國御宅族特拉維斯（Travis Touchdown）為主角展開冒險，請使用您所信任的光束武士刀進行砍殺遊戲，破關斬將獲得世界第 1 的刺客頭銜！

en.name: Vivid Knight
en.short_description: "Vivid Knight" is a "party-building roguelike" game in which you collect friends who have been turned into jewels and fight by combining their abilities! Explore the ever-changing dungeon and harness the gems you have gathered to challenge the labyrinth!

tc.name: Vivid Knight
tc.short_description: "Vivid Knight" is a "party-building roguelike" game in which you collect friends who have been turned into jewels and fight by combining their abilities! Explore the ever-changing dungeon and harness the gems you have gathered to challenge the labyrinth!

en.name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
en.short_description: With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new...

tc.name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
tc.short_description: Sid Meier 的 Civilization (文明帝國) 系列在全球已售出逾六百萬套，並獲各地支持者與媒體好評，被視為是史上最經典的電腦遊戲系列之一。 現在，Sid Meier 與 Firaxis Games 更把這一款引人入迷的有趣遊戲帶往另一高峰，加入新的遊戲方式，新的勝敗條件，新的工具來管理擴張您的文明，並用全新的方法，讓自訂遊戲更簡單，多人模式更有趣，選項更多。 Civilization IV 有細緻的畫面，彷彿活著的 3D 世界，把遊戲體驗提升至全新的境界。 Civilization IV 已受玩家讚為 2005 年十大遊戲，是全球玩家都一定要擁有的遊戲！

en.name: Great Hero's Beard
en.short_description: Start your journey as a simple weakling and watch as you grow a big-ass warlord's beard, slay a bunch of demigods & rescue princesses who will show their gratitude. Never stop looting.

tc.name: Great Hero's Beard
tc.short_description: 從菜雞到大神的路總是艱苦的，但至少有無數的妹子等著你。當你成為神擋殺神佛擋殺佛的大鬍子，未來的路上還有怎樣的險境在等著你呢？

en.name: Attack on Titan 2 - A.O.T.2
en.short_description: Abandon all fear. Attack on Titan 2 is the gripping sequel to the action game based on the worldwide hit anime series "Attack on Titan."

tc.name: 進擊的巨人２
tc.short_description: 以超人氣動畫作品「進擊的巨人」的世界觀為原作的戰術狩獵動作遊戲「進擊的巨人」系列最新作。

en.name: Blade Assault
en.short_description: Blade Assault is a 2D action rogue-lite platformer with beautiful pixel art set in a desolate sci-fi world. Fight against the corrupt military of Esperanza as part of the resistance force of the Undercity. Bring the corrupt to justice by becoming stronger and fighting alongside your trusty comrades.

tc.name: Blade Assault
tc.short_description: 《刀鋒戰神》是一款2D平台Rogue-lite遊戲，使用華麗的像素藝術與SF科幻風格。玩家將成為地下城市的抵抗軍，對抗埃斯佩蘭薩的軍隊。請與夥伴一起挖掘強大的力量吧！

en.name: Stacking
en.short_description: Embark on an adventure to rescue Charlie’s family from the nefarious industrialist known only as the 'Baron.'

tc.name: Stacking
tc.short_description: Embark on an adventure to rescue Charlie’s family from the nefarious industrialist known only as the 'Baron.'

en.name: Chicken Invaders 5
en.short_description: Chicken Invaders puts you at the forefront of a battle against invading intergalactic chickens, bent on revenge for our oppression of Earth chickens. This time, the chickens have hatched a devious plan to block out sunlight and freeze Earth to death!

tc.name: Chicken Invaders 5
tc.short_description: Chicken Invaders puts you at the forefront of a battle against invading intergalactic chickens, bent on revenge for our oppression of Earth chickens. This time, the chickens have hatched a devious plan to block out sunlight and freeze Earth to death!

en.name: The Outer Worlds: Spacer's Choice Edition
en.short_description: The Outer Worlds: Spacer’s Choice Edition is the ultimate way to play the award-winning RPG from Obsidian Entertainment and Private Division. Including the base game and all DLC, this remastered masterpiece is the absolute best version of The Outer Worlds.

tc.name: The Outer Worlds: Spacer's Choice Edition
tc.short_description: 《天外世界：太空人之選版》是遊玩Obsidian Entertainment與Private Division這款獲獎RPG遊戲的最佳之選。這個經過重製的傑作包含主遊戲與所有可下載內容，已為最新硬體進行最佳化，絕對是最棒版本的《天外世界》。

en.name: TRYP FPV: Drone Racer Simulator
en.short_description: Fly freely and perfect your skills as an FPV pilot without the risk of breakage, with hyper-realistic visuals and flight sensations. Whether you're a beginner or an expert, TRYP FPV is the next-generation simulator that immerses you in the pure adrenaline of FPV drone flying.

tc.name: TRYP FPV: Drone Racer Simulator
tc.short_description: 自由飛行並提升您的FPV飛行技能，無需擔心損壞，享受超逼真的視覺效果和飛行體驗。無論您是新手還是專家，TRYP FPV 都是新一代模擬器，讓您沉浸在純粹的FPV飛行刺激之中。

en.name: FINAL FANTASY V
en.short_description: The original FINAL FANTASY V comes to life with completely new graphics and audio as a 2D pixel remaster! A remodeled take on the fifth game in the world-renowned FINAL FANTASY series! Enjoy the timeless story told through charming retro graphics.

tc.name: FINAL FANTASY V
tc.short_description: 以嶄新的畫質與音質復活的《FINAL FANTASY V》像素複刻版。著名RPG遊戲《FF》系列第五作現已通過精美鮮明的2D畫面回歸。 原版的氣氛與樂趣有了更大的提升，玩家可以更輕鬆地享受這一不朽篇章。

en.name: TY the Tasmanian Tiger
en.short_description: G'day, Mate. Explore the wilds of Australia with TY the Tasmanian Tiger, the charming Aussie platformer.

tc.name: TY the Tasmanian Tiger
tc.short_description: G'day, Mate. Explore the wilds of Australia with TY the Tasmanian Tiger, the charming Aussie platformer.

en.name: Tiny Tina's Assault on Dragon Keep: A Wonderlands One-shot Adventure
en.short_description: Smash skeletons, defeat dragons, and battle giant golems in Tiny Tina's Assault on Dragon Keep: A Wonderlands One-Shot Adventure. Experience the acclaimed 2013 quest that started it all in this standalone campaign jam-packed with fantasy, fun, and mountains of magical loot!

tc.name: 奇幻樂園大冒險之小蒂娜強襲龍堡
tc.short_description: 在《奇幻樂園大冒險之小蒂娜強襲龍堡》裡揍扁骷髏、擊倒巨龍，並和巨大魔像展開激鬥。這款發行於2013年、獲獎無數的作品，為大家帶來滿滿的奇幻與樂趣，還有超多魔法戰利品！

en.name: The Jackbox Party Pack 2
en.short_description: The sequel to the party game phenomenon The Jackbox Party Pack, featuring FIVE fresh, rib-tickling party games! Your phones or tablets are your controllers – no big mess of controllers needed. For up to 8 players plus an Audience of up to 10,000! It’s a game-night riot in a box… without the box!

tc.name: The Jackbox Party Pack 2
tc.short_description: The sequel to the party game phenomenon The Jackbox Party Pack, featuring FIVE fresh, rib-tickling party games! Your phones or tablets are your controllers – no big mess of controllers needed. For up to 8 players plus an Audience of up to 10,000! It’s a game-night riot in a box… without the box!

en.name: ENDLESS™ Dungeon - Definitive Edition
en.short_description: ENDLESS™ Dungeon is a Rogue-lite Tactical Action game, set in the award-winning ENDLESS™ Universe. Recruit a team of shipwrecked heroes, plunge into a long-abandoned space station, and protect your crystal against never-ending waves of monsters… or die trying, get reloaded, and try again.

tc.name: 《ENDLESS™ Dungeon終極版》
tc.short_description: 《ENDLESS™ Dungeon》是一款融合了隨機地城、戰術動作以及塔防類型的獨特遊戲，背景設定在曾榮獲大獎的ENDLESS™宇宙。單槍匹馬，或在合作模式中與朋友一同潛入一座荒廢已久的空間站，招募一隊在船難中幸存下的英雄，保護你的水晶不被一波又一波的怪物給毀掉。

en.name: Rabbit and Steel
en.short_description: RABBIT & STEEL is a co-op action roguelike that recreates the essence of high-level MMO raiding in a randomized, simplified, bunny-sized package. Choose your class, gather your rabbit-eared companions and battle your way to the Moonlit Pinnacle!

tc.name: Rabbit and Steel
tc.short_description: RABBIT & STEEL is a co-op action roguelike that recreates the essence of high-level MMO raiding in a randomized, simplified, bunny-sized package. Choose your class, gather your rabbit-eared companions and battle your way to the Moonlit Pinnacle!

en.name: Zero Escape: The Nonary Games
en.short_description: Kidnapped and taken to an unfamiliar location, nine people find themselves forced to participate in a diabolical Nonary Game by an enigmatic mastermind called Zero. Why were they there? Why were they chosen to put their lives on the line? And more importantly, who can be trusted?

tc.name: Zero Escape: The Nonary Games

en.name: SpellForce 3 Fallen God
en.short_description: Command the Trolls and lead them on an epic journey across the wild continent of Urgath. As Chieftain of the Moonkin, a tribe driven from its home by tusk hunters and disease, their survival is in your hands.

tc.name: SpellForce 3 Fallen God

en.name: Ben and Ed - Blood Party
en.short_description: Welcome to the Blood Party! Play together with up to 3 people and compete in deadly game shows. Customize your zombie, build your own levels, share them via Steam Workshop and die a lot.

tc.name: Ben and Ed - Blood Party
tc.short_description: Welcome to the Blood Party! Play together with up to 3 people and compete in deadly game shows. Customize your zombie, build your own levels, share them via Steam Workshop and die a lot.

en.name: Castle In The Darkness
en.short_description: Castle In The Darkness is a fun and challenging shout out to the early days of video games! It's an action exploration platformer with some RPG elements, much like games from the Castlevania or Metroid series. It's super fast-paced, challenging, and full of secrets!

tc.name: Castle In The Darkness

en.name: Dead Rising® 2
en.short_description: The sequel to the million-plus selling Dead Rising, Dead Rising 2 takes the zombie survival horror to Fortune City, America’s latest and greatest entertainment playground.

tc.name: Dead Rising® 2
tc.short_description: 銷量破百萬的Dead Rising續集，今次Dead Rising 2將喪屍及生存恐怖遊戲，一次過帶進美國最新最大的娛樂主題公園Fortune City。

en.name: Iron Conflict
en.short_description: Fight for glory in Iron Conflict, an online competitive real-time strategy game that features both modern and WW2 aircrafts and tanks. Make use of military tactics and choose from hundreds of different units to win on the ground and in the air!

tc.name: Iron Conflict
tc.short_description: Iron Conflict是一款以近現代軍事戰爭為背景，多人線上競技的即時戰略遊戲，玩家可在遊戲中隨心組合作戰單位，與敵方聯盟展開空地一體的戰爭角逐！

en.name: Battle Carnival
en.short_description: Battle Carnival is Character-based non-P2W, Free to Play online shooter. While each characters are playful as they have many different skills for different situations, the game still demands extensive team play skill as your killer moves can blossom in close cooperation with your teammates against the enemy.

tc.name: Battle Carnival
tc.short_description: Battle Carnival is Character-based non-P2W, Free to Play online shooter. While each characters are playful as they have many different skills for different situations, the game still demands extensive team play skill as your killer moves can blossom in close cooperation with your teammates against the enemy.

en.name: Ghost 1.0
en.short_description: A mysterious agent, capable of becoming a digital ghost, sneaks aboard the Nakamura Space Station. This is where the fun begins: the station is well-protected with its heavy defences, never-ending arsenal of weapons, and mysterious artifacts. It will all have to be destroyed.

tc.name: Ghost 1.0

en.name: AER Memories of Old
en.short_description: Transform into a bird and fly to explore and experience a vibrant world of floating islands in the sky. Venture down into lost ancient ruins where each step leads you closer to the end of the world.

en.name: Betrayer
en.short_description: Betrayer is a first person action adventure game that takes you to the New World at the turn of the 17th century.The year is 1604. You sailed from England expecting to join a struggling colony on the coast of Virginia. Instead, you find only ghosts and mysteries. What catastrophe blighted the land and drained it of color and life?

en.name: STAR WARS™ Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II
en.short_description: Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II picks up where the award-winning Dark Forces™ game left off...with even more features and firepower in dazzling 3D graphics. As Kyle Katarn, you must acquire a lightsaber and learn the ways of the Force to become a Jedi Knight.

tc.name: STAR WARS™ Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II
tc.short_description: Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II picks up where the award-winning Dark Forces™ game left off...with even more features and firepower in dazzling 3D graphics. As Kyle Katarn, you must acquire a lightsaber and learn the ways of the Force to become a Jedi Knight.

en.name: Killing Time
en.short_description: As a trained assassin, all the battles that Hatsuki has been in will reappear in all kinds of ways. As the player, you hold her destiny, whether the game ends in NTR, pure love or even hold on to virginity, it’s all up to you!

tc.name: Killing Time
tc.short_description: 作為暗殺者的女主，根據選擇和戰鬥結果會出現各種各樣的情景再現，雖然全篇偏向NTR或凌辱情節為主，但也有戀人之間的純愛路線，遊戲過程中可以是以處女之身通關。堅守貞操還是墮落下去，這都是你來決定，對RPG遊戲不感冒的玩家也可以輕鬆地完成遊戲通關。

en.name: Ancestors Legacy
en.short_description: Ancestors Legacy is a squad-based real time strategy with a strong focus on tactics. Inspired by medieval European history, it brings to life four different nations and their conflicts, usually solved by war.

tc.name: Ancestors Legacy
tc.short_description: Ancestors Legacy is a squad-based real time strategy with a strong focus on tactics. Inspired by medieval European history, it brings to life four different nations and their conflicts, usually solved by war.

en.name: inbento
en.short_description: A cooking puzzle game about arranging beautiful bento lunches! Solve 120+ recipes, play with food, think inside the box and enjoy a heartwarming story in this culinary brain-teaser!

tc.name: 內飯盒 - inbento
tc.short_description: 一款準備美麗便當盒的烹飪益智遊戲！在這款廚藝挑戰裡破解120+種食譜，擺弄食物、仔細思量盒中料理，並享受一個溫馨的故事！

en.name: Sentinels of the Multiverse
en.short_description: You've never played a comic book like this! Control a team of heroes battling evil villains across dynamic environments. Play out epic comic book battles come to life in this exciting adaptation of the hit card game.

tc.name: Painkiller: Black Edition

en.name: Hellpoint
en.short_description: Hellpoint is an intense action RPG taking place on Irid Novo, a derelict space station soaked in an intoxicating dark sci fi atmosphere. Fight dreadful creatures, face the Cosmic Gods and unravel their twisted story. Should the challenge be too great, play with a friend in local or online coop.

en.name: Mandragora: Whispers of the Witch Tree
en.short_description: Slay your way in Mandragora: Whispers of the Witch Tree, an epic action RPG set in a dark fantasy world. Battle monsters, master six unique Classes, craft hundreds of useful items, and explore the secrets of an expansive, interconnected world.

tc.name: Mandragora: Whispers of the Witch Tree
tc.short_description: 在《秘影曼德拉：女巫樹的低語》中走上屬於你的戰鬥之路，這是一款黑暗奇幻動作RPG。與怪物戰鬥，為你的武器和裝備製作強力升級，探索這個廣闊破碎世界的秘密。

en.name: Lichdom: Battlemage
en.short_description: Play the first game where the Mage is a total badass!

en.name: 大千世界
en.short_description: 小明因黑人抬棺穿越到神秘新大陆开始了传（造）奇（孽）的一生。这是一款颠覆性的RPG扮演类游戏，是一个完全的开放性世界，你不再被主线剧情所拘束可以自由的在这个世界的各个角落探索，寻找宝物，或是完成一件件难忘的冒险。在游戏中做一个坏人亦或者是一个好人都由你自己决定，你还可以加入各种门派，学习绝学，制作装备炼制法宝等等，直到你从一个屌丝成长为一个大屌丝！

en.short_description: Everybody wants to rule the world! Achieve global power with EVIL GENIUS, the one and only complete world domination simulator. All the everyday tasks of the deliciously wicked mastermind are available to experience and master from building your ultra-secret base to developing spectacular super-weapons to carry out your nefarious master...

en.short_description: It is a free-to-play shooting game.You may choose 6 types of warships used in the WWII to play PvP and PvE naval battle. Start the voyage with your warships and fight for the honor of your fleet!

en.short_description: OVR Advanced Settings is a Dashboard Application for VR, that allows you to access many settings. OVRAS also has a myriad of utility features such as: simulated movement, adding smooth/snap turn to any game, video controls for the headset such as brightness, per-app bindings and much more.

en.name: Guacamelee! Gold Edition
en.short_description: Guacamelee! is a Metroidvania-style action-platformer set in a magical Mexican-inspired world. The game draws its inspiration from traditional Mexican culture and folklore, and features many interesting and unique characters.

tc.name: Guacamelee! Gold Edition
tc.short_description: 《Guacamelee! Gold Edition》是一款類銀河戰士惡魔成風格的動作平台遊戲，而它奇妙的故事背景靈感則來自墨西哥傳統文化和民間傳說，並有許多有趣且獨特的角色。

en.name: Felvidek
en.short_description: In Felvidek, a JRPG set in 15th century Slovakia, you embrace the role of an alcoholic knight Pavol. Meet diverse and interesting characters to help you drive out the Hussites and Ottomans who blight this land.

en.name: Children of the Sun
en.short_description: On a deadly road trip into darkness, control the path of a single bullet and unleash a fury of vengeance on the sinister cult that ruined your life in this tactical puzzle-shooter.

tc.name: 太陽之子
tc.short_description: 在這款戰略解謎射擊遊戲中，踏上一段通往黑暗深邃的死亡旅程、控制一發子彈的通道，並向摧毀你人生的邪惡教團釋放復仇的怒火。

en.name: Academia : School Simulator
en.short_description: Design, build, and manage a high school with terrific teachers and fantastic facilities or simply let your students poop in the bushes? Academia : School Simulator is a management/tycoon game where you get to decide!

tc.name: Academia : School Simulator
tc.short_description: 《Academia：School Simulator》是一款經營模擬遊戲，讓你可以設計、建造並管理你心中的夢幻高中！學生會在校園中談戀愛、被當掉，或遭到霸凌。身為校長，你將看著他們渡過這段充滿精彩起伏的高中生活。

en.name: Spirit of the North
en.short_description: Spirit of the North is a single-player 3rd-person adventure game inspired by the breathtaking and mysterious landscapes of Iceland. Play as an ordinary red fox whose story becomes entwined with the guardian of the Northern Lights, a female spirit fox.

tc.name: Spirit of the North
tc.short_description: 《Spirit of the North》以冰島美不勝收的神秘風景為靈感來源，是一個單人第三視角探險遊戲。遊戲劇情以北歐民俗傳說為藍本創作。

en.name: Dead Effect 2
en.short_description: Dead Effect 2 is the newest addition to the acclaimed Dead Effect franchise. This action sci-fi shooter is looking to push the boundaries of first-person shooters to new levels with slick graphics, rich narrative and RPG elements.

tc.name: Dead Effect 2
tc.short_description: Dead Effect 2 is the newest addition to the acclaimed Dead Effect franchise. This action sci-fi shooter is looking to push the boundaries of first-person shooters to new levels with slick graphics, rich narrative and RPG elements.

en.name: TopSpin 2K25
en.short_description: TopSpin 2K25 returns as a next-level tennis sim, bringing realistic court physics and challenging skill-based gameplay. Play single or multiplayer locally or online. Build your MyPLAYER or play as icons like Roger Federer and Serena Williams with custom animations mirroring their real-life styles.

tc.name: 《職業網球大聯盟2K25》
tc.short_description: 《職業網球大聯盟2K25》是重出江湖、全面進化的網球模擬遊戲，帶來逼真無比的球場物理機制，以及強調技巧且具挑戰性的遊戲玩法，支援本機或連線進行單人或多人遊戲。打造你獨一無二的MyPLAYER，或化身Roger Federer及Serena Williams等知名球星，這些球星皆有特別製作的動畫來反映他們的真實球風。

en.name: Iconoclasts
en.short_description: Join renegade mechanic Robin and uncover the secrets of a dying planet. Explore a big world filled with intricate puzzles, interesting characters and menacing bosses in a beautiful platform adventure that tells a personal story about faith, purpose and the challenge of helping people.

tc.name: Iconoclasts
tc.short_description: 和叛逆機械師Robin壹起揭開瀕死行星的秘密。這款華麗的平臺動作遊戲讓妳探索充滿謎題的世界，和有趣的角色互動並挑戰精心設計的BOSS戰，感受關於目標、信仰和嘗試幫助他人的故事。

en.name: Rock of Ages 3: Make & Break

en.short_description: Freedom Fighters is an intense third-person action game set in an alternate history New York during the invasion of a foreign superpower. en.name: Submerged
en.short_description: Submerged is a third-person combat-free game in which you explore a mysterious flooded city and discover the beauty of desolation in vast outdoor environments. You take on the role of Miku, a young girl who has brought her wounded brother to the city in their small fishing boat.

tc.name: Submerged
tc.short_description: 淹沒之城是第三人稱無戰鬥遊戲，在其中你可以探索神秘的汪洋城市，在偌大的戶外環境中發現荒涼之美。你成為米古的角色，一個年輕女孩帶著她受傷的弟弟，乘著他們的小漁船來到這個城市。用船到處探索汪洋城市，登上沉沒的建築物，用望遠鏡看清城市，尋找可以拯救弟弟的補給品。用自己的步調探索城市時，你碰上了多采多姿、繁茂生長的棲息地，而發現隱藏的物品慢慢拼湊出破碎世界還有一個破碎家庭的故事。

en.name: Mortal Shell
en.short_description: Their Flesh is Your Armor. Mortal Shell is a deep action-RPG that tests your sanity and resilience in a shattered world. Survival demands superior awareness, precision, and instincts. Possess lost warriors, track down hidden sanctums of the devout, and face formidable foes.

tc.name: Mortal Shell
tc.short_description: 《Mortal Shell》是一款深度的動作 RPG，並會在一個支離破碎的世界內考驗你的理智與韌性。敵人的憐憫之心蕩然無存，你只有依靠卓越的感知力、精準度和直覺才能倖存。控制死去的戰士、找到虔誠信徒的秘密聖地，並面對可怕的敵人。

en.short_description: 本作是2d剧情向角色扮演恐怖游戏。在本作设定中，玩家将扮演灵异探险社的社员，分工调查被委托的事件，探索场景，寻找线索，并最终解决委托中灵异作祟的问题。

tc.name: 提西探險社
tc.short_description: 本作是2D劇情向角色扮演恐怖遊戲。在本作設定中，玩家將扮演靈異探險社的社員，分工調查被委託的事件，探索場景，尋找線索，並最終解決委託中靈異作祟的問題。

en.name: Otaku's Fantasy
en.short_description: A new world had opened the door for me. All kinds of women threw themselves at me, and for all kinds of strange reasons. No matter it is a mixed-race lady with huge buttocks, a well-known news anchor secretly wants to be whipped, or a hungry cugar that almost eats me up, they all wants to know what it's like to be with me.

tc.name: Otaku's Fantasy
tc.short_description: 那之后，从零开始的异世界向我敞开了大门。豐腴的混血大美女、不為人知的知性美女主持人、投資公司的女性能手、超一流大公司美女OL、還有如狼似虎的名流人妻。日復一日我被那些充滿好奇以及渴望的女人們玩弄，眼下想要阻止這種事繼續發生的話，貌似已經晚了完全停不下來了！這就是宅男夢寐以求的世界！

en.name: The Golf Club™ 2019 featuring PGA TOUR
en.short_description: Do you have what it takes to win PGA TOUR’s FedExCup? Compete in the all new officially licensed PGA TOUR Career mode. Play on famous courses like TPC Boston, TPC Sawgrass and more.

tc.name: The Golf Club™ 2019 featuring PGA TOUR
tc.short_description: 您是否有實力稱霸PGA TOUR的FedExCup？快來全新官方授權的PGA TOUR Career模式中尋找答案，在諸如TPC Boston、TPC Sawgrass等著名球場中盡情比賽吧。

en.name: KROSMAGA
en.short_description: Krosmaga is a game of skill where the Twelve Gods of the Krosmoz universe settle their differences by pitting creatures, mortals, and demi-gods against each other in a battle of truly epic proportions!

tc.name: KROSMAGA
tc.short_description: Krosmaga is a game of skill where the Twelve Gods of the Krosmoz universe settle their differences by pitting creatures, mortals, and demi-gods against each other in a battle of truly epic proportions!

en.name: Summer in Mara
en.short_description: Take care of your own island and sail with your boat in this cozy farming adventure! Relax and unwind exploring a tropical archipelago or harvesting your own crops while helping others. Discover the story of Summer in Mara, with farming, crafting and exploring mechanics.

tc.name: Summer in Mara
tc.short_description: Take care of your own island and sail with your boat in this cozy farming adventure! Relax and unwind exploring a tropical archipelago or harvesting your own crops while helping others. Discover the story of Summer in Mara, with farming, crafting and exploring mechanics.

en.name: BURIED STARS
en.short_description: A mystery adventure set at the collapse site of a live survival audition show. Trapped contestants communicate with each other—and the outside world through social media—as they wait for rescue. But as unexpected events unfold, trust begins to crack, and survival becomes far more complicated.

tc.name: BURIED STARS
tc.short_description: 《BURIED STARS》是一款以現場直播選秀節目發生坍塌事故為背景的懸疑冒險遊戲。 受困的參賽者們彼此交流，或透過社群媒體與外界聯繫，在等待救援的同時，一場突如其來的事件，讓他們陷入信任崩潰與生存危機的深淵。

en.name: Internet Generation
en.short_description: A story about a dying chat server. Moderators are abusing their power, the owner has neglected the server, and the lives of members are miserable. And you, as a newcomer, will pick up your keyboard, and overthrow the owner and moderators' tyranny!

tc.name: 互联网原住民 Internet Generation
tc.short_description: A story about a dying chat server. Moderators are abusing their power, the owner has neglected the server, and the lives of members are miserable. And you, as a newcomer, will pick up your keyboard, and overthrow the owner and moderators' tyranny!

en.name: The Casting of Frank Stone™
en.short_description: The shadow of Frank Stone looms over Cedar Hills, a town forever altered by his violent past. As a group of young friends are about to discover, Stone’s blood-soaked legacy cuts deep, leaving scars across families, generations, and the very fabric of reality itself.

tc.name: The Casting of Frank Stone™
tc.short_description: 法蘭克‧史東的暴行永遠改變了雪松丘，他的陰影至今依然籠罩著這座城鎮。一群少男少女結伴冒險，他們本來想要調查史東的恐怖過往，想不到卻遭遇更加讓人毛骨悚然的事件……

en.name: BallisticNG
en.short_description: BallisticNG is a high speed, all thrills anti-gravity combat racer and open modding environment developed as a tribute to old school classics such as Wipeout, Rollcage and Jet Moto.

tc.name: BallisticNG
tc.short_description: BallisticNG is a high speed, all thrills anti-gravity combat racer and open modding environment developed as a tribute to old school classics such as Wipeout, Rollcage and Jet Moto.

en.name: AI War: Fleet Command
en.short_description: "You are outgunned. You are massively outnumbered. You must win." These are your orders. Humanity has already fought its war against the machines -- and lost. AI death squads stand watch over every planet and every wormhole, the few remaining human settlements are held captive in orbiting bubbles, and the AIs have turned their...

tc.name: AI War: Fleet Command
tc.short_description: "You are outgunned. You are massively outnumbered. You must win." These are your orders. Humanity has already fought its war against the machines -- and lost. AI death squads stand watch over every planet and every wormhole, the few remaining human settlements are held captive in orbiting bubbles, and the AIs have turned their...

en.name: DYSMANTLE
en.short_description: Ascend from your shelter. Ruin everything. Escape the wretched island. ⚔️🔨🎣🌱🌵🍰 Explore. Fight. Level up. Survive. Gather. Craft. Harvest. Hunt. Build. Farm. Solve puzzles. Fish. Cook. Live. Enjoy the bittersweet post-apocalypse.

tc.name: DYSMANTLE
tc.short_description: Ascend from your shelter. Ruin everything. Escape the wretched island. ⚔️🔨🎣🌱🌵🍰 Explore. Fight. Level up. Survive. Gather. Craft. Harvest. Hunt. Build. Farm. Solve puzzles. Fish. Cook. Live. Enjoy the bittersweet post-apocalypse.

en.name: Maximum Action
en.short_description: MAXIMUM Action is a brutal and satisfying physics-based first person shooter influenced by Hong Kong cinema, heroic slow motion bloodshed, and old-school FPS ACTION.

tc.name: Maximum Action
tc.short_description: MAXIMUM Action is a brutal and satisfying physics-based first person shooter influenced by Hong Kong cinema, heroic slow motion bloodshed, and old-school FPS ACTION.

en.name: The Red Solstice
en.short_description: 2280 A.D. The last few survivors of a ruined Earth seek a new home: Mars, a planet whose inhabitants didn't take too kindly to outsiders. The Red Solstice is a tense, tactical, squad-based action game. Fight to survive with up to 8 players in co-op, or lead your own squad in single-player mode.

tc.name: The Red Solstice
tc.short_description: 2280 A.D. The last few survivors of a ruined Earth seek a new home: Mars, a planet whose inhabitants didn't take too kindly to outsiders. The Red Solstice is a tense, tactical, squad-based action game. Fight to survive with up to 8 players in co-op, or lead your own squad in single-player mode.

en.name: Trials Evolution: Gold Edition
en.short_description: Trials Evolution: Gold Edition marks the Trials franchise’s triumphant return to the PC gaming platform. RedLynx’s signature franchise, the Trials series first made its mark in gaming with the 2008 release of Trials 2 SE for the PC.

tc.name: Trials Evolution: Gold Edition
tc.short_description: Trials Evolution: Gold Edition marks the Trials franchise’s triumphant return to the PC gaming platform. RedLynx’s signature franchise, the Trials series first made its mark in gaming with the 2008 release of Trials 2 SE for the PC.

en.name: DON'T SCREAM
en.short_description: If you scream, you restart. A jumpscare horror simulator where you walk through a pitch black forest and escape by reaching 8:00 AM.

tc.name: DON'T SCREAM
tc.short_description: 如果您尖叫，就要重新開始。由兩名獨立開發人員製作的虛幻引擎 5 恐怖短篇遊戲。挑戰：在不尖叫的情況下探索森林 18 分鐘。問題在於什麼？只有當您移動時，時間才會流逝。這是一款讓親朋好友嚇得驚慌失措的完美遊戲。需要麥克風！

en.name: The Blackout Club
en.short_description: The Blackout Club is a first-person co-op horror game centered around a group of teenage friends investigating a monstrous secret beneath the skin of their small town. 1-4 players explore procedurally-generated missions against a fearsome enemy you can only see with your eyes closed.

tc.name: The Blackout Club
tc.short_description: The Blackout Club is a first-person co-op horror game centered around a group of teenage friends investigating a monstrous secret beneath the skin of their small town. 1-4 players explore procedurally-generated missions against a fearsome enemy you can only see with your eyes closed.

en.name: Super Robot Wars 30
en.short_description: 30 years on, the battle for our world's future continues. Super Robot Wars is a tactical RPG that brings characters and robots from a variety of mecha anime together to battle their mutual foes.

tc.name: 超級機器人大戰30
tc.short_description: 累積30年的歲月——戰鬥吧！為了這顆星球的未來 超級機器人大戰系列，是讓各種動畫作品中登場的機器人， 超越不同作品的藩籬齊聚一堂，迎戰共同敵人的模擬RPG遊戲。

en.name: The Battle of Polytopia
en.short_description: Welcome to the unique, turn-based strategy game set in the strange, flat world of the Square. Lead one of 16 distinct civilizations to victory by expanding your empire, researching technologies, and ultimately become ruler of the world! Play in single-player or multiplayer mode for up to 16 players.

tc.name: The Battle of Polytopia
tc.short_description: 欢迎来到这款独特的回合制策略游戏，游戏背景设定在一个奇异而又平坦的“方块”星球。领导 12 个不同文明中的一个，扩张帝国、研究科技并成为整个星球的统治者来最终取得胜利！支持单人 和多人模式，最多支持 12 名玩家。

en.name: Lightyear Frontier
en.short_description: In Lightyear Frontier you use your powerful trusty mech to farm on a large beautiful alien planet. Settle your homestead, farm and deliver produce to remote colonies, gather and manage resources, build, craft, explore, expand, improve your mech, meet neighbors, and make a place to call your own.

tc.name: Lightyear Frontier
tc.short_description: 在《Lightyear Frontier》中，你將駕駛強大可靠的機甲，在廣闊美麗的異星上進行耕作。你可以安置住宅、進行耕作，並將農產品運送至遙遠的殖民地，還能採集與管理資源、建造、製作、擴展、升級機甲、認識鄰居，並打造屬於你自己的天地。

en.name: WARRIORS OROCHI 3 Ultimate Definitive Edition
en.short_description: The truly ultimate "WARRIORS OROCHI 3" is now available on Steam! With all the content of "WARRIORS OROCHI 3", new characters and episodes that deepen the story, new modes, and DLC that has been released for other platforms, enjoy the world of Orochi to your heart's content!

tc.name: 無雙OROCHI 蛇魔２ Ultimate
tc.short_description: 終極顛峰之作『無雙OROCHI蛇魔２』於Steam登場！不僅可遊玩『無雙OROCHI蛇魔２』全部的內容，透過追加新角色和插曲讓故事更具深度，新模式或於其他平台發佈的下載內容等各項追加要素，盡情暢遊OROCHI的世界！

en.name: Rune Factory 4 Special
en.short_description: Journey to the vibrant world of Rune Factory and experience the legendary fantasy farming adventure like never before!

tc.name: 符文工廠4豪華版
tc.short_description: 遊戲內容豐富有趣的溫馨RPG！ 在奇幻世界中盡情享受冒險和日常生活吧！

en.name: Shadow Arena
en.short_description: Shadow Arena Early Access has ended.​ A heartfelt thank you to all the players​ who walked with us on this journey.​

tc.name: 影子戰場
tc.short_description: Shadow Arena Early Access has ended.​ A heartfelt thank you to all the players​ who walked with us on this journey.​

en.name: Batman: The Enemy Within - The Telltale Series
en.short_description: In this latest chapter from the award-winning studio behind Batman - The Telltale Series, both Bruce Wayne and Batman will be forced into precarious new roles. The Riddler has returned to terrorize Gotham City, but his gruesome puzzles merely foreshadow an even greater crisis.

tc.name: Batman: The Enemy Within - The Telltale Series
tc.short_description: 創造Batman - The Telltale Series的獲獎工作室最新作品，Bruce Wayne和Batman被迫近行危險新任務。Riddler重返Gotham作亂，而他恐怖的謎語稍稍預言了更大的危機。

en.name: Neon Beats
en.short_description: Beat your best scores in Neon Beats, a 2D platformer game with rhythm based levels!

tc.name: Neon Beats
tc.short_description: Beat your best scores in Neon Beats, a 2D platformer game with rhythm based levels!

en.name: Skyforge
en.short_description: Discover a universe of adventure in Skyforge, the sci-fi action MMO brought to you by Innova Co SARL. Explore the breathtaking world of Aelion, become an Immortal, switch between 18+ classes, and master amazing powers to defend the planet from invasion. Play for free today!

tc.name: Skyforge
tc.short_description: Discover a universe of adventure in Skyforge, the sci-fi action MMO brought to you by Innova Co SARL. Explore the breathtaking world of Aelion, become an Immortal, switch between 18+ classes, and master amazing powers to defend the planet from invasion. Play for free today!

en.name: Anno 1404 - History Edition
en.short_description: Relive the captivating gameplay of a true city-building classic with Anno® 1404 History Edition.

tc.name: Anno 1404 - History Edition
tc.short_description: 遊玩針對現代電腦進行更新的《Anno 1404》，重溫經典城市建造遊戲的迷人體驗。

en.name: Dragon Knight
en.short_description: This a rogue-like 2D ARPG with an amazing storyline. You act as Sue, along with the Dark Knight, slay dragons to get stronger in the process. You'll encounter many a man during your journey to invincible, some could be allies while other have a wish to kill. Group up with different NPC and tell the story of your own.

tc.name: Dragon Knight
tc.short_description: 這是一款含有Rogue-Like隨機元素的動作冒險類遊戲。在遊戲中你與黑騎士一同冒險，獵殺巨龍收集龍魂，在旅途的磨練當中讓自己變得更為強大。遊戲中共有6種武器：太刀，大劍，雙刀，片手劍，錘子，弓箭，每種武器都有著不同的特性，戰鬥中使用一閃進行反擊是獲勝的關鍵。

en.name: Loading Screen Simulator
en.short_description: A game about never-ending problem of loading screens. We've all experienced it while playing games, while downloading something, while installing an operating system ect. And now you can experience it once again in Loading Screen Simulator: Steam edition

tc.name: Loading Screen Simulator
tc.short_description: A game about never-ending problem of loading screens. We've all experienced it while playing games, while downloading something, while installing an operating system ect. And now you can experience it once again in Loading Screen Simulator: Steam edition

en.name: LYNE
en.short_description: Deceptively simple. Infinitely complex. LYNE is a minimalist puzzle game that will knot your brain as it calms your soul. Connect the shapes. Fill the board. Lose yourself in the interflowing paths of LYNE.

tc.name: LYNE
tc.short_description: 看似簡單，實則複雜。《LYNE》是一款充滿了簡單主義的益智遊戲，它能讓你的靈魂和大腦都平靜下來。 連接形狀，填滿棋盤。在《LYNE》交匯的通路上迷失自我。

en.name: Monster Prom 4: Monster Con
en.short_description: Can you find love at the nerdiest convention ever? "Monster Con" goes back to the multiplayer dating sim formula: go through absurd and funny situations as you find love among six sexy monsters! Who will you romance? The mimic who cosplays? The idol clown? Or the eldritch cutie? (There's also Liam)

tc.name: Monster Prom 4: Monster Con
tc.short_description: Can you find love at the nerdiest convention ever? "Monster Con" goes back to the multiplayer dating sim formula: go through absurd and funny situations as you find love among six sexy monsters! Who will you romance? The mimic who cosplays? The idol clown? Or the eldritch cutie? (There's also Liam)

en.name: Unsung Warriors - Prologue
en.short_description: Unsung Warriors is a 2D action-adventure game set in Iron Age inspired Europe. Fight your way past enemies and traps, while exploring the secrets of an ancient crypt.

tc.name: Unsung Warriors - Prologue
tc.short_description: Unsung Warriors is a 2D action-adventure game set in Iron Age inspired Europe. Fight your way past enemies and traps, while exploring the secrets of an ancient crypt.

en.name: The Bridge Curse 2: The Extrication
en.short_description: Try to escape with your life in a first-person survival horror adventure. Play through the eyes of four distinct characters as you evade and confront terrifying ghosts, unravel mind-bending puzzles, and unearth a sinister conspiracy…

tc.name: 女鬼橋二  釋魂路
tc.short_description: 《女鬼橋二 釋魂路》是《女鬼橋》系列第二作，以現代真實校園傳說為題材的第一人稱懸疑冒險恐怖遊戲。在盛大舉辦「恐怖嘉年華」活動的文華大學裡，玩家將分別操作四位角色，用不同視角親自體驗「鬼樓」的恐怖之處，伴隨恐懼、不安還有搞笑幽默。

en.name: Zombotron
en.short_description: Fight to survive on a mysterious alien planet, outwit its vicious inhabitants, and do whatever it takes to find a way off that wretched rock.

tc.name: Zombotron
tc.short_description: 奮力戰鬥，於神秘異星上倖存；智勝異星上邪惡的居民，竭盡全力離開這個可怖的星球。

en.name: Deus Ex: The Fall
en.short_description: Deus Ex: The Fall is set in 2027– a golden era for science, technology and human augmentation, but also a time of great social divide and global conspiracy. Powerful corporations have seized control from governments and command the drug supply needed by augmented humans to survive.

tc.name: Deus Ex: The Fall
tc.short_description: Deus Ex: The Fall is set in 2027– a golden era for science, technology and human augmentation, but also a time of great social divide and global conspiracy. Powerful corporations have seized control from governments and command the drug supply needed by augmented humans to survive.

en.name: Disney•Pixar WALL-E
en.short_description: Based on the 2008 computer animated film from Pixar Animation Studios, the video game version of WALL-E involves playing as the lonely robot as he navigates a trash-tainted world and begins an unlikely trek across the cosmos.

tc.name: Disney•Pixar WALL-E
tc.short_description: Based on the 2008 computer animated film from Pixar Animation Studios, the video game version of WALL-E involves playing as the lonely robot as he navigates a trash-tainted world and begins an unlikely trek across the cosmos.

en.name: The Bloodline
en.short_description: The Bloodline is a sandbox adventure RPG that lets you play your way. Reforge bonds between kingdoms, explore the wilds, craft and plan adventures and wield mighty weapons or magic as you prepare for what is to come…

tc.name: The Bloodline
tc.short_description: 一款高自由度的開放世界冒險RPG，讓你玩出自己的風格。與各個王國連結，探索浩瀚的世界，製作和使用各種裝備與魔法，好好規劃冒險，為即將到來的戰鬥做好準備……

en.name: Deponia Doomsday
en.short_description: Can you change Deponia's fate? Do you have what it takes to change Rufus' past, present and future without accidently destroying the whole planet? Fight time itself in this action-packed, platypus-tastic and insanely hilarious story.

tc.name: Deponia Doomsday
tc.short_description: Can you change Deponia's fate? Do you have what it takes to change Rufus' past, present and future without accidently destroying the whole planet? Fight time itself in this action-packed, platypus-tastic and insanely hilarious story.

en.name: SanctuaryRPG: Black Edition
en.short_description: SanctuaryRPG: Black Edition is a humorous and strategic turn-based dungeon crawling ASCII adventure. Drawing heavy inspiration from both Roguelikes and Japanese RPGs, the game offers a robust action-RPG inspired combat system.

tc.name: SanctuaryRPG: Black Edition
tc.short_description: SanctuaryRPG: Black Edition is a humorous and strategic turn-based dungeon crawling ASCII adventure. Drawing heavy inspiration from both Roguelikes and Japanese RPGs, the game offers a robust action-RPG inspired combat system.

en.name: Dream Date
en.short_description: Date, communicate, enhance feelings and record good memories with girls!

tc.name: Dream Date
tc.short_description: 快來和小姐姐們約會、增進感情、記錄美好回憶吧！

en.name: L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files
en.short_description: L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files places you directly in the shoes of Detective Cole Phelps as you solve brutal crimes, plots and conspiracies inspired by real cases from 1947 Los Angeles, one of the most corrupt and violent times in L.A. history.

tc.name: L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files
tc.short_description: L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files 讓您化身為警探科爾．菲爾普斯（Cole Phelps），著手偵辦一連串凶殘的犯罪案件、陰謀與計劃，而這些事件全都改編自 1947 年（洛城史上最貪腐暴力的年代之一）在洛杉磯所發生的真實案件。

en.name: Juno: New Origins
en.short_description: Bring to life anything you can imagine from rockets and airplanes to cars and more. Automate them with a visual programming language. Explore 3D planets and make your own. Share your creations online. Complete contracts, conquer milestones, and unlock technology in the newly added Career Mode.

tc.name: Juno: New Origins
tc.short_description: Bring to life anything you can imagine from rockets and airplanes to cars and more. Automate them with a visual programming language. Explore 3D planets and make your own. Share your creations online. Complete contracts, conquer milestones, and unlock technology in the newly added Career Mode.

en.name: NIMRODS
en.short_description: Assemble a limitless arsenal in this survive-em-up roguelite shooter. As a Gun Manufacturer's testing force, your mission is simple: test the latest gun tech and scavenge alien planets. Collect insane weapon parts to invent crazy guns that slay thousands. You may not survive, but your guns will!

tc.name: NIMRODS
tc.short_description: 集結無限火力，在這款生存型roguelite射擊遊戲中持續前進。作為槍械製造商的測試部隊，你的任務很簡單：測試最新的槍械技術並搜刮外星行星。收集瘋狂的武器零件，發明能屠殺成千上萬的瘋狂槍械。你可能無法存活，但你的槍械將永存！

en.name: Sherlock Holmes The Awakened
en.short_description: Experience a nerve-racking Lovecraftian adventure, rebuilt from the ground up with modern graphics and gameplay. Become Sherlock Holmes, and find yourself at the heart of the terrifying Cthulhu Mythos as you investigate a series of mysterious disappearances in Europe and the US.

tc.name: Sherlock Holmes The Awakened
tc.short_description: 重製版精彩回歸，更具現代風格的畫面與玩法讓你開啟一場緊張刺激的洛夫克拉夫特冒險之旅。扮演夏洛克·福爾摩斯的你在調查歐美一系列神秘失蹤案時，發現自己身處可怕的克蘇魯神話中心。

en.name: ANVIL
en.short_description: Take on the role of a Vault Breaker in search of alien artifacts called “Vaults” and fight against monsters and powerful bosses. You can strengthen your Breakers to explore far-away galaxies that no one has ever reached!

tc.name: ANVIL
tc.short_description: 您可以扮演突破者角色去尋找被稱為“金庫”的外星文物，對敵怪物和强大的頭目！也可以使用從金庫獲取的强大的遺物增强能力，與好友一同線上合作冒險，探索從未有人到達過的最遠的星系。挑戰，協同，肉鴿……這一切盡在其中。

en.name: Luma Island
en.short_description: Get ready to explore, farm, fish, mine, craft, and raise magical Lumas as you solve puzzles and embark on quests across Luma Island. Inspired by H.P. Lovecraft’s novella "At the Mountains of Madness", but largely set after the original story.

en.short_description: Forgive Me Father is a dark retro horror FPS set in a comic book style world inspired by the novels of H.P. Lovecraft. As the only one left with full senses, you begin a journey in search of answers and relief. How long can you last?

tc.short_description: 機械體，時機已到。在未知異星上，帶領由 AI 智械組成的自治工業集群。採集資源、部署模組化工廠、攀升尖端科技，讓生產系統以最優邏輯持續運轉。你不是在下達命令，而是編譯它們的行為邏輯，構建可自我執行的智慧體網路。在持續最佳化與重構中，將一顆原始星球，重鑄為覆蓋全域的超大型星球工廠。

en.short_description: It's 1986 - Meredith Weiss takes a break from her career in the big city to deliver mail in her hometown. How will she experience two weeks in beautiful Providence Oaks, with its iconic lake and quirky community? And what will she do next? It's up to you.

tc.name: Lake
tc.short_description: 1986年，梅迪司‧魏斯請了一段假，暫時告別大都會的工作並回到家鄉幫忙送信。 接下來的兩個禮拜內，她在這美麗的普羅威頓斯奧克斯內，那座地標性湖泊和詭異的社區中會有怎樣的體驗呢？而她接下來會怎麼做呢？ 將掌控在你的手裡。

tc.short_description: Explore an abandoned building, encountering puzzles and clues to discover what happened, as you try to escape in both your nightmares and the waking world. Be immersed in the hauntingly beautiful 3D atmosphere in this puzzle exploration mystery game.

en.name: Blackout Z: Slaughterhouse Edition
en.short_description: Blackout Z' is a super fast top-down view shooter where you face ZOMBIES, SAWS and the DARK. Do you have what it takes to have what it takes to survive the zombie apocalypse with only your gun and an old flashlight?

tc.name: Blackout Z: Slaughterhouse Edition
tc.short_description: Blackout Z 是一款超快速的自上而下的視角射擊遊戲，您可以在其中面對 ZOMBIES、SAWS 和 DARK。你有能力只用你的槍和舊手電筒筒在殭屍啟示錄中生存嗎？

en.name: Lakeview Cabin Collection
en.short_description: Delve into the diverse world of horror movies in this 2D action puzzler. Nothing can prepare you for the R-rated challenges you will face!

tc.name: Lakeview Cabin Collection
tc.short_description: Delve into the diverse world of horror movies in this 2D action puzzler. Nothing can prepare you for the R-rated challenges you will face!

en.name: Sky Force Anniversary
en.short_description: Legendary shoot-'em-up makes its way on the PCs! Abundant explosions, truly epic boss fights and beautifully crafted 3D environments are here to keep you entertained. Sky Force Anniversary offers single player experience and local cooperative mode for 2 players.

tc.name: Sky Force Anniversary
tc.short_description: Legendary shoot-'em-up makes its way on the PCs! Abundant explosions, truly epic boss fights and beautifully crafted 3D environments are here to keep you entertained. Sky Force Anniversary offers single player experience and local cooperative mode for 2 players.

en.name: Subway Midnight
en.short_description: Board the train! Run away from a weirdo! Solve some puzzles! Make friends with some ghosts! Try not to become a ghost yourself!

tc.name: Subway Midnight
tc.short_description: Board the train! Run away from a weirdo! Solve some puzzles! Make friends with some ghosts! Try not to become a ghost yourself!

en.name: Dogfight 1942
en.short_description: Piloting a wide range of aircraft, players engage in aerial dogfights and dangerous fighter missions across the major theaters of war during WWII.

tc.name: Dogfight 1942
tc.short_description: Piloting a wide range of aircraft, players engage in aerial dogfights and dangerous fighter missions across the major theaters of war during WWII.

en.name: 古龙风云录
en.short_description: 《古龙风云录》是一款大型武侠RPG，拥有古龙作品授权，还原古龙笔下武侠世界。玩家在武侠世界里探索百态江湖，体验超百万字剧情，奇遇各路豪侠，选择并养成你的伙伴，最终一起解开当年回雁峰谜团……
developers: 香港商河洛互動娛樂股份有限公司

tc.name: 古龍風雲錄
tc.short_description: 《古龍風雲錄》是一款大型武俠RPG，擁有古龍作品授權，還原古龍筆下武俠世界。玩家在武俠世界裏探索百態江湖，體驗超百萬字劇情，奇遇各路豪俠，選擇並養成你的夥伴，最終一起解開當年回雁峰謎團……
developers: 香港商河洛互動娛樂股份有限公司

en.name: Monkey Island™ 2 Special Edition: LeChuck’s Revenge™
en.short_description: Wannabe pirate Guybrush Threepwood, and the now zombie pirate LeChuck, return in what has long been considered one of the greatest LucasArts adventure games of all time.

tc.name: Monkey Island™ 2 Special Edition: LeChuck’s Revenge™
tc.short_description: Wannabe pirate Guybrush Threepwood, and the now zombie pirate LeChuck, return in what has long been considered one of the greatest LucasArts adventure games of all time.

en.name: SONG OF HORROR COMPLETE EDITION
en.short_description: A 3rd person, fixed-camera survival horror adventure. Fear the Presence, a mysterious entity you cannot fight: stay alert, hide, breathe slowly... Explore cursed places where unseen spirits and lost souls linger in a true horror story for the ages.

tc.name: SONG OF HORROR COMPLETE EDITION
tc.short_description: 《Song of Horror》是一款第三人称、固定视角的生存类恐怖冒险游戏。畏惧一个无法抗拒的神秘实体 -“存在”：保持警惕、隐藏、慢慢呼吸…探索和调查这些鬼怪出没的地方，收集线索和物品，帮助你解决具有挑战性的谜题，同时忍受游戏气氛中的惊心动魄。

en.name: Sword and Fairy
en.short_description: *** This game is only available in Chinese *** 《仙剑奇侠传》是由大宇资讯所制作的一款国产单机中文角色扮演计算机游戏。本作是《仙剑奇侠传》系列的第一部作品，主题是“宿命”。故事以中国古代的仙妖神魔人鬼传说为背景，以武侠及仙侠为题材，宿命为主轴。

tc.name: 仙劍奇俠傳
tc.short_description: 《仙劍奇俠傳》是由大宇資訊所製作的一款國產單機中文角色扮演電腦遊戲。本作是《仙劍奇俠傳》系列的第一部作品，主題是“宿命”。故事以中國古代的仙妖神魔人鬼傳說為背景，以武俠及仙俠為題材，宿命為主軸。

en.name: Euro Truck Simulator
en.short_description: The original Euro Truck Simulator - the game which has become the classic of the genre and is still relevant today. The first truck simulation game in a European setting, with European long haul trucks!

tc.name: Euro Truck Simulator
tc.short_description: The original Euro Truck Simulator - the game which has become the classic of the genre and is still relevant today. The first truck simulation game in a European setting, with European long haul trucks!

en.name: Urtuk: The Desolation
en.short_description: Urtuk is an open world, tactical turn-based RPG in a low-fantasy setting. Guide your band of adventurers through the ruins of an ancient world. Recruit new followers, loot the corpses of your fallen foes, and do your best to survive in this harsh and unforgiving realm.

tc.name: Urtuk: The Desolation
tc.short_description: 《烏爾圖克》是一款低幻想設定，基於回合制的開放性戰術RPG遊戲。你將帶領自己的冒險小隊穿越古老世界的廢墟。招募新的追隨者，掠奪倒下敵人的屍體，盡最大努力在這殘酷而無情的世界中生存下去。

en.name: Revenge of the Titans
en.short_description: The ultimate mash-up of Real-time Strategy and Tower Defense!

tc.name: Revenge of the Titans
tc.short_description: The ultimate mash-up of Real-time Strategy and Tower Defense!

en.name: Trackmania® Turbo
en.short_description: Trackmania offers you the ultimate arcade racing universe where everything is about reaching the perfect racing time. Test your skills in over 200 tracks, experience immediate fun by challenging your friends at home (offline splitscreen) or online.

tc.name: Trackmania® Turbo
tc.short_description: 遊戲超過 200 條賽道，讓你在家（離線分割畫面）或線上跟好友瘋狂尬車，體驗即時快感。 永無止盡的競賽：在 Trackbuilder 設計賽道，並分享給其他玩家！

en.name: Spacebase DF-9
en.short_description: In Spacebase DF-9, you'll build a home among the stars for a motley population of humans and aliens as they go about their daily lives. Mine asteroids, discover derelicts, and deal with the tribulations of galactic resettlement in Earth's distant future.

tc.name: Spacebase DF-9
tc.short_description: In Spacebase DF-9, you'll build a home among the stars for a motley population of humans and aliens as they go about their daily lives. Mine asteroids, discover derelicts, and deal with the tribulations of galactic resettlement in Earth's distant future.

en.name: HARVESTELLA
en.short_description: HARVESTELLA, an all-new life-simulation RPG from SQUARE ENIX! Lead a life of self-sufficiency with your vibrant house as a base and cooperate with allies to overcome various threats.

tc.name: HARVESTELLA
tc.short_description: SQUARE ENIX打造全新生活模擬RPG《HARVESTELLA》。「死季」是每當換季時就會來臨的災難，威脅著所有生命，而主角正好在死季期間甦醒。玩家將以五彩繽紛的住處為據點過著自給自足的生活，並與夥伴們合作戰勝威脅，步步逼近世界起源和災難的真相。

en.name: Groove Coaster
en.short_description: Riding the rhythmic rails of success from smart phone, into the arcades, now GROOVE COASTER arrives on Steam! Are you ready to ride a roller coaster of sound and light through a universe of music?

tc.name: Groove Coaster
tc.short_description: 節奏遊戲×雲霄飛車！ 備受熱捧的手機遊戲、街機遊戲「GROOVE COASTER」終於在 STEAM 上登場！ 以“簡單易玩、節奏感十足、激動人心”遊戲概念增強玩家體驗！ 音樂和燈光效果，如同玩雲霄飛車一般，在音樂的世界裡奔跑吧！

en.name: KarmaZoo
en.short_description: Share the love and die trying! KarmaZoo is a joyful, altruistic, cooperative platformer where up to 10 random players help each other with the unique abilities of 50 different characters - all for the sake of good Karma.

tc.name: 卡瑪動物園
tc.short_description: 靠團隊合作獲勝吧！《KarmaZoo》是一款歡樂的合作平台遊戲，讓最多10位玩家隨機配對組隊，並搭配組合50位不同角色的能力完成一場循環，收集因果愛心！

en.name: Bloons Monkey City
en.short_description: Create, upgrade, and customize your very own Bloons Monkey City in this groundbreaking blend of city building and tower defense awesomeness!

tc.name: Bloons Monkey City
tc.short_description: Create, upgrade, and customize your very own Bloons Monkey City in this groundbreaking blend of city building and tower defense awesomeness!

en.name: Wings of Vi
en.short_description: Wings of Vi is a challenging 2D platformer in which the player controls the angel Vi, tasked with defeating the Demon Lord Jeh’oul after he is freed from captivity. While inspired by masochistic retro platformers, Wings of Vi aims to cut out arbitrary difficulty in favor of skill based gameplay.

tc.name: Wings of Vi
tc.short_description: Wings of Vi is a challenging 2D platformer in which the player controls the angel Vi, tasked with defeating the Demon Lord Jeh’oul after he is freed from captivity. While inspired by masochistic retro platformers, Wings of Vi aims to cut out arbitrary difficulty in favor of skill based gameplay.

en.name: Only Climb: Better Together
en.short_description: Tired of sitting on the ground? Take a sky-high journey with your friends in Only Climb: Better Together! Touch the clouds with your own hands and find out what's behind them, but remember, there are no easy paths…

tc.name: The friends of Ringo Ishikawa

en.name: When the Darkness comes
en.short_description: When the Darkness comes is a walking simulator whose glitchy and dark tale tries to illustrate the hardships of depression and anxiety through a variety of imaginary digital landscapes.

tc.name: When the Darkness comes
tc.short_description: When the Darkness comes is a walking simulator whose glitchy and dark tale tries to illustrate the hardships of depression and anxiety through a variety of imaginary digital landscapes.

en.name: Hotshot Racing
en.short_description: Hotshot Racing is a blisteringly fast arcade-style racing game fusing drift handling, razor-sharp retro visuals and an incredible sense of speed to create an exhilarating driving experience.

tc.name: Hotshot Racing
tc.short_description: Hotshot Racing is a blisteringly fast arcade-style racing game fusing drift handling, razor-sharp retro visuals and an incredible sense of speed to create an exhilarating driving experience.

en.name: Sayonara Wild Hearts
en.short_description: Sayonara Wild Hearts is a dreamy arcade game about riding motorcycles, skateboarding, dance battling, shooting lasers, wielding swords, and breaking hearts at 200 mph.

tc.name: Sayonara Wild Hearts
tc.short_description: 《Sayonara Wild Hearts》是一款具有夢幻色彩的街機遊戲。在遊戲中，你將以每小時 200 英哩的速度急速前行，體驗包括騎摩托車、踩滑板、斗舞、發射雷射光、揮舞利劍以及擊破心臟等精彩刺激的元素。

en.name: MXGP PRO
en.short_description: Adjust your bike's configuration like a mechanic and win a race with the new Pro Physics. Practice in the Compound, a vast area where you can freely explore or compete against the AI. All the official tracks and riders from the 2017 season await you!

tc.name: MXGP PRO
tc.short_description: Motocross 錦標賽的官方遊戲回來了！ 下載 MXGP PRO，即可體驗職業級的 MXGP。 像真正的技師一樣調校您的摩托車，並在全新的 PRO 物理引擎環境下競速。 寬廣的 Compound 場地可供您練習，既可自由探索，也可與電腦競賽。 2017 年賽季的所有官方賽道與車手都在這裡等著您！

en.name: Monster Boy and the Cursed Kingdom
en.short_description: A legendary series returns with a grand new adventure! Enjoy a colorful action-adventure game made alongside Ryuichi Nishizawa, creator of the original Wonder Boy in Monster World series.

tc.name: Monster Boy and the Cursed Kingdom
tc.short_description: A legendary series returns with a grand new adventure! Enjoy a colorful action-adventure game made alongside Ryuichi Nishizawa, creator of the original Wonder Boy in Monster World series.

en.name: Gunsmith Simulator: Prologue

tc.name: 槍匠模擬器：序章
tc.short_description: 《槍匠模擬器：序章》帶你進入槍械製造的世界，成為製造、修理和改裝武器的地道專家。開啟加工車間，充分發揮創造力，熟練槍械製造！

en.name: HAAK
en.short_description: HAAK is a Metroidvania-Platformer. As the mysterious wanderer Haak, you embarked on an epic expedition across the vast cyber-wasteland to find your lost brother. Explore deserted cities and metro, refine your weapons and hack skills, and uncover the secrets behind metal and dust.

tc.name: HAAK
tc.short_description: 《HAAK》是一款類銀橫版動作冒險遊戲，你將扮演神秘的浪人——哈克，運用光刃和鉤爪靈活走位、破解機關，探索失落的城市和地鐵，蒐集裝備並不斷強化技能，為了尋找失散的兄弟踏上一場橫越廣闊廢土的史詩旅程。

en.name: Mighty No. 9
en.short_description: Mighty No. 9 is a 2D Side-scrolling Action game that takes the best elements from 8 and 16-bit classics that you know and love and transforms them with modern tech, fresh mechanics, and fan input into something fresh and amazing!

tc.name: Mighty No. 9
tc.short_description: Mighty No. 9 由稻船敬二及擁有多年經驗的遊戲開發團隊擔綱製作，定能大大進化橫向轉軸動作這一遊戲類型！

en.name: NINJA GAIDEN 3: Razor's Edge [NINJA GAIDEN: Master Collection]

tc.name: NINJA GAIDEN 3: Razor's Edge [NINJA GAIDEN: Master Collection]
