en.name: Star Trek™: Bridge Crew
en.short_description: Star Trek™: Bridge Crew, playable in both VR and non-VR, will immerse you in the Star Trek universe. In co-op, form a crew of four players to serve in the roles of Captain, Helm, Tactical or Engineer. Make strategic decisions and coordinate actions with your crew.

tc.name: Star Trek™: Bridge Crew
tc.short_description: 《Star Trek™: Bridge Crew》專為 VR 系統開發，帶領玩家沈浸在《星際爭霸》的世界裡。搭上 U.S.S. Aegis 星艦，與好友一起探索太空裡名為「The Trench」的廣大未知區域。遊戲的合作模式最多能讓 4 位玩家扮演艦長、舵手、戰術官和輪機長。與夥伴一同擬定戰術策略，互相協調，同心協力完成任務。

en.name: Grim Legends 2: Song of the Dark Swan
en.short_description: Save the feuding kingdoms!

tc.name: Grim Legends 2: Song of the Dark Swan

en.name: Among the Sleep - Enhanced Edition
en.short_description: Among the Sleep: Enhanced Edition is a new and improved version of the award winning first person horror adventure. In the game you play as a small child trapped in a weird nightmare where you go looking for your mom.

tc.name: Among the Sleep - Enhanced Edition
tc.short_description: Among the Sleep: Enhanced Edition is a new and improved version of the award winning first person horror adventure. In the game you play as a small child trapped in a weird nightmare where you go looking for your mom.

en.short_description: From multi-award winning Revolution Software comes the latest explosive episode in this classic series. Playing as intrepid American George Stobbart and sassy French journalist Nico Collard, you find yourself on the trail of a stolen painting – and a murderous conspiracy...

en.short_description: TREE tells a story of a relationship between a boy and his tree. What starts off as a simple connection, over time it grows into something deeper.

tc.name: TREE

en.short_description: The world of Touhou comes alive in this beautiful action RPG (featuring “bullet hell” elements, of course!). Infamous vampire Remilia Scarlet and her dutiful maid, Sakuya, set off to chase rumors of a massive monster, all while sending baddies flying with fluid action and signature skills!

tc.name: 東方紅輝心
tc.short_description: 吸血鬼大小姐蕾米莉亞與她的從者咲夜追尋著巨大怪物的蹤跡，在幻想鄉中展開了一場大冒險。這是一部使用輕快動作和豐富技能，可以打爆敵人的爽快3D彈幕動作RPG。

en.name: I Am Legion: Stand Survivors
en.short_description: Summon your stands and brawl it out! Dive into the thrill of mowing down enemies, synthesizing and upgrading, mining, forging gear, unlocking new characters and equipment. Discover unique stands combos and craft your own battle style to break through the chaos!

tc.name: 我即軍團：替身倖存者
tc.short_description: 召喚替身打群架！在享受割草爽快感的同時，合成，昇星，挖礦，鑄造裝備，解鎖新角色，解鎖新配方，解鎖新裝備，發掘全新替身組合，在近乎無盡的可能性中打造屬於自己的戰鬥風格，最終殺出重圍！

en.name: Tukoni: Prologue
en.short_description: Tukoni: Prologue is a point-and-click puzzle adventure, based on a series of award-winning books by the Ukrainian artist Oksana Bula. Play as Tukoni, the forest spirits, as you meet unique characters, solve captivating puzzles, craft new items, and explore a magical world filled with kindness.

tc.name: Tukoni: Prologue
tc.short_description: 圖科尼是一款基於烏克蘭藝術家奧克莎娜·布拉的書籍而製作的點擊解謎冒險遊戲。在遊戲中扮演圖可尼，森林精靈，與獨特的角色相遇，解決有趣的謎題，探索一個充滿善意的神奇世界。

en.name: MotoGP™13
en.short_description: 2013 Riders, teams and tracks; both simulation and accessible bike handling with scalable aids; photorealistic graphics with TV style interface; ingame voice over by official MotoGP™ commentators; first person elements such as the helmet view and 3D pits to put you in the rider’s shoes.

en.short_description: "Yokai's secret" is a decrypt game with ecchi girls. The "Country of Yamato" once had cherry blossoms, and Yokai lived in peace with human beings. One day, the Yokai suddenly began to riot. In order to heal the world, you, as the "Master Hentai", embarked on the journey.

tc.name: 妖語
tc.short_description: 《妖語》是一款解謎向的和風美少女遊戲。“和之國”曾櫻花滿開，妖怪們化為可愛的小姐姐陪伴人類生活。但只有極少數人類可以得此殊榮。他們被叫做“紳士”。然而有一天，妖怪們突然開始了暴動，世界囙此失去了顏色。為了探尋妖怪們騷亂的真相，恢復世界的色彩，作為“第一紳士”的你踏上了征程。

en.short_description: The Vigilant Villa is a plots-oriented, texts-based AVG adventure game inheriting the classic “A locked room mystery" story mode. Where the game heads towards is completely decided by player’s own deductions and choices.

tc.name: 迷雾之夏-The Vigilant Villa

Use a unique blend of pinball mechanics, platforming and open world exploration to unlock the secrets of Mokumana Island, help the locals, awaken ancient deities and much more in this amazing new tropical adventure!

en.short_description: Rogue Warrior is a character-driven, first-person-shooter, featuring Richard 'Demo Dick' Marcinko's explosive personality in an action-packed single player campaign, and intense multiplayer combat. Playing as Richard 'Demo Dick' Marcinko, you go behind the iron curtain to disrupt a suspected North Korean ballistic missile program.

en.name: Copa Petrobras de Marcas
en.short_description: COPA PETROBRAS DE MARCAS is a 100% free official game simulating the thrill of competing wheel-to-wheel with models from various automakers in some of the main Brazilian race tracks.

tc.name: Copa Petrobras de Marcas
tc.short_description: COPA PETROBRAS DE MARCAS is a 100% free official game simulating the thrill of competing wheel-to-wheel with models from various automakers in some of the main Brazilian race tracks.

en.name: KILL KNIGHT
en.short_description: KILL KNIGHT is an ultra-responsive arcade-inspired isometric action shooter. Condemned to eternal sufferance, deep within the voids of an eldritch arena, you must wield an arsenal of devastating weaponry to obliterate swarms of otherworldly horrors - and MASTER THE DEMON WITHIN.

tc.name: 殺戮騎士
tc.short_description: 《殺戮騎士》是一款超靈敏反應的街機風格2.5D動作射擊遊戲。騎士墮入永恆折磨的深淵，必須在競技場對抗源源不絕的怪誕敵人。運用各種破壞力十足的武器，消滅來自異世的恐怖威脅，並戰勝你內心的惡魔。

en.name: Hell is Others
en.short_description: Hell is Others is an extraction top-down shooter combining roguelike elements. Outside the safety of your apartment lies the noir hellscape that is Century City. A city of endless night that straddles the line between reality and insanity. Explore, hunt, and loot in a place where blood is currency.

tc.name: Hell is Others
tc.short_description: 《Hell is Others》是一款生存恐怖類型的 PVPVE 俯瞰視角射擊遊戲。這裡是世紀城，黑暗不見天日，環境如地獄般惡劣，唯有你的公寓安全無虞。這座城市的黑夜永無止境，現實與瘋狂只在一線之間。快來這座鮮血便是金錢的城市中探索、獵殺及搜刮... 但要留心，每道陰影都藏匿著另一段噩夢。歡迎來到世紀城。

en.name: Minami Lane
en.short_description: Welcome to Minami Lane! Build your own street in this tiny cozy, casual management sim! Unlock and customize buildings, manage your shops, and maximize the happiness of your villagers to complete quests and fill your street with love!

tc.name: 南之町
tc.short_description: 歡迎來到《南之町》！快來體驗這款輕鬆紓壓的經營模擬小品，打造屬於你的獨特街道！解鎖與自訂建築，經營管理商店，為居民帶來最大的幸福。你不僅要完成趣味任務，更要讓你的街道處處充滿愛！

en.name: Home Sweet Home : Survive
en.short_description: Home Sweet Home is back with its soul-stirring sequel that will haunt you to the ground ! Immerse yourself in a world of Thai myths, let's fight together to get out of this horrifying world. The 4vs1 game that will give you the experience of hunting and being hunted in one game.

tc.name: Home Sweet Home : Survive
tc.short_description: Home Sweet Home is back with its soul-stirring sequel that will haunt you to the ground ! Immerse yourself in a world of Thai myths, let's fight together to get out of this horrifying world. The 4vs1 game that will give you the experience of hunting and being hunted in one game.

en.name: Zeepkist
en.short_description: Welcome to Zeepkist! You race soapboxes down hills!

tc.name: Zeepkist
tc.short_description: Welcome to Zeepkist! You race soapboxes down hills!

en.name: Ion Fury
en.short_description: 3D Realms, creators of Duke Nukem 3D, Prey, and Max Payne, team up with Voidpoint to bring back the legendary Build Engine, famous for classic shooters like Duke Nukem 3D, Shadow Warrior, and Blood. Fast-paced FPS combat across huge, secret-packed levels. Ion Fury is the real deal!

tc.name: Ion Fury
tc.short_description: 3D Realms, creators of Duke Nukem 3D, Prey, and Max Payne, team up with Voidpoint to bring back the legendary Build Engine, famous for classic shooters like Duke Nukem 3D, Shadow Warrior, and Blood. Fast-paced FPS combat across huge, secret-packed levels. Ion Fury is the real deal!

en.name: Outpath
en.short_description: An experimental clicker base building game. Craft, gather & manage resources, build your base and buy more islands to exploit and expand!

tc.name: 浮島新世界
tc.short_description: 《浮島新世界》是一款充滿探索和創意的基地建造遊戲。在廣袤的島嶼世界中收集和加工資源，逐步建設並擴展你的基地，探索更多的神秘島嶼，實現你的浮島帝國夢想！

en.name: Dystopia
en.short_description: Dystopia is a cyberpunk game with tense combat situations in a high-tech world spanned by computer networks. Playing as either Punk mercenaries, or Corporate security forces, the player will fight through the physical world to gain access, via jack-in terminals, to cyberspace.

tc.name: Dystopia
tc.short_description: Dystopia is a cyberpunk game with tense combat situations in a high-tech world spanned by computer networks. Playing as either Punk mercenaries, or Corporate security forces, the player will fight through the physical world to gain access, via jack-in terminals, to cyberspace.

en.name: Devil Slayer - Raksasi
en.short_description: Devil Slayer - Raksasi is a top-down action game with procedurally generated dungeons, profound roguelike elements, and intuitive soul-like fighting. It's a fair and challenging game, dodging, timing, striking, you need to master them all to fight your way out of this cursed world.

tc.name: 斬妖Raksasi
tc.short_description: 《斬妖Raksasi》是一款帶有 Roguelike 元素的頂視角隨機生成地牢動作遊戲。戰鬥採用種類豐富的近戰武器，並結合隨機多變的各種道具和秘寶。戰鬥風格比較偏向黑魂類的樸實風格，重視走位、攻擊時機和節奏把握。

en.name: F1 2016
en.short_description: Create your own legend in F1™ 2016. Get ready to go deeper into the world of the most prestigious motorsport than ever before. Work with your agent, engineer and team to develop your car in the deepest ever career experience, spanning up to ten seasons.

tc.name: F1 2016
tc.short_description: 於 F1™ 2016 中打造專屬自己的傳奇。準備好沉溺到最負盛名的賽車世界之中。在多達十個賽季的時間裡，協同經紀人、工程師和隊友們，一起打造有史以來最酷的職業賽車生涯。

en.name: Nex Machina
en.short_description: Nex Machina is an intense arcade style twin-stick shooter from Housemarque. Taking hints from both Robotron and Smash TV, Nex Machina focuses on pure action, voxel destruction and competition in the distant, cablepunk themed future.

tc.name: Nex Machina
tc.short_description: 《Nex Machina》由Housemarque製作，這款街機風格的雙搖桿射擊遊戲緊湊激烈，遊戲方式承襲自《Robotron》和《Smash TV》，將背景設定在遙遠的機械科幻（cablepunk）未來，並主打全然動作打鬥、立體像素破壞和玩家競爭元素。

en.name: Crimson Snow (2023)
en.short_description: Christmas is a joyful time, but this time something dark is hiding behind the holiday decorations. Your actions will determine whether you and your girlfriend survive Christmas night.

tc.name: Crimson Snow (2023)
tc.short_description: Christmas is a joyful time, but this time something dark is hiding behind the holiday decorations. Your actions will determine whether you and your girlfriend survive Christmas night.

en.name: Aimtastic
en.short_description: Training game for FPS games. Helps you become a better aimer. Includes a lot of different practice scenarios, which is great for warmup or taking your aim to the next level.

tc.name: Aimtastic
tc.short_description: Training game for FPS games. Helps you become a better aimer. Includes a lot of different practice scenarios, which is great for warmup or taking your aim to the next level.

en.name: Cyber Shadow
en.short_description: The world has been taken over by synthetic lifeforms. A desperate plea for help sets Shadow, the sole survivor of his clan, on one last mission to uncover what started the path to perpetual ruin.

tc.name: Cyber Shadow
tc.short_description: 這世界已被機器人物所佔領。闇影身為其族人唯一的生存者，受絕望委託踏上最後的征程，去揭開世界走向萬劫不復的原因。

en.name: Damned
en.short_description: Damned is a randomized online horror game for up to 5 players (4 survivors and 1 monster). You’ll be able to play as one of four people trapped in different haunted places (hotels, hospitals, etc).

en.name: Overdungeon
en.short_description: A completely new style real-time card battle "Overdungeon" Overdungeon combines rogue-like, tower defense and card games. More than 100 cards are Attack, Animal, Building, Spell, Trap, etc..Build your creative and crazy deck!

en.short_description: Terraform a lifeless rock into a lush and habitable world. Build trucks, trains, and sprawling factories on an enormous hexagonal planet. Grow its population to millions. Enjoy a dynamic simulation of atmosphere, temperature, water, and forests.

en.name: Fight Angel Special Edition
en.short_description: Fight Angel is the girl fighting game with great customization functions with physical effects that make realistic boobs movements and clothing destruction systems. Let's fight the challenger with your partner! This is a special edition of Fight Angel.

tc.name: 格鬥天使SE
tc.short_description: 可完全自定義角色的美少女格鬥遊戲，完全自定義角色完善的爆衣系統，全新動力學胸部模擬系統。這是Fight Angel的特別版。

tc.name: 《終極動員令 4：泰伯倫暮光》
tc.short_description: 升級以迎接泰伯利亞傳奇的史詩結局。

en.short_description: Extreme racing with a jet equipped vehicle

en.name: Immortals of Aveum™
en.short_description: Immortals of Aveum is a single-player first person magic shooter that tells the story of Jak as he joins an elite order of battlemages to save a world on the edge of abyss.

tc.name: 亙古魔戰
tc.short_description: 《亙古魔戰》是一款單人第一人稱魔法射擊遊戲，講述賈克加入了戰鬥法師菁英組織，以從深淵邊緣拯救世界的故事。

en.name: Heat Signature
en.short_description: Heat Signature is a game from the developers of Gunpoint where you break into spaceships, make terrible mistakes, and think of clever ways out of them. You take a mission, fly to the target ship, sneak inside, and make clever use of your gadgets to distract, ambush and take out the crew.

en.name: F1 2012™
en.short_description: The next game in the BAFTA-winning series featuring all the official drivers, teams and circuits from the 2012 FIA FORMULA ONE WORLD CHAMPIONSHIP™.

en.name: Yomawari: Night Alone
en.short_description: A quiet evening stroll takes a turn for the worse as a tragic accident befalls a little girl and her dog. When her sister goes missing later in the night, the little girl decides to venture out into the eerie darkness to search for her loved ones as evil spirits haunt the alleyways and streets of her once-peaceful town.

en.short_description: SuperPower 2 is the only global geopolitical simulation game which allows players to control entire countries. Players control countries in 3 major areas: political, economic and military, but this time, in a beautiful real-time 3D environment.

en.name: Gladiator Guild Manager: Prologue
en.short_description: Gladiator Guild Manager: Prologue is a battle sim about managing your own Gladiator Guild in an epic fantasy world. Build and run your own guild, hire and train gladiators, develop unique tactics, manage resources, compete for the rank in the arena, and much more.

en.short_description: You ARE Octogeddon, a massive mutant octopus with one mission: DESTROY the world! Grow more tentacles and evolve each of them into deadlier and deadlier weapons until you become the ultimate eight-legged killing machine!

en.short_description: NOTE: All multiplayer servers for WWE 2K19 will be shutdown as of 6/30/2022. After that time, all game functions requiring online servers will no longer function.

en.name: Hollywood Animal
en.short_description: Make movies, even if someone has to die. Take the helm of a major Hollywood studio at the dawn of sound cinema, and guide it through decades of creative achievements and glamor, debauchery and dark deeds, tough choices and unpleasant compromises.

tc.name: Hollywood Animal
tc.short_description: 帶著自己的夢想躋身於成功之巔，還是踐踏別人的美夢於腳底？有聲電影甫於好萊塢興起的時代，您將掌管一家大型工作室，並帶領團隊翱翔於數十載的風浪中。期間將經歷華麗燦爛、盡情放蕩的成就，同時也難免處理下流勾當、左右為難和沉默忍讓的痛苦。在這樣的弱肉強食的業界，唯一關鍵的便是生存法則。

en.name: HOME
en.short_description: HOME is a feel-good walking simulator experience in which you create your own poem and music. Embark on a poetic and musical heartwarming journey about what home means to you.

tc.name: HOME
tc.short_description: HOME is a feel-good walking simulator experience in which you create your own poem and music. Embark on a poetic and musical heartwarming journey about what home means to you.

en.name: Three Kingdoms The Last Warlord
en.short_description: The Last Warlord is a Turn-based strategy game. The game is based on the famous Chinese historical novel. The Three Kingdoms (A.D. 190 – 280) was the tripartite division of China between the states of Wei, Shu, and Wu.

tc.name: 三國志漢末霸業
tc.short_description: 《三國志:漢末霸業》是壹款君主扮演路線的單機回合制策略遊戲。而我們所營造的三國世界，深度刻畫了三國各城市之間地域的差異以及每個武將自身能力和特性的異同，而在戰鬥方面突出結合天時地利人和的調配來進行策略作戰的特色。力求呈現給玩家壹個具有中國人的新思維和新角度的不壹樣的三國遊戲體驗！

en.name: Fairy Fencer F
en.short_description: Long ago, the Vile God and the Goddess waged war with each other. Equally matched, they were sealed away in another world… Now a lazy young man named Fang somehow finds himself a key part of this war he’d really rather not deal with, but fate beckons in this uncommon RPG!

tc.name: Lifeless Planet Premier Edition
tc.short_description: 一名太空人在遙遠星球上尋找生物跡象時，發現了一座廢棄的俄國小鎮。他懷疑這項任務就是個騙局，直到一名年輕的神祕女子助他脫離了一場奇異的危險現象...

en.name: Visions of Mana

en.name: Plebby Quest: The Crusades
en.short_description: Survive ambitious rulers dreaming of an empire, outsmart treacherous neighbors longing to burn your spoils, and navigate the religion’s predictably unreasonable demands; you need ask only one question as you build your legacy – “Will you burn them, or be burnt?”

en.name: TT Isle of Man: Ride on the Edge
en.short_description: For bikers, there are two types of speed races: the Isle of Man TT and the rest. No race is more difficult. Take up the challenge of the legendary Snaefell Mountain course: all 37.73 miles faithfully reproduced with the champions and their bikes.

tc.short_description: 對機車騎士來說，有兩種類型的競速比賽：曼島旅行者大獎賽以及其他。沒有更困難的比賽了。在傳奇的斯奈菲爾山丘賽道接受挑戰：全長 60.7 公里的忠實重製，冠軍以及他們的機車將徜徉其中。

en.name: Void Bastards
en.short_description: Inspired by BioShock and System Shock 2, Void Bastards is a revolutionary new strategy-shooter that will test your wits as well as exercise your aim. Can you lead the misfit prisoners of the Void Ark through the derelict spaceships and myriad dangers of the Sargasso Nebula?

tc.name: Void Bastards
tc.short_description: Inspired by BioShock and System Shock 2, Void Bastards is a revolutionary new strategy-shooter that will test your wits as well as exercise your aim. Can you lead the misfit prisoners of the Void Ark through the derelict spaceships and myriad dangers of the Sargasso Nebula?

en.name: Out There Somewhere
en.short_description: You play an explorer stranded on a dangerous alien planet. Low on fuel, your only hope for escape is to find the planet’s core in this incredibly clever action-puzzle-platformer.

tc.name: Out There Somewhere
tc.short_description: 遊戲設計啟發自 Cave Story、Super Metroid 和 Portal 等知名遊戲。在遊戲中，您將扮演一名因燃料用盡而受困在危險星球上的太空人，而唯一的脫困辦法，就是在這個動作型益智遊戲中，破解重重關卡，找到星球的核心。

en.name: 3D Aim Trainer
en.short_description: The #1 free aim trainer - now on Steam and SteelSeries GG. Join 13+ millions of FPS/TPS players improving flicks, tracking & reaction speed with pro drills, analytics & leaderboards. Dominate in Valorant, CS2, Apex & more. Play free and start hitting every shot. #AimToConquer

en.short_description: Only brought to life by scarce sparks of Color, the bleak, grey Void is a peculiar place. The player gets to explore it, get to know the Sisters, Brothers, and other weird creatures inhabiting it, and learn the ways of Color, harvesting it and drawing sigils that change the world around them.

en.name: 魔女的夜宴
en.short_description: 《魔女的夜宴》是日本超人气美少女游戏品牌YUZUSOFT（柚子社）的经典名作。女主角绫地宁宁由当红声优桐谷华配音，是该社历代作品中最具代表性的女主角之一。国际中文版拥有超越原版的1920X1080的高清画质。本作也曾在美少女游戏大赏和萌系游戏大赏中斩获众多奖项。

tc.name: 魔女的夜宴

en.short_description: The lightweight champion of wrestling comes full circle with higher resolution visuals and a smoother frame rate - whilst still retaining the retro style that puts the fun first! Packed with fresh new features and innovative gameplay enhancements, Madden NFL 21 delivers new levels of ingenuity and control developed to inspire creativity on and off the field.

tc.name: 《Madden NFL 21》
tc.short_description: 在《Madden NFL 21》中崛起成名。

en.short_description: Swords & Souls: Neverseen is a unique RPG where leveling up takes skill! Create, train and upgrade your character as you please, discover The Neverseen and its eccentric locals, and battle across the lands to foil an evil witch's plans!

tc.name: Swords & Souls: Neverseen
tc.short_description: 《Swords & Souls:Neverseen》是一款獨特的RPG遊戲，在這款遊戲中，昇級需要特別的技能！隨心創造、訓練和昇級自己的角色，探索Neverseen，瞭解古怪的當地居民，在這片大地上奮戰，破壞邪惡女巫的計劃！

en.name: Dungeon 100
en.short_description: The dragon-slayer becomes the dragon. Create unique builds without having to grind for equipment. After defeating a dungeon boss, you will take its place. Then, defeat your past selves to descend further into the dungeon.

en.name: Insaniquarium Deluxe
en.short_description: The craziest aquarium game ever! Tend to your fish, keep them happy and they'll reward you with coins and jewels. Buy tank upgrades or egg parts which hatch different in-tank pets. These pets can help you feed your fish, collect coins, or even protect against the aliens that will invade your tank.

en.short_description: Eador is a universe made of countless shards of land drifting in the Great Nothing. Each of the shards is a little world unto itself, with geography and denizens of its own. The power over the shards is bitterly contested by Masters, the immortal beings mortals believe to be gods.

tc.name: BlazBlue Centralfiction

en.short_description: Garrett, the Master Thief, steps out of the shadows into the City. In this treacherous place, where the Baron’s Watch spreads a rising tide of fear and oppression, his skills are the only things he can trust. Even the most cautious citizens and their best-guarded possessions are not safe from his reach.

en.name: Hatred

en.short_description: Battle hordes of yokai in this masocore Action RPG. Create your protagonist and embark on an adventure through a myriad of locales across Japan during the Sengoku period. Utilize the new Yokai Shift ability to defeat even the most ferocious yokai and be prepared to brave through Dark Realms created by your enemies.

tc.name: 仁王２ Complete Edition
tc.short_description: 本作為以賊人囂張跋扈、妖怪四處蠢動的荒廢戰國時代為舞台，展開死鬥的黑暗戰國動作RPG。 加入了全新的戰鬥方式「妖怪化」、外型奇異的邪惡妖怪們、 以及由妖怪產生之「常闇」世界等眾多新增要素，將帶來更過癮的遊戲體驗與更暢快的成就感。 盡情享受完全進化的「戰國誅死遊戲」吧。

en.name: Yakuza Kiwami 2 (Legacy)
en.short_description: Kazuma Kiryu, the Dragon of Dojima, must face the ambitious Ryuji Goda, the Dragon of Kansai, in an all-out war between two rival yakuza clans. An extreme recreation of one of Yakuza’s most beloved entries, now in stunning 4K and unlocked framerates. There can be only one dragon.

tc.name: 人中之龍 極２ [Legacy]
tc.short_description: 藉由人龍引擎重新復甦的系列第二部作品《人中之龍２》的完全重製作品《人中之龍 極２》登場！過去人稱「堂島之龍」的傳說中的男人──桐生一馬，與人稱「關西之龍」的最強黑道──鄉田龍司。決定誰才是真正的龍的死戰，現正開始。

en.name: Hero's Adventure: Road to Passion
en.short_description: Hero's Adventure:Road to Passion is a wuxia open-world RPG. You will commence your journey as an underdog in the tumultuous Martial World and will be met with a wide array of choices as you navigate your own heroic saga.
developers: 半瓶醋工作室（Half Amateur Studio）

tc.short_description: 《大俠立志傳：碧血丹心》是一款開放世界武俠RPG遊戲，更是一款像素版江湖生存模擬器，站在一個初出茅廬的市井小人物視角，還原在江湖底層摸爬滾打最終脫穎而出的逆襲經歷。
developers: 半瓶醋工作室（Half Amateur Studio）

en.name: Project Winter

en.name: SCP: 5K
en.short_description: SCP: 5K is a co-op or singleplayer tactical horror FPS project that puts players in the midst of a conspiracy where the SCP Foundation has turned on humanity. Enjoy Early Access as we continue to work towards a completed full release of the project!

en.name: FINAL FANTASY IX
en.short_description: Selling over five million copies since its release in 2000, FINAL FANTASY IX proudly returns on Steam! Now you can relive the adventures of Zidane and his crew on PC !

Find and identify new plants, pet your cat, speak to a coven, or join a cult. Use your collection of powerful plants to influence the story and unravel Undermere’s dark mysteries.

With extreme-range shots exceeding 1000m, gear up for the most challenging entry to the series yet.

en.name: Company of Heroes
en.short_description: Delivering a visceral WWII gaming experience, Company of Heroes redefines RTS by bringing the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, war-ravaged environments, and dynamic battlefields to life. Please visit the "Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition" page for additional user reviews.

en.name: Senren＊Banka
en.short_description: Senren＊Banka is a Japanese-style visual novel produced by Yuzusoft, a Japanese developer of romance VNs. This game commemorated Yuzusoft's 10th anniversary. It won numerous awards on the year of its release in Japan for its art, music, and characters.

tc.name: 千戀＊萬花

en.name: BPM: BULLETS PER MINUTE

en.short_description: From the dust of a gold mine to the dirt of a saloon, Call of Juarez® Gunslinger is a real homage to the Wild West tales. Live the epic and violent journey of a ruthless bounty hunter on the trail of the West’s most notorious outlaws.

tc.name: Call of Juarez: Gunslinger
tc.short_description: 從金礦的塵土到酒館的泥土，《Call of Juarez® Gunslinger》是對狂野西部軼事致敬的作品。玩家將扮演一名冷酷無情的賞金獵人，踏上充滿暴力元素的史詩級旅程，追捕西部最惡名昭彰的法外之徒。

en.name: Beholder
en.short_description: You’re a state-installed landlord in a totalitarian country. Place listening devices, steal and sneak into your tenants’ apartments. Use what you uncovered to report anyone capable of plotting against the state. You MUST! But WILL you?

tc.name: Beholder
tc.short_description: 你是一名在極權社會中被政府安插的樓管。你必須監視房客，偷窺、偷聽並為房客建立檔案！你報告任何會違法或密謀顛覆政府的人。你必須！但你會嗎？

en.name: Will To Live Online
en.short_description: Will To Live is a MMORPG-shooter whose action takes place in a severe post-apocalyptic world. Explore the world, engage in fights with mutants and other survivors, join the clans in the struggle for existence and prove your right to Live.

tc.name: Will To Live Online
tc.short_description: Will To Live is a MMORPG-shooter whose action takes place in a severe post-apocalyptic world. Explore the world, engage in fights with mutants and other survivors, join the clans in the struggle for existence and prove your right to Live.

en.name: Krunker
en.short_description: An easy to get into fully moddable First Person Shooter with advanced movement mechanics. Fully Customizable with Mods, Custom Maps and Thousands of Items to Unlock.

tc.name: Krunker
tc.short_description: An easy to get into fully moddable First Person Shooter with advanced movement mechanics. Fully Customizable with Mods, Custom Maps and Thousands of Items to Unlock.

en.name: Counter-Strike: Condition Zero
en.short_description: With its extensive Tour of Duty campaign, a near-limitless number of skirmish modes, updates and new content for Counter-Strike's award-winning multiplayer game play, plus over 12 bonus single player missions, Counter-Strike: Condition Zero is a tremendous offering of single and multiplayer content.

tc.name: Counter-Strike: Condition Zero
tc.short_description: 《絕對武力：一觸即發》不但有精心製作的 Tour of Duty (使命召喚) 戰役、幾近無限變化的對抗模式、絕對武力多人連線遊戲的更新和新增內容，更有超過 12 個額外單機任務。不管是單人還是多人遊戲，都絕對不容錯過。

en.name: Escape Room - Der kranke Kollege
en.short_description: You only wanted to make a visit to your sick colleague, but what you encounter is beyond your imagination. Discover the secrets of your colleague and find a way to escape the trap.

tc.name: Escape Room - Der kranke Kollege
tc.short_description: You only wanted to make a visit to your sick colleague, but what you encounter is beyond your imagination. Discover the secrets of your colleague and find a way to escape the trap.

en.name: Punch Club
en.short_description: Train hard, fight crocodiles and find love. Earn your place in the Punch Club ranks, and discover who brutally murdered your father, in this choose your own adventure boxing management tycoon.

tc.name: Punch Club
tc.short_description: Train hard, fight crocodiles and find love. Earn your place in the Punch Club ranks, and discover who brutally murdered your father, in this choose your own adventure boxing management tycoon.

en.name: EVE Online
en.short_description: Over 20 years of legendary space battles! Explore a massive living universe of danger and opportunity in a challenging and highly rewarding space adventure. Fight, trade, build, and connect with a universe driven and shaped directly by players.

tc.name: EVE Online
tc.short_description: Over 20 years of legendary space battles! Explore a massive living universe of danger and opportunity in a challenging and highly rewarding space adventure. Fight, trade, build, and connect with a universe driven and shaped directly by players.

en.name: Backrooms: Escape Together
en.short_description: A visually lifelike co-op horror for 1-6 people. Journey through 10 procedurally generated levels, using what's available to survive and progress deeper into the Backrooms.

tc.name: Backrooms: Escape Together
tc.short_description: A visually lifelike co-op horror for 1-6 people. Journey through 10 procedurally generated levels, using what's available to survive and progress deeper into the Backrooms.

en.name: Dragon Age™: The Veilguard
en.short_description: Unite the Veilguard and defy the gods in Dragon Age™: The Veilguard, an immersive single-player RPG.

tc.name: 闇龍紀元™: 紗障守護者
tc.short_description: 在《闇龍紀元™：紗障守護者》這款沉浸式的單人RPG遊戲中統合紗障守護者並對抗諸神。

en.name: Car Mechanic Simulator 2021
en.short_description: Work your way to a service empire. Get your hands dirty in a highly realistic simulation game that pays major attention to details. Pay a visit to a new Auction house and buy cars in various conditions. Expand your range of services by investing in a new work space and equipment.

tc.name: Car Mechanic Simulator 2021
tc.short_description: Work your way to a service empire. Get your hands dirty in a highly realistic simulation game that pays major attention to details. Pay a visit to a new Auction house and buy cars in various conditions. Expand your range of services by investing in a new work space and equipment.

en.name: Minecraft Dungeons
en.short_description: Fight your way through an exciting action-adventure game, inspired by classic dungeon crawlers and set in the Minecraft universe!

tc.name: Minecraft Dungeons
tc.short_description: 在全新的動作冒險遊戲中全力奮戰，遊戲靈感來自經典的「深入地牢」，也是 Minecraft 宇宙中的新成員！

en.name: WILD HEARTS™
en.short_description: Master ancient tech to hunt down giant beasts. WILD HEARTS™ is a twist on the hunting genre where technology gives you a fighting chance against giant nature-infused beasts. Hunt alone or with friends.

tc.name: 《WILD HEARTS™》
tc.short_description: 掌握古代科技，獵殺巨型野獸。《WILD HEARTS™》是狩獵類型遊戲的新形式，其中的科技將提供你與野性巨獸一搏的力量。可以獨自狩獵，也能與好友一同出擊。

en.name: ATOM RPG: Post-apocalyptic indie game
en.short_description: ATOM RPG is a post-apocalyptic indie game, inspired by classic CRPGs: Fallout, Wasteland, Deus Ex, Baldur's Gate and many others.

tc.name: ATOM RPG: Post-apocalyptic indie game
tc.short_description: 《核爆RPG》靈感源於經典的CRPG：《Fallout》、《Wasteland》、《System Shock》、《Deus Ex》、《Baldur's Gate》等系列。

en.name: High On Life
en.short_description: HIGH ON KNIFE DLC OUT NOW!! - Humanity is being threatened by an alien cartel who wants to use them as drugs. It’s up to you to rescue and partner with charismatic, talking guns, take down Garmantuous and his gang, and save the world!

tc.name: High On Life
tc.short_description: 人類遭外星人販毒集團威脅，這個集團想把人類當成毒品。你必須救援會說話且充滿個性的槍械，並與它們成為搭檔，打倒加曼圖斯一伙人，並且拯救世界！

en.name: 港詭實錄ParanormalHK
en.short_description: Paranormal HK is a first person horror game about Urban legends of Hong Kong, China. The story is about a crew of online supernatural channel“Beyond the Invisible” went to Kowloon Walled City to film a short movie for their latest episode and encountered something out of their expectations.

tc.name: 港詭實錄
tc.short_description: 《港詭實錄》是一款以中國香港都市傳說為題材的第一人稱恐怖冒險遊戲。故事講述一群年輕人為了錄製探靈節目“逃出靈界點”，來到九龍城寨遺址。然而這次的錄製卻因為一些突發事件變得詭異起來……

en.name: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle
en.short_description: Uncover one of history’s greatest mysteries in a first-person, single-player adventure. The year is 1937, sinister forces are scouring the globe for the secret to an ancient power connected to the Great Circle, and only one person can stop them - Indiana Jones™.

tc.name: 《印第安納瓊斯：古老之圈》
tc.short_description: 在這款第一人稱的單人冒險遊戲解開史上最驚天動地的謎團。1937年，邪惡勢力席捲全球，尋覓古代力量的祕密，這個祕密與古老之圈有關，而世上唯一能阻止他們的人就是印第安納瓊斯。

en.name: ATRI -My Dear Moments-
en.short_description: "As the world sank, I found you." In the near future, a sudden and unexplained sea rise has left much of human civilization underwater. In a little town slowly being enveloped by the ocean, an unforgettable summer is about to begin for a boy and a mysterious robot girl...

tc.name: ATRI -My Dear Moments-
tc.short_description: 「在日漸沉沒的世界裏，我找到了你。」在不遠的未來，海平面原因不明地急速上升，導致了地表多數都沉入海中。在一個逐漸沉入海中的平和小鎮，屬於少年和機器人少女的，難忘夏日就這麼開始了——

en.name: MONOPOLY® PLUS
en.short_description: EMBARK ON A JOURNEY TO OWN IT ALL! Build your empire on a colorful and 3D lively city animated by funny sidekicks! MONOPOLY® PLUS brings the classic franchise to a new level on PC with amazing animations, customizable house rules!

tc.name: MONOPOLY® PLUS
tc.short_description: 展開縱橫天下之旅！ 與親朋好友在生動豐富的 3D 城市中建立自己的帝國。MONOPOLY® PLUS 擁有精細的動畫與可自訂的建築系統，將經典桌上遊戲在 PC 平台提升至全新的境界。

en.name: Pacific Drive
en.short_description: Face the supernatural dangers of the Olympic Exclusion Zone with a car as your only lifeline in this driving survival adventure! Scavenge resources, load up your trusty station wagon, and drive like hell to make it through alive.

tc.name: Pacific Drive
tc.short_description: 在這個迴圈式的駕駛生存冒險中，你的愛車就是你的唯一希望，和它一起勇敢面對奧林匹克禁區的超自然危險吧！搜刮資源並安裝到你的愛車上，拚命狂飆地活下去吧。

en.name: Sprocket
en.short_description: Carefully balance mobility, firepower and armour in a dedicated tank designer. Then uncarefully put them to the test in a series of combat scenarios progressing through the ages of the tank. Here, your limit is what you can fit inside your hull and turret while still being able to move forwards.

tc.name: Sprocket
tc.short_description: Carefully balance mobility, firepower and armour in a dedicated tank designer. Then uncarefully put them to the test in a series of combat scenarios progressing through the ages of the tank. Here, your limit is what you can fit inside your hull and turret while still being able to move forwards.

en.name: Iron Snout
en.short_description: Iron Snout is a fast, colorful and brutal fighting game in which you will be helping a piglet fight for its life against hordes of wolves.

tc.name: Iron Snout
tc.short_description: 狂敲鍵盤，一豬當關，在令人欲罷不能的戰鬥遊戲中，打敗成千上百的狼群吧！

en.name: Timberborn
en.short_description: Humans are long gone. In a world struck by droughts and toxic waste, will your lumberpunk beavers do any better? A sandbox city-building game featuring ingenious animals, vertical architecture, water physics, and terraforming. Contains high amounts of wood.

tc.name: 河狸浮生記 Timberborn
tc.short_description: 人類早已不復存在。在這個乾旱和有毒廢料肆虐的世界，你的木匠龐克河狸們的命運又會是如何？這款沙盒城市建造遊戲包含機智的動物、巧妙的垂直建築、多樣化的水物理運用與地形改造。當然還有絕對少不了的大量木材！

en.name: Ace of Spades: Battle Builder
en.short_description: Say hello to the creative shooter. Ace of Spades: Battle Builder is the first-person shooter that lets you create your battleground, destroy it, then create it again. Up to 32 players choose from seven unique classes and jump into team-based, multiplayer mayhem across an endlessly evolving battlefield, to construct, destruct and take out...

tc.name: Ace of Spades: Battle Builder
tc.short_description: Say hello to the creative shooter. Ace of Spades: Battle Builder is the first-person shooter that lets you create your battleground, destroy it, then create it again. Up to 32 players choose from seven unique classes and jump into team-based, multiplayer mayhem across an endlessly evolving battlefield, to construct, destruct and take out...

en.name: FIVE NIGHTS AT FREDDY'S: HELP WANTED
en.short_description: Five Nights at Freddy’s: Help Wanted is a collection of classic and original mini-games set in the Five Nights universe. Experience the horror in flat (non-VR) mode or VR. Oculus Rift and HTC Vive are supported. A VR Headset is NOT required to play.

tc.name: FIVE NIGHTS AT FREDDY'S: HELP WANTED
tc.short_description: Five Nights at Freddy’s: Help Wanted is a collection of classic and original mini-games set in the Five Nights universe. Experience the horror in flat (non-VR) mode or VR. Oculus Rift and HTC Vive are supported. A VR Headset is NOT required to play.

tc.name: PICO PARK
tc.short_description: PICO PARK is a cooperative local/online multiplay action puzzle game for 2-8 players.

en.short_description: Forge your weapon and follow the path of the Jedi Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy is the latest installment of the highly acclaimed Jedi Knight series. Take on the role of a new student eager to learn the ways of the Force from Jedi Master Luke Skywalker.

tc.name: STAR WARS™ Jedi Knight - Jedi Academy™
tc.short_description: Forge your weapon and follow the path of the Jedi Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy is the latest installment of the highly acclaimed Jedi Knight series. Take on the role of a new student eager to learn the ways of the Force from Jedi Master Luke Skywalker.

en.name: The Stanley Parable
en.short_description: The Stanley Parable is a first person exploration game. You will play as Stanley, and you will not play as Stanley. You will follow a story, you will not follow a story. You will have a choice, you will have no choice. The game will end, the game will never end.

tc.name: The Stanley Parable
tc.short_description: The Stanley Parable is a first person exploration game. You will play as Stanley, and you will not play as Stanley. You will follow a story, you will not follow a story. You will have a choice, you will have no choice. The game will end, the game will never end.

en.name: Paint the Town Red
en.short_description: Paint the Town Red is a chaotic first person melee combat game set in different locations and time periods. The voxel-based enemies can be punched, bashed, kicked, stabbed and sliced completely dynamically using almost anything that isn't nailed down.

tc.name: Paint the Town Red
tc.short_description: Paint the Town Red is a chaotic first person melee combat game set in different locations and time periods. The voxel-based enemies can be punched, bashed, kicked, stabbed and sliced completely dynamically using almost anything that isn't nailed down.

en.name: LEGO® Star Wars™ - The Complete Saga

tc.name: Maneater
tc.short_description: 化身巨型鯊魚，體驗頂級掠食者稱霸海洋的終極力量！在沿海水路製造恐慌。撕咬肢解泳客與潛水客的肢體，他們才有理由怕你！

en.name: For The King
en.short_description: For The King is a strategic RPG that blends tabletop and roguelike elements in a challenging adventure that spans the realms. Set off on a single player experience or play cooperatively both online and locally.

tc.name: For The King
tc.short_description: For The King是一款結合桌遊和 roguelike 類型元素的跨越領域戰略型 RPG 遊戲。可以在線和單機進行單人或多人合作的遊戲體驗。

en.name: Wargame: Red Dragon
en.short_description: The new reference in RTS at its best! The Wargame series returns to duty, larger, richer and more spectacular than ever before. In Wargame Red Dragon, you are engaged in a large-scale conflict where Western forces clash against the Communist bloc.

tc.name: Wargame: Red Dragon
tc.short_description: The new reference in RTS at its best! The Wargame series returns to duty, larger, richer and more spectacular than ever before. In Wargame Red Dragon, you are engaged in a large-scale conflict where Western forces clash against the Communist bloc.

en.name: Infection Free Zone
en.short_description: Choose any real region from the world. Choose your base of operations, then rebuild and readapt the buildings around you to create a self-sustaining settlement. Take charge of a group of survivors from your city. And when the night falls - Defend the zone from the infected!

tc.name: Infection Free Zone
tc.short_description: 病毒肆虐全球，城市倖存者的命運就掌握在您手中。選擇聚居地，重建並改造建築，打造出自給自足的安全區。夜幕降臨後，您必須抵禦來襲的感染者，保衛家園！ 遊戲採用真實地理資料，您可在全球任意城市遊玩

en.name: Gold Mining Simulator
en.short_description: Become a gold miner. Work hard, dig deep, explore the world, and you’ll become the wealthiest person in Alaska. Use a variety of specialist machines to find as much gold as you can.

tc.name: Gold Mining Simulator
tc.short_description: Become a gold miner. Work hard, dig deep, explore the world, and you’ll become the wealthiest person in Alaska. Use a variety of specialist machines to find as much gold as you can.

en.name: Mr.Mine
en.short_description: Explore the depths of the earth and uncover hidden treasures in this addictive idle mining game. Unlock the power of your drill with hundreds of upgrades, discover mysterious relics, and unearth priceless gems. Can you master the mines and reveal their deepest secrets? Dive in and dig deep!

tc.name: Mr.Mine
tc.short_description: Explore the depths of the earth and uncover hidden treasures in this addictive idle mining game. Unlock the power of your drill with hundreds of upgrades, discover mysterious relics, and unearth priceless gems. Can you master the mines and reveal their deepest secrets? Dive in and dig deep!

en.name: Generation Zero®
en.short_description: Generation Zero is a stealth-action shooter where you wage guerilla warfare against lethal mechanical enemies. Explore a vast open world map inspired by the Swedish Cold War era, take part in the resistance alone or with up to three friends in seamless co-op.

tc.name: Generation Zero®
tc.short_description: Generation Zero is a stealth-action shooter where you wage guerilla warfare against lethal mechanical enemies. Explore a vast open world map inspired by the Swedish Cold War era, take part in the resistance alone or with up to three friends in seamless co-op.

en.name: STAR WARS™ Knights of the Old Republic™
en.short_description: It is four thousand years before the Galactic Empire and hundreds of Jedi Knights have fallen in battle against the ruthless Sith. You are the last hope of the Jedi Order. Can you master the awesome power of the Force on your quest to save the Republic? Or will you fall to the lure of the dark side?

tc.name: STAR WARS™ Knights of the Old Republic™
tc.short_description: It is four thousand years before the Galactic Empire and hundreds of Jedi Knights have fallen in battle against the ruthless Sith. You are the last hope of the Jedi Order. Can you master the awesome power of the Force on your quest to save the Republic? Or will you fall to the lure of the dark side?

en.name: World of Guns: Gun Disassembly
en.short_description: World of Guns: Gun Disassembly lets you delve into the inner workings of guns from the largest gears to the smallest screws

tc.name: World of Guns: Gun Disassembly
tc.short_description: World of Guns - 終極3D槍械百科全書和競技游戲！

en.name: We Happy Few
en.short_description: From the independent studio that brought you Contrast, We Happy Few is an action/adventure game set in a drug-fuelled, retrofuturistic city in an alternative 1960s England. Hide, fight and conform your way out of this delusional, Joy-obsessed world.

tc.name: We Happy Few
tc.short_description: 由製作的《Contrast》的獨立遊戲創作室呈獻，《We Happy Few》是一個以仿英倫六十年代、具復古未來風格的毒品之城作故事背景的動作／冒險遊戲。隱藏、戰鬥或是順從，設法逃離這個充滿幻覺、沉溺於 Joy 藥劑的世界。

en.name: Call of Duty®: WWII
en.short_description: Call of Duty®: WWII - a breathtaking experience that redefines World War II.

tc.name: Call of Duty®: WWII
tc.short_description: 《決勝時刻®：二戰》──扣人心弦的遊戲體驗，重新定義第二次世界大戰。

en.name: Liftoff®: FPV Drone Racing
en.short_description: Liftoff® is a drone simulator that translates the rush of first-person view drone flight to the digital world. Join the biggest community for virtual FPV racing and freestyle!

tc.name: Liftoff®: FPV Drone Racing
tc.short_description: Liftoff® is a drone simulator that translates the rush of first-person view drone flight to the digital world. Join the biggest community for virtual FPV racing and freestyle!

en.name: Find Love or Die Trying
en.short_description: Welcome to the only killer dating show where ending up single means ending up dead! Date or die, it's up to your choices!

tc.name: Find Love or Die Trying / 寻爱或赴死
tc.short_description: 欢迎来到唯一的杀手级约会节目，在这里，单身的人被杀死了! 是约会还是死亡，取决于你的选择!

en.name: Orcs Must Die! 2
en.short_description: You’ve tossed, burned and sliced them by the thousands – now orcs must die more than ever before! Grab a friend and slay orcs in untold numbers in this sequel to the 2011 AIAS Strategy Game of the Year from Robot Entertainment.

tc.short_description: You’ve tossed, burned and sliced them by the thousands – now orcs must die more than ever before! Grab a friend and slay orcs in untold numbers in this sequel to the 2011 AIAS Strategy Game of the Year from Robot Entertainment.

tc.name: 《F1® 24》
tc.short_description: 加入競速，成為 20 名精英之一。在 2024 FIA Formula One World Championship™ 官方電玩遊戲《EA SPORTS™ F1® 24》，如高手般風馳電掣。

en.name: Yakuza Kiwami (Legacy)
en.short_description: SEGA’s critically-acclaimed entry that started a legend. Become Kazuma Kiryu, an up-and-coming yakuza who takes the fall for the murder of a crime boss, only to emerge from prison ten years later to a changed world. Remastered from the ground up, now in 4K and uncapped framerates on PC.

tc.name: 人中之龍 極 [Legacy]
tc.short_description: 自2005年誕生以來持續熱賣的系列作，其原點的第一部作品《人中之龍》的完全重製作品《人中之龍 極》登場！與「100億的少女」的相遇，將「傳說之龍」捲入陰謀的漩渦之中。

en.name: Mouthwashing
en.short_description: The five crew members of the Tulpar are stranded in the empty reaches of space, shrouded in perpetual sunset. God is not watching.

tc.name: Mouthwashing
tc.short_description: 拓帕號的五名船員受困於茫茫宇宙中。永恆日落壟罩，老天卻別過目光。

en.name: Resident Evil 3: Raccoon City Demo
en.short_description: Experience a taste of this stunning re-imagining of Resident Evil 3. Play a section of the opening of the game, specially tuned for this demo, and get a glimpse of the tragedy that befalls Raccoon City.

tc.name: Resident Evil 3: Raccoon City Demo
tc.short_description: 距離於1999年發售的《Resident Evil 3》已過去21年── 可搶先體驗以極高質素重生的《Resident Evil 3》的「Resident Evil 3: Raccoon City Demo」就此登場。 ※此特製體驗版可不限次數地體驗遊戲早期劇情。

en.name: Astral Party
en.short_description: Astral Party is a multiplayer party game populated by cute anime girls! Choose your favorite character, strategize skills & cards, and roll the dice to destroy friendships in this unique board game.

tc.name: Astral Party

en.short_description: Master your aim with KovaaK’s, the world’s best aim trainer. With over 200,000 scenarios, playlists and more! Embrace total customization, including a map editor and game physics. More than just a trainer, it’s a dynamic, community-driven platform that elevates your gameplay.

en.name: Vampire: The Masquerade - Bloodlines
en.short_description: Vampire®: The Masquerade-Bloodlines™ delivers a new type of RPG experience-one that blends all the core elements of a traditional RPG with the graphical richness, immediacy and brutal combat of a first-person action game. The game plunges players into the dark and gritty vampire underworld of modern-day L.A. as a creature of the night.

tc.name: Vampire: The Masquerade - Bloodlines
tc.short_description: Vampire®: The Masquerade-Bloodlines™ 帶來新種角色扮演體驗，融合傳統角色扮演遊戲的核心要素，再配上第一人稱動作遊戲的精美畫面、臨場刺激與野蠻搏鬥。 這款遊戲把玩家拉進現代洛杉磯黑暗而血腥的吸血鬼地下世界， 成為夜世界的一員。 玩家要運用種類繁多的吸血鬼能力和武器，擊敗人類和其他吸血鬼，在此過程中培養角色的能力、與其他角色互動，並解決劇情任務。 這款遊戲採用 Valve 的 Source 技術，遊戲設計則源自 White Wolf 熱門的紙上角色扮演系列 Vampire: The Masquerade 及其官方氏族。

en.name: Sanctum 2
en.short_description: Sanctum 2 is the sequel to the world’s first Tower Defense/FPS hybrid game. Pick from four unique character classes and embark on a mission to protect the oxygen-producing Cores from hordes of deadly aliens who are threatened by their existence.

en.name: Monster Prom
en.short_description: You have 3 weeks to get a date for Monster Prom! Go through absurd and funny situations, raise your stats and seduce one of your classmates. Beautiful art, bold, unapologetic dialogue and hard choices make up this Multiplayer (1-4 players) Dating Sim. Be your worst self.

tc.name: Wayfinder

Players take control of Iron Man, Spider-Man, the Hulk, Captain America, Wolverine and many more Marvel characters as they unite to stop Loki and a host of other Marvel villains from assembling a super-weapon capable of destroying the world.

tc.name: LEGO® Marvel™ Super Heroes
tc.short_description: 《LEGO® Marvel™ Super Heroes》講述了橫跨整個漫威宇宙的原創故事。玩家可控制鋼鐵人、蜘蛛人、綠巨人、美國隊長、金鋼狼等眾多漫威角色，攜手合作對抗洛基和許多其他漫威反派，阻止他們組裝足以摧毀世界的超級武器。玩家將穿越 LEGO 曼哈頓追捕宇宙積木，並造訪漫威宇宙的主要地點，如斯塔克大廈、小行星 M、九頭蛇基地和 X 學院。在首款 LEGO 電玩中粉碎、擺動和飛行，其中包含 100 多位你最愛的漫威宇宙超級英雄和超級反派，包括鋼鐵人、金剛狼、綠巨人、蜘蛛人、美國隊長、黑寡婦、洛基和死侍。扮演你最喜愛的漫威角色，利用你的超酷力量和技能拯救地球：鋼鐵人可飛行、懸浮、發射導彈，還可直接從胸口發射強大的單光束。

Only by mastering survival and uncovering ancient secrets can they hope to slay the Dragon Queen—alone or with allies.

en.short_description: IXION is an unrelenting, city-building odyssey across the stars. As Administrator of the Tiqqun, DOLOS’ prototype space station, you are tasked with balancing preservation and exploration as you manage infrastructure, resources and crew. Can you keep the flame of humanity alight in the cold dark?

en.name: War Selection
en.short_description: War Selection is a compelling RTS game featuring base building, resource extraction and warfare. Evolve from a stone age tribe to a distinct industrial nation with unique game mechanics and battle for supremacy with dozens of players on a unique procedurally generated map.

tc.name: War Selection
tc.short_description: War Selection is a compelling RTS game featuring base building, resource extraction and warfare. Evolve from a stone age tribe to a distinct industrial nation with unique game mechanics and battle for supremacy with dozens of players on a unique procedurally generated map.

en.name: Notes of Soul
en.short_description: The gleaning club is an immersive game experience hall, where you can participate in the script arranged according to the story by role playing. Or learn folk knowledge and taste strange culture, or realize the sad but warm past of the protagonist of the story.

tc.name: 探灵笔記/拾遗记
tc.short_description: 拾遺社是一家沉浸式遊戲體驗館，在這裡你可以通過角色扮演的方式，親身參與依照故事編排好的劇本當中。 或是學習民俗知識品味志怪文化，或是體悟故事主角悲情卻不失溫暖的過往。 在感受中國沉積千年傳統文化魅力的同時，感悟現實生活的不易！

en.name: Codename CURE
en.short_description: Codename CURE is a first person, co-operative zombie game with support for up to five players, providing dynamic, fast-paced zombie fragging with both objective, and survival-based missions.

tc.name: Codename CURE
tc.short_description: Codename CURE is a first person, co-operative zombie game with support for up to five players, providing dynamic, fast-paced zombie fragging with both objective, and survival-based missions.

en.name: Library Of Ruina
en.short_description: "May you find your book in this place." Combat between the guests and the librarians breaks out as if it were on a stage. Defeated guests turn into books, and the Library grows onward. And eventually, get your hands on… The one singular, perfect book.

tc.name: Library Of Ruina
tc.short_description: "May you find your book in this place." Combat between the guests and the librarians breaks out as if it were on a stage. Defeated guests turn into books, and the Library grows onward. And eventually, get your hands on… The one singular, perfect book.

en.name: Borderlands Game of the Year Enhanced
en.short_description: Discover the original co-op shooter-looter, crammed with new enhancements! As one of 4 trigger-happy mercenaries with RPG progression, equip bazillions of guns to take on the desert planet Pandora.

tc.name: Borderlands Game of the Year Enhanced
tc.short_description: 快來體驗這款經過全新優化的合作式射擊奪寶遊戲鼻祖吧！扮演4位無法無天的傭兵之一體驗RPG養成要素，裝備無窮盡的槍械征服荒涼的行星Pandora。

en.name: The Wolf Among Us
en.short_description: From the makers of the 2012 Game of the Year: The Walking Dead, comes a thriller based on the award-winning Fables comic books. As Bigby Wolf you will discover that a brutal, bloody murder is just a taste of things to come in a game series where your every decision can have enormous consequences.

tc.name: The Wolf Among Us
tc.short_description: From the makers of the 2012 Game of the Year: The Walking Dead, comes a thriller based on the award-winning Fables comic books. As Bigby Wolf you will discover that a brutal, bloody murder is just a taste of things to come in a game series where your every decision can have enormous consequences.

en.name: DYNASTY WARRIORS: ORIGINS
en.short_description: Become immersed in exhilarating battles as a nameless hero in the Three Kingdoms

tc.name: 真・三國無雙 起源
tc.short_description: 如臨真實戰場與暢享爽快的一騎當千動作！無名英雄闖蕩三國亂世的『真・三國無雙』系列新作。

en.name: Gloomhaven
en.short_description: Lead your band of mercenaries in the land of Gloomhaven, work with unsavoury individuals, shape the fate of the region, fight your way through horrific places and get rich or die trying in this ruthless Tactical-RPG.

tc.name: Gloomhaven
tc.short_description: Lead your band of mercenaries in the land of Gloomhaven, work with unsavoury individuals, shape the fate of the region, fight your way through horrific places and get rich or die trying in this ruthless Tactical-RPG.

en.name: Griftlands
en.short_description: Griftlands is a deck-building roguelite where you negotiate, fight, steal or otherwise persuade others to get your way. Every decision is important, be it the jobs you take, the friends you make, or the cards you collect.

tc.name: 欺詐之地
tc.short_description: 『欺詐之地』是壹款卡牌組建的rogue-like遊戲，妳可以在遊戲中協商、戰鬥、行竊或是說服他人來達到自己的目的。每個決定都至關重要，不管是接受什麽任務、跟誰交朋友、還是收集哪些卡牌。

en.name: Rocksmith® 2014 Edition REMASTERED LEARN & PLAY
en.short_description: Play guitar or bass and start your musical journey with Rocksmith 2014 Remastered Learn & Play! Perfect for beginners and pros, learn at your own rythmm with 60 tracks and customizable tools. Get ready to rock!

tc.name: Rocksmith® 2014 Edition REMASTERED LEARN & PLAY
tc.short_description: 彈奏吉他或低音吉他，並開始你的音樂之旅，使用 Rocksmith 2014 Remastered Learn & Play！適合初學者和專業人士，使用 60 首歌曲和可自訂工具，按自己的節奏學習。準備好搖滾吧！

en.name: Age of Empires: Definitive Edition
en.short_description: Age of Empires, the pivotal real-time strategy game that launched a 20-year legacy returns with modernized gameplay, all-new 4K visuals, 8-person multiplayer battles and a host of other new features. Welcome back to history.

tc.name: Age of Empires: Definitive Edition
tc.short_description: 出自二十年前的經典即時戰略遊戲 Age of Empires 回歸，將為您帶來現代化遊戲內容、全新 4K 視覺效果、能和八位玩家進行多人遊戲對戰以及其他許多全新功能。歡迎重返歷史榮光。

en.name: Plants vs. Zombies: Battle for Neighborville™
en.short_description: Kick some grass in Plants vs. Zombies: Battle for Neighborville, the wackiest shooter yet!

tc.name: 植物大戰殭屍™: 和睦小鎮保衛戰
tc.short_description: 在《植物大戰殭屍: 和睦小鎮保衛戰》這款爆笑射擊遊戲中大顯神威！

en.name: PixARK
en.short_description: Enter a world of mystery, danger, ancient dinosaurs, mythical beasts, and cubes! Work by yourself or with a tribe of others to gather materials, craft useful items, tame wild creatures, and build huge bases to survive in PixARK!

tc.name: PixARK
tc.short_description: 進入一個神秘、危險，充滿古代恐龍與神話般怪獸和立體方塊世界！ 你可以獨立探險或與朋友組成部落，收集材料、製作工具與物件、馴服野生生物，並建立龐大的基地，在《方塊方舟》中生存下去！

en.name: Homeworld Remastered Collection
en.short_description: Experience the epic space strategy games that redefined the RTS genre. Control your fleet and build an armada across more than 30 single-player missions. Choose unit types, fleet formations and flight tactics for each strategic situation.

tc.name: Homeworld Remastered Collection
tc.short_description: Experience the epic space strategy games that redefined the RTS genre. Control your fleet and build an armada across more than 30 single-player missions. Choose unit types, fleet formations and flight tactics for each strategic situation.

en.name: Halls of Torment
en.short_description: Slay hordes of terrifying monsters in this horde survival roguelite. Descend into the Halls of Torment where the Lords of the underworld await you. Treasures, magical trinkets, and a growing cast of heroes will grant you the power to vanquish these horrors from beyond. How long can you survive?

tc.name: Halls of Torment 苦痛殿堂
tc.short_description: Slay hordes of terrifying monsters in this horde survival roguelite. Descend into the Halls of Torment where the Lords of the underworld await you. Treasures, magical trinkets, and a growing cast of heroes will grant you the power to vanquish these horrors from beyond. How long can you survive?

en.name: Aliens: Fireteam Elite
en.short_description: Aliens: Fireteam Elite is a cooperative third-person survival game set in the iconic Alien Universe. Battle through hordes of different types of Xenomorph, customize your character and gear, and level-up as you try to contain this ever-growing threat.

tc.name: Aliens: Fireteam Elite
tc.short_description: 《異形：特戰菁英》是第三人稱合作生存遊戲，背景設定在著名的異形宇宙。在你嘗試遏止這日益擴大的威脅的征途中，與不同種類的異形群戰鬥、自訂你的角色和裝備，並提升等級。

en.name: Brutal Legend
en.short_description: Brütal Legend is an action-adventure that marries visceral action combat with open-world freedom. Set in a universe somewhere between Lord of the Rings and Spinal Tap, it’s a fresh take on the action/driving genre, which in this case is full of imitation cover bands, demons intent on enslaving humanity and Heavy metal tunes.

tc.name: Brutal Legend
tc.short_description: 《惡黑搖滾》(Brütal Legend) 是一款結合動作鮮明的戰鬥與自由開放世界的動作冒險遊戲。遊戲的世界觀大概介於《魔戒》(Lord of the Rings) 與《搖滾萬萬歲》(Spinal Tap) 之間，這對於動作／駕駛遊戲類型是全新的嘗試；這裡充滿了模仿翻唱樂團，還有惡魔想要奴役人類與重金屬音樂。傑克·布萊克 (Jack Black)，出色的喜劇演員和音樂家，扮演萬用樂團技師 Eddie Riggs，還有許多在金屬音樂中最出名的人們客串演出，玩家和金屬樂迷絕對不能錯過這場瘋狂的冒險旅程。 PC 版本的《惡黑搖滾》包含兩款多人遊戲地圖包 Hammer of Infinite Fate 與 Tears of the Hextadon 作為免費額外內容。

en.name: The Witness
en.short_description: You wake up, alone, on a strange island full of puzzles that will challenge and surprise you.

tc.name: The Witness
tc.short_description: 你獨自一人在一座陌生的島嶼醒來，島上充滿各種令人意想不到的謎題，等你來挑戰。

en.name: Hatsune Miku: Project DIVA Mega Mix+
en.short_description: Take center stage in Hatsune Miku’s premier rhythm game starring the world’s #1 virtual pop star! With a stunner setlist and enormous wardrobe to style, it’s Miku’s ultimate tour—all it needs is you.

tc.name: 初音未來 Project DIVA MEGA39’s＋
tc.short_description: 虛擬歌手「初音未來」主演的節奏遊戲最新力作『初音未來 Project DIVA MEGA39's+』正式在Steam登場！ 「Project DIVA」系列集大成之作升級後回歸。 可遊玩為初音未來寫下精彩歷史的共170首以上的首樂曲的節奏遊戲！ 收錄400件以上的服裝模組（服裝）。 本作遊玩時的3DPV可切換「Future Tone原版」及「動漫風」

en.name: Natural Selection 2
en.short_description: A fast paced multiplayer shooter that pits aliens against humans in a strategic and action-packed struggle for survival!

tc.name: Natural Selection 2
tc.short_description: A fast paced multiplayer shooter that pits aliens against humans in a strategic and action-packed struggle for survival!

en.name: Contagion
en.short_description: Contagion isn't your average Zombie Shooter but instead takes a more realistic and different approach to the popular genre with unique characters, environments, weapons, items, and a built in system that makes every round completely unpredictable with resources, objectives, and paths ever changing.

tc.name: 傳染病
tc.short_description: 《傳染病》並不是普通的僵屍射擊遊戲，相反，它採用了一種更加現實和不同的方法來呈現這一流行的遊戲類型，它擁有獨特的角色、環境、武器、道具，以及一個內寘的系統，使得每一輪遊戲的資源、目標和路徑都是不可預測的。

en.name: Assassin's Creed® Revelations
en.short_description: Ezio Auditore walks in the footsteps of the legendary mentor Altair, on a dangerous journey of discovery and revelation.

tc.name: Assassin's Creed® Revelations
tc.short_description: Ezio Auditore walks in the footsteps of the legendary mentor Altair, on a dangerous journey of discovery and revelation.

en.name: S.K.I.L.L. - Special Force 2 (Shooter)
en.short_description: S.K.I.L.L. - Special Force 2 is a fast-paced, action-packed FPS shooter based on the Unreal Engine 3. The game features a wide range of game modes, tons of maps and a huge selection of weapons.

tc.name: S.K.I.L.L. - Special Force 2 (Shooter)
tc.short_description: S.K.I.L.L. - Special Force 2 is a fast-paced, action-packed shooter based on the Unreal Engine 3. The game features a wide range of game modes, tons of maps and a huge selection of weapons.

en.name: Grand Theft Auto: Episodes from Liberty City
en.short_description: Grand Theft Auto: Episodes from Liberty City includes both The Lost and Damned and The Ballad of Gay Tony together and does not require a copy of the original Grand Theft Auto IV to play.

tc.short_description: Grand Theft Auto: Episodes from Liberty City includes both The Lost and Damned and The Ballad of Gay Tony together and does not require a copy of the original Grand Theft Auto IV to play.

en.name: Serious Sam 3: BFE
en.short_description: Serious Sam 3: BFE is a prequel to the original indie fast action FPS and Game of the Year sensation - Serious Sam: The First Encounter!

tc.name: Serious Sam 3: BFE
tc.short_description: 最新的 DLC 尼罗河的珍宝已经发布！

en.name: Sword Art Online: Fatal Bullet
en.short_description: Experience an original story where you are the protagonist in the world of Gun Gale Online. Create your own avatar and explore devastated lands while experiencing exciting third person shooting in this action RPG.

tc.name: Sword Art Online: Fatal Bullet
tc.short_description: SAO遊戲最新作品是「您」化身為主角的TPSRPG。在槍械與鋼鐵的世界──《Gun Gale Online》中，作為桐人他們的戰友出生入死，並以英雄為目標向前邁進。依照自己喜好成長虛擬角色，並靈活運用多樣化的武器，在您專屬的戰場中倖存下來吧。

en.name: Serious Sam II
en.short_description: Serious Sam II is a shot of adrenaline to the hearts of first-person shooter fans across the world. This is serious!

tc.name: Serious Sam II
tc.short_description: 《英雄薩姆2》為全球第一人稱射擊遊戲愛好者注入了一劑強心針。這可是動真格的！

en.name: The Room
en.short_description: A mysterious invitation leads to the attic of an abandoned house. In the room is a cast-iron safe laced with strange carvings and on top, a note from your distant companion. It promises something ancient and astonishing concealed in the iron chamber - you need only find a way in.

tc.name: The Room
tc.short_description: A mysterious invitation leads to the attic of an abandoned house. In the room is a cast-iron safe laced with strange carvings and on top, a note from your distant companion. It promises something ancient and astonishing concealed in the iron chamber - you need only find a way in.

en.name: Sid Meier's Civilization®: Beyond Earth™
en.short_description: Sid Meier’s Civilization: Beyond Earth is a new science-fiction-themed entry into the award winning Civilization series. As part of an expedition sent to find a home beyond Earth, lead your people into a new frontier, explore and colonize an alien planet and create a new civilization in space.

tc.name: Sid Meier's Civilization®: Beyond Earth™
tc.short_description: Sid Meier’s Civilization: Beyond Earth is a new science-fiction-themed entry into the award winning Civilization series. As part of an expedition sent to find a home beyond Earth, lead your people into a new frontier, explore and colonize an alien planet and create a new civilization in space.

en.name: Eco
en.short_description: Build a civilization of real people, working together to advance society and stop a meteor, all without destroying the ecosystem in the process.

tc.name: Eco
tc.short_description: Build a civilization of real people, working together to advance society and stop a meteor, all without destroying the ecosystem in the process.

en.name: Ghostwire: Tokyo
en.short_description: Tokyo's population has vanished, and deadly supernatural forces prowl the streets. Use an arsenal of elemental abilities to unravel the truth behind the disappearance and save Tokyo.

tc.name: Ghostwire: Tokyo
tc.short_description: 東京的人口早已徹底消失，致命的超自然力量在大街小巷裡徘徊。運用各種元素能力揭開失蹤背後的真相，拯救東京。

en.name: Loop Hero
en.short_description: The Lich has thrown the world into a timeless loop and plunged its inhabitants into never ending chaos. Wield an expanding deck of mystical cards to place enemies, buildings, and terrain along each unique expedition loop for the brave hero.

tc.name: Loop Hero
tc.short_description: 巫妖將世界陷進了永恆的迴圈裡，讓所有居民遭受無盡的混亂。使用一副不斷擴充的神秘卡片在每一位勇敢英雄的獨特遠征迴圈裡擺上敵人、建築物與地形。在不同職業英雄的戰鬥中回收並裝備強大的戰利品，同時擴充生存者的營地以加強對每一輪迴冒險的支援。

en.name: Book of Demons
en.short_description: Book of Demons is a Hack & Slash in which YOU decide the length of quests. Wield magic cards instead of weapons and slay the armies of darkness in the dungeons below the Old Cathedral. Save the terror-stricken Paperverse from the clutches of the Archdemon himself!

tc.name: Book of Demons
tc.short_description: 砍殺遊戲類型在這款遊戲中呈現最純粹的一面，而且非常地引人著迷。在老舊大教堂底下的地城中斬殺黑暗大軍，從大惡魔手中拯救受盡折磨痛苦的紙世界。

en.name: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links
en.short_description: Take on Duelists around the world with "Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links"! Step into a world that crosses dimensions and connects all Duelists. In Duel World, any location transforms into a Duel Field where heated Duels unfold!

tc.name: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links
tc.short_description: 在《Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links》與世界各地的決鬥好手一較高下！ 進入一個時空交錯、連結所有決鬥者的世界。在決鬥世界，每個地方都是戰場，激烈的決鬥隨時展開！

en.name: Blasphemous 2
en.short_description: The Penitent One awakens as Blasphemous 2 joins him once again in an endless struggle against The Miracle. Dive into a perilous new world filled with mysteries and secrets to discover, and tear your way through monstrous foes that stand between you and your quest to end the cycle once and for all.

tc.name: Blasphemous 2
tc.short_description: Penitent One 在《Blasphemous 2》醒來，再次陷入對抗 Miracle 永無休止的旅程。深入這個危險新世界，裡頭充滿謎團和秘密等待您去發現，眾多可怕敵人將阻擋您完成目標，您必須殺出一條血路，想辦法徹底終結這個循環。

en.name: Outward Definitive Edition
en.short_description: No remarkable journey is achieved without great effort. In Outward, the cold of the night or an infected wound can be as dangerous as a predator lurking in the dark. Explore the vast world of Aurai solo or in Co-op. The Definitive Edition features both DLCs and quality of life improvements.

tc.name: Outward Definitive Edition
tc.short_description: No remarkable journey is achieved without great effort. In Outward, the cold of the night or an infected wound can be as dangerous as a predator lurking in the dark. Explore the vast world of Aurai solo or in Co-op. The Definitive Edition features both DLCs and quality of life improvements.

en.name: Mass Effect™: Andromeda Deluxe Edition
en.short_description: Return to the Mass Effect universe & lead the first humans in Andromeda on a desperate search for our new home.

tc.name: 《質量效應™：仙女座》豪華版
tc.short_description: 《質量效應™：仙女座》將帶領玩家越過銀河，前往遙遠的仙女座星系。

en.name: Symphony of War: The Nephilim Saga
en.short_description: Enter Tahnra, a land savaged by war. You, a fresh academy graduate with humble beginnings, will grow to lead a grand army against a corrupt adversary. Gather heroes, form bonds, and lead your force in turn-based battles. Make use of tactics, terrain, morale and more to bring peace to the land!

tc.name: Symphony of War: The Nephilim Saga
tc.short_description: Enter Tahnra, a land savaged by war. You, a fresh academy graduate with humble beginnings, will grow to lead a grand army against a corrupt adversary. Gather heroes, form bonds, and lead your force in turn-based battles. Make use of tactics, terrain, morale and more to bring peace to the land!

en.name: Football Manager 2021
en.short_description: New additions and game upgrades deliver added levels of depth, drama and football authenticity. FM21 empowers you like never before to develop your skills and command success at your club.

tc.name: Football Manager 2021
tc.short_description: 遊戲中的新功能和更新，為你帶來提升到新層次的深度、戲劇性與最貼近現實的足球。《FM21》為你提供前所未見的權限，逐步開發你的管理能力，帶領球隊邁向成功。

en.name: The Escapists 2
en.short_description: Craft, Steal, Brawl and Escape! It’s time to bust out of the toughest prisons in the world as you return to the life of an inmate in The Escapists 2, now with multiplayer! Have you got what it takes to escape?

tc.name: The Escapists 2
tc.short_description: Craft, Steal, Brawl and Escape! It’s time to bust out of the toughest prisons in the world as you return to the life of an inmate in The Escapists 2, now with multiplayer! Have you got what it takes to escape?

en.name: F1 2018
en.short_description: MAKE HEADLINES in F1® 2018. F1® 2018 is the official videogame of the 2018 FIA FORMULA ONE WORLD CHAMPIONSHIP™. Become immersed in the world of Formula 1® more than ever before.Build your reputation both on and off the track, with time-pressured media interviews that influence your F1 career path.

tc.name: F1 2018
tc.short_description: MAKE HEADLINES in F1® 2018. F1® 2018 is the official videogame of the 2018 FIA FORMULA ONE WORLD CHAMPIONSHIP™. Become immersed in the world of Formula 1® more than ever before.Build your reputation both on and off the track, with time-pressured media interviews that influence your F1 career path.

en.name: Hand of Fate
en.short_description: Deckbuilding comes to life in Hand of Fate! An infinitely replayable series of quests - earn new cards, build your deck, then try to defeat it! In a cabin at the end of the world, the game of life and death is played. Draw your cards, play your hand, and discover your fate.

tc.name: Hand of Fate
tc.short_description: Deckbuilding comes to life in Hand of Fate! An infinitely replayable series of quests - earn new cards, build your deck, then try to defeat it! In a cabin at the end of the world, the game of life and death is played. Draw your cards, play your hand, and discover your fate.

en.name: Frostpunk 2
en.short_description: Develop, expand, and advance your city in a society survival game set 30 years after an apocalyptic blizzard ravaged Earth. In Frostpunk 2, you face not only the perils of never-ending winter, but also the powerful factions that watch your every step inside the Council Hall.

tc.name: 冰汽時代2
tc.short_description: 地球遭受暴風雪侵襲的30年後，滿目瘡痍的景象宛如世界末日。《冰汽時代2》是款社會生存遊戲，玩家需要在遊戲中發展並壯大自己的城市。除了面對危機四伏的無盡冬霜，玩家還要應付議會廳內部難纏的種種勢力。

en.name: Pillars of Eternity
en.short_description: Prepare to be enchanted by a world where the choices you make and the paths you choose shape your destiny. Obsidian Entertainment, the developer of Fallout: New Vegas™ and South Park: The Stick of Truth™, together with Paradox Interactive is proud to present Pillars of Eternity.

tc.name: Pillars of Eternity
tc.short_description: Prepare to be enchanted by a world where the choices you make and the paths you choose shape your destiny. Obsidian Entertainment, the developer of Fallout: New Vegas™ and South Park: The Stick of Truth™, together with Paradox Interactive is proud to present Pillars of Eternity.

en.name: Caves of Qud
en.short_description: Inhabit a deeply-simulated science fantasy world and chisel through layers of thousand-year-old civilizations. Build a character from over a hundred mutations and cybernetics. The award-winning sandbox roguelike & RPG full of robots, deep lore, and sentient plants.

tc.name: Caves of Qud
tc.short_description: 《卡德洞窟》是一部深受復古未來主義影響，具有深度模擬，遍布智能植物的科學幻想風格Roguelike史詩。踏入這片異域，鑿穿被重重掩埋的千年文明。

en.name: The Evil Within
en.short_description: Developed by Shinji Mikami -- creator of the seminal Resident Evil series -- and the talented team at Tango Gameworks, The Evil Within embodies the meaning of pure survival horror. Highly-crafted environments, horrifying anxiety, and an intricate story are combined to create an immersive world that will bring you to the height of tension.

tc.name: Warhammer: End Times - Vermintide
tc.short_description: Vermintide is an epic co-operative action combat adventure set in the End Times of the iconic Warhammer Fantasy world.

en.name: Deepest Sword
en.short_description: Venture deep into the Cavern of Longing in this short-yet-challenging physics platformer. Plunge your sword deep into the dragon's heart! How deep is your resolve?

tc.name: Deepest Sword

en.name: A Date with Death
en.short_description: Fight against & romance the one hunting for your soul in A Date with Death, a romance chat simulator where you date(?) the Grim Reaper himself. Create your own character, decorate your apartment, and chat away with the charming yet dangerous Grim Reaper through text and video calls.

en.short_description: The Ultimate BATTLE ROYALE! Sharpen your skills and kill everyone in your way as you hunt for guns, gear and glory in a massive battlefield where only ONE can be crowned the LAST MAN STANDING. Earn cash prizes in a monthly competitions,

en.name: Wobbledogs
en.short_description: A 3D pet simulation where you raise your own personal hive of mutating dogs, physically simulated all the way down to their guts! Wobbledogs is a casual and chill sandbox for players of all ages who want to care for their very own virtual pets in a surprising, unique, and stress-free environment.

tc.name: Wobbledogs
tc.short_description: 這是款3D寵物模擬遊戲，你可以飼養自己的突變小狗，遊戲實體模擬出小狗外觀，就連腸道也不放過！《Wobbledogs》是款老少咸宜的小品沙盒遊戲，玩家能在出乎意料、獨特又紓壓的環境飼養自己的虛擬寵物。

en.name: Fran Bow
en.short_description: Fran Bow is a creepy adventure game that tells the story of Fran, a young girl struggling with a mental disorder and an unfair destiny.

tc.name: Fran Bow
tc.short_description: Fran Bow is a creepy adventure game that tells the story of Fran, a young girl struggling with a mental disorder and an unfair destiny.

en.name: Gears 5
en.short_description: From one of gaming’s most acclaimed sagas, Gears is bigger than ever. With all-out war descending, Kait Diaz breaks away to uncover her connection to the enemy and discovers the true danger to Sera – herself.

tc.name: Gears 5
tc.short_description: 做為遊戲史上倍受讚譽的長篇劇情史詩之一， Gears 這次將帶來比以往更廣闊的世界。全面戰爭迫在眉睫，凱特迪亞茲脫離小隊，調查她與敵人之間晦暗不明的關係，並發現錫拉星的真正危機竟是，她自身的存在。

en.name: 3DMark
en.short_description: 3DMark is for gamers, overclockers and system builders who want to get more out of their hardware. With its wide range of benchmark tests, 3DMark has everything you need to test your PC or Mac's performance.

tc.name: 3DMark
tc.short_description: 3DMark 適用於希望從硬件中獲得更多收益的遊戲玩家，超頻者和系統構建商。 3DMark擁有廣泛的基準測試，可滿足您測試 PC 性能所需的一切.

en.name: The Beast Inside
en.short_description: The Beast Inside is a unique, gripping twist on thriller and survival horror. Immerse in the story of long-buried secrets, personal tragedies, and madness. Play as two protagonists bounded by dark heritage. Combat the enemies, solve riddles and experience real terror in the 3D-scanned environment.

tc.name: The Beast Inside
tc.short_description: The Beast Inside is a unique, gripping twist on thriller and survival horror. Immerse in the story of long-buried secrets, personal tragedies, and madness. Play as two protagonists bounded by dark heritage. Combat the enemies, solve riddles and experience real terror in the 3D-scanned environment.

en.name: Aliens: Colonial Marines Collection
en.short_description: You & your friends are the deadliest killers in the galaxy – the US Colonial Marines. It’s up to you to not just survive, but wipe out the Xeno infestation.

tc.name: Aliens: Colonial Marines Collection
tc.short_description: You & your friends are the deadliest killers in the galaxy – the US Colonial Marines. It’s up to you to not just survive, but wipe out the Xeno infestation.

en.name: Operation: Harsh Doorstop
en.short_description: Operation: Harsh Doorstop is the ultimate, free to play, tactical shooter sandbox. Play singleplayer, multiplayer, or co-op modes and explore thousands of community-created maps, weapons, and vehicles via the Steam Workshop. Created by ex-developers of Squad, Red Orchestra, and Insurgency.

tc.name: Operation: Harsh Doorstop
tc.short_description: Operation: Harsh Doorstop is the ultimate, free to play, tactical shooter sandbox. Play singleplayer, multiplayer, or co-op modes and explore thousands of community-created maps, weapons, and vehicles via the Steam Workshop. Created by ex-developers of Squad, Red Orchestra, and Insurgency.

en.name: Sunset Overdrive
en.short_description: Sunset Overdrive transforms an open-world apocalypse into your tactical playground. Zip, grind and wall-run across Sunset City with an unconventional arsenal. Hyper-agility, unique weapons, and customizable abilities deliver an explosive and irreverent adventure in the end times.

tc.name: Sunset Overdrive

Hyper-agility, unique weapons, and customizable abilities deliver an explosive and irreverent adventure in the end times.

en.name: Need for Speed™ Hot Pursuit Remastered
en.short_description: Feel the thrill of the chase and the rush of escape behind the wheels of the world’s hottest high-performance cars in Need for Speed™ Hot Pursuit Remastered– a heart-pumping, socially competitive racing experience.

tc.name: 《極速快感™：超熱力追緝》重製版
tc.short_description: 在《極速快感™：超熱力追緝》重製版中駕駛全世界最火熱的高性能車款，感受追逐的快感與逃脫的亢奮，體會令人心跳加速的社群競速體驗。

en.name: STAR WARS™ Empire at War - Gold Pack
en.short_description: Command or corrupt an entire galaxy in the definitive Star Wars strategy collection. It is a time of galactic civil war. Will you take up the reins of the Rebellion, assume control of the Empire, or rule the Star Wars Underworld?

tc.name: STAR WARS™ Empire at War - Gold Pack
