en.name: Disney Dreamlight Valley
en.short_description: Explore a world filled with the magic of Disney as you discover rich stories and build the perfect neighborhood alongside Disney and Pixar heroes and villains in this new life-sim adventure game. Welcome to Disney Dreamlight Valley.

tc.name: 迪士尼夢光谷
tc.short_description: Explore a world filled with the magic of Disney as you discover rich stories and build the perfect neighborhood alongside Disney and Pixar heroes and villains in this new life-sim adventure game. Welcome to Disney Dreamlight Valley.

en.name: Tricky Towers
en.short_description: With your brilliant robe and magic powers, it’s time to build some Tricky Towers! Stack your bricks in this land of fable, whose marvelous tower will be the most stable? Battle your friends and rise to fame, in this frantic physics game.

tc.name: Tricky Towers
tc.short_description: 有了華麗的戰袍以及魔法的力量，那麼就來建造一些Tricky塔吧！ 在這片寓言之地堆磚砌瓦，並盡力摧毀敵方的塔。施展魔法來建造高塔，並在這刺激的物理派對遊戲中抵禦對手黑暗魔法的破壞。

en.name: Baldur's Gate II: Enhanced Edition
en.short_description: Rediscover the beloved RPG classic— now enhanced for modern adventurers! Gather your party of heroes and continue the legendary adventure in this story-rich fantasy epic where every choice matters.

tc.name: Baldur's Gate II: Enhanced Edition
tc.short_description: Rediscover the beloved RPG classic— now enhanced for modern adventurers! Gather your party of heroes and continue the legendary adventure in this story-rich fantasy epic where every choice matters.

en.name: Eastward
en.short_description: Welcome to the charming world of Eastward - population declining! Journey through a society on the brink of collapse. Discover delightful towns, strange creatures and even stranger people! Wield a trusty frying pan and mystic powers on an adventure into the unknown…

tc.name: 風來之國 (Eastward)
tc.short_description: 歡迎來到風來之國！巨大危機過後，世界不再擁擠，城鎮和村莊散落在「大鐵道」的沿線；奇異的生物在各處出沒，當然還有更加古怪的奇人異士。那麼，揮舞起約翰那久經「烤驗」的煎鍋，在小珊神祕力量的指引下，開始一場深入未知的冒險吧！

en.name: The Room Three
en.short_description: Lured to a remote island, you find yourself confined within the rooms of an ominous mansion. You must draw upon all your puzzle-solving ability to navigate a series of trials devised by a mysterious figure known only as “The Craftsman”. Do you have what it takes to escape?

tc.name: The Room Three
tc.short_description: Lured to a remote island, you find yourself confined within the rooms of an ominous mansion. You must draw upon all your puzzle-solving ability to navigate a series of trials devised by a mysterious figure known only as “The Craftsman”. Do you have what it takes to escape?

en.name: Alien Swarm: Reactive Drop
en.short_description: Co-operative top-down shooter game available for free. An epic bug hunt featuring a unique blend of co-op play and squad-level tactics.

tc.name: Alien Swarm: Reactive Drop
tc.short_description: 一款免費的第三人稱上帝視角射擊遊戲。在面對兇猛的外星蟲群下，IAF小隊將使用不同等級的武器裝備，運用各種混合戰術去消滅它們。

en.name: Football Manager 2022
en.short_description: The closest thing to real football management. FM22 brings new, progressive ways to find your winning edge, instill your footballing style and earn it on the pitch.

tc.name: Football Manager 2022
tc.short_description: 最貼近真實足球經理的體驗。《FM22》迎來創新功能，讓你尋找致勝的關鍵，實現你的球風，贏得全場喝采。

en.name: Supraland
en.short_description: Try the demo! A mix between Portal, Zelda and Metroid. Exploration, puzzles, terrible combat, secret upgrades and new abilities that help you reach new places. Playtime 12-25h.

tc.name: Supraland
tc.short_description: 先玩看看試玩版吧! 混合了傳送門、薩爾達和銀河戰士。探索、尋找隱藏的升級道具，解開謎題、擊敗怪獸或是尋找新的能力幫助你到達新的地區。

en.name: Deus Ex: Game of the Year Edition
en.short_description: The year is 2052 and the world is a dangerous and chaotic place. Terrorists operate openly - killing thousands; drugs, disease and pollution kill even more. The world's economies are close to collapse and the gap between the insanely wealthy and the desperately poor grows ever wider.

tc.name: Deus Ex: Game of the Year Edition
tc.short_description: The year is 2052 and the world is a dangerous and chaotic place. Terrorists operate openly - killing thousands; drugs, disease and pollution kill even more. The world's economies are close to collapse and the gap between the insanely wealthy and the desperately poor grows ever wider.

en.name: WAKFU
en.short_description: Immerse yourself in the WAKFU universe with this free to play MMORPG. Select your class, travel the world, meet adventurers to challenge powerful monsters in epic turn-based battles.Participate in the kingdom’s economy and politics and create your own legend!

tc.name: WAKFU
tc.short_description: Immerse yourself in the WAKFU universe with this free to play MMORPG. Select your class, travel the world, meet adventurers to challenge powerful monsters in epic turn-based battles.Participate in the kingdom’s economy and politics and create your own legend!

en.name: Mortal Online 2
en.short_description: Step into Nave, a vast fantasy sandbox world with a player-driven economy, persistent housing, and deep crafting systems. Engage in first-person, full-loot PvP combat with other players and perilous foes. Build, explore, and conquer in an unforgiving world. The land is yours—who will you become?

tc.name: Mortal Online 2
tc.short_description: Step into Nave, a vast fantasy sandbox world with a player-driven economy, persistent housing, and deep crafting systems. Engage in first-person, full-loot PvP combat with other players and perilous foes. Build, explore, and conquer in an unforgiving world. The land is yours—who will you become?

en.name: Starship Troopers: Terran Command
en.short_description: Lead the Mobile Infantry in this RTS game set in the Starship Troopers film universe. Balance your army composition with a diverse set of unit types, overcome line-of-sight and line-of-fire challenges through tactical positioning, and use special abilities to smash the Arachnid hordes!

tc.name: Starship Troopers: Terran Command
tc.short_description: Lead the Mobile Infantry in this RTS game set in the Starship Troopers film universe. Balance your army composition with a diverse set of unit types, overcome line-of-sight and line-of-fire challenges through tactical positioning, and use special abilities to smash the Arachnid hordes!

en.name: Tribes of Midgard
en.short_description: A vibrant blend of survival and action RPG for 1-10 players! Craft legendary items, grow your home base and embark on an epic journey through procedural realms to face towering creatures hel-bent on unleashing Ragnarök. Valhalla can wait, Einherjar!

tc.name: Tribes of Midgard
tc.short_description: 生存與動作 RPG 元素的生動融合，可讓 1 至 10 名玩家一同遊玩！製作傳說物品、拓展大本營並踏上一段史詩之旅，在程序生成的國度中面對勢要引發諸神黃昏的龐大敵人。英靈戰士，先別急著返回英靈殿！

en.name: Sven Co-op
en.short_description: Sven Co-op is a co-operative game originally based around Valve Software's Half-Life. In this game players must work together against computer controlled enemies and solve puzzles as a team.

tc.name: Sven Co-op
tc.short_description: Sven Co-op is a co-operative game originally based around Valve Software's Half-Life. In this game players must work together against computer controlled enemies and solve puzzles as a team.

en.name: L.A. Noire
en.short_description: In his fight to climb the ranks and do what's right, LAPD detective Cole Phelps must unravel the truth behind a string of arson attacks, conspiracies, and brutal murders, battling the L.A. underworld and even members of his own department.

tc.name: L.A. Noire
tc.short_description: 在洛杉磯警局警探科爾．菲爾普斯（Cole Phelps）努力晉升、同時糾正社會風氣的同時，他還必須解開一系列縱火攻擊事件、陰謀和凶殘謀殺案的真相，打擊洛杉磯黑暗的一面，甚至還得與他自己所屬部門的同仁對抗。

en.name: Assassin’s Creed® Rogue
en.short_description: Introducing Assassin’s Creed® Rogue, the darkest chapter in the Assassin’s Creed franchise yet. As Shay, you will experience the slow transformation from Assassin to Assassin Hunter. Follow your own creed and set off on an extraordinary journey through New York City, the wild river valley, and far away to the icy cold waters of the North...

tc.name: Assassin’s Creed® Rogue
tc.short_description: Introducing Assassin’s Creed® Rogue, the darkest chapter in the Assassin’s Creed franchise yet. As Shay, you will experience the slow transformation from Assassin to Assassin Hunter. Follow your own creed and set off on an extraordinary journey through New York City, the wild river valley, and far away to the icy cold waters of the North...

en.name: Children of Morta
en.short_description: Children of Morta is a story-driven action RPG game about an extraordinary family of heroes. Lead the Bergsons, with all their flaws and virtues, against the forthcoming Corruption. Will you be able to sacrifice everything to save the ones you care for?

tc.name: Children of Morta
tc.short_description: Children of Morta is a story-driven action RPG game about an extraordinary family of heroes. Lead the Bergsons, with all their flaws and virtues, against the forthcoming Corruption. Will you be able to sacrifice everything to save the ones you care for?

en.name: Little Kitty, Big City
en.short_description: You're a curious little kitty with a big personality, on an adventure to find your way back home. Explore the city, make new friends with stray animals, wear delightful hats, and leave more than a little chaos in your wake. After all, isn't that what cats do best?

tc.name: 小貓咪大城市 Little Kitty, Big City
tc.short_description: 扮演一只個性十足的好奇小貓，踏上尋找回家之路的大冒險！探索這座巨大的城市，結交各色的流浪動物朋友，戴上可愛的帽子裝扮，順便再製造一點小混亂...誰讓搞怪搗蛋是我們貓咪的拿手好戲呢？

en.name: Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War II: Retribution
en.short_description: Command any of the six unique factions in the next standalone expansion of the critically acclaimed Dawn of War real-time strategy franchise. Choose to build a massive army or lead a small squad of elite heroes into battle and experience a single player campaign customized to your favorite race.

tc.name: Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War II: Retribution
tc.short_description: 迎接人氣爆表的即時戰略遊戲《破曉之戰》系列獨立擴充，指揮六種獨特勢力的任一陣營。建立龐大軍團或率領精英小隊殺入戰場，體驗單人玩家戰役，自訂你最愛的種族。上線與敵人一決高下，體驗 41 世紀 的快節奏殘酷戰鬥。

en.name: DRAGON QUEST® XI S: Echoes of an Elusive Age™ - Definitive Edition
en.short_description: The Definitive Edition includes the critically acclaimed DRAGON QUEST XI, plus additional scenarios, orchestral soundtrack, 2D mode and more! Whether you are a longtime fan or a new adventurer, this is the ultimate DQXI experience.

tc.name: 勇者鬥惡龍XI S 尋覓逝去的時光 - Definitive Edition
tc.short_description: Definitive Edition 內含備受讚譽的『勇者鬥惡龍XI』主遊戲，以及額外劇情、管弦樂配樂、2D 模式等等新內容！無論你是老練玩家或新冒險家，都能享受最極致的 DQXI 遊戲體驗。

en.name: Door Kickers: Action Squad
en.short_description: Rescue hostages, disarm bombs and save the day in this old school, side-scroller action game with retro graphics and retro sensibilities. Online and Couch Coop Included.

tc.name: Door Kickers: Action Squad
tc.short_description: 拯救人质、解除炸弹，并拯救这所旧学校。这是一款有着复古的画面和感觉的横版卷轴动作游戏。包含在线游戏和本地合作模式。

en.name: The Room Two
en.short_description: Unique events transport you to the halls of a long-forgotten crypt. The only means of escape lies locked within a stone pedestal, along with a note from your mysterious ally. His words promise assistance, but only serve to entice you into a compelling world of mystery and exploration.

tc.name: The Room Two
tc.short_description: Unique events transport you to the halls of a long-forgotten crypt. The only means of escape lies locked within a stone pedestal, along with a note from your mysterious ally. His words promise assistance, but only serve to entice you into a compelling world of mystery and exploration.

en.name: The Past Within
en.short_description: The Past Within is the new co-op experience from Rusty Lake! Play together with someone you deem trustworthy: one in The Past, the other in The Future. Observe and communicate what you see around you. Solve the puzzles and uncover Albert Vanderboom’s plan.

tc.name: The Past Within
tc.short_description: The Past Within是一款由Rusty Lake新推出的雙人合作遊戲！與你所信賴的朋友一同遊玩：一人存於過去，一人存於未來。和朋友一起交流所觀察到的一切，解決Albert Vanderboom的迷霧與計畫。

en.name: DmC: Devil May Cry
en.short_description: In this retelling of Dante's origin story which is set against a contemporary backdrop, DmC Devil May Cry™ retains the stylish action.

tc.name: DmC: Devil May Cry
tc.short_description: 但丁的故事起源設定在一個當代的背景下，DmC Devil May Cry™ 依然保留了這個系列的標誌性特點：華麗的動作、流暢的戰鬥和自信滿滿的主角，但故事更加深入殘酷和核心的邊緣。

en.name: ELEX
en.short_description: ELEX is a handcrafted action role-playing experience from the award-winning creators of the Gothic series, set in a brand new post-apocalyptic Science Fantasy universe that puts players into a huge seamless game world full of original characters, mutated creatures, deep moral choices and powerful action.

tc.name: ELEX
tc.short_description: ELEX is a handcrafted action role-playing experience from the award-winning creators of the Gothic series, set in a brand new post-apocalyptic Science Fantasy universe that puts players into a huge seamless game world full of original characters, mutated creatures, deep moral choices and powerful action.

en.name: Rogue Legacy
en.short_description: Rogue Legacy is a genealogical rogue-"LITE" where anyone can be a hero. Each time you die, your child will succeed you. Every child is unique. One child might be colorblind, another might be a dwarf with vertigo. But that's OK, because no one is perfect, and you don't have to be to succeed.

tc.name: Rogue Legacy
tc.short_description: Rogue Legacy is a genealogical rogue-"LITE" where anyone can be a hero. Each time you die, your child will succeed you. Every child is unique. One child might be colorblind, another might be a dwarf with vertigo. But that's OK, because no one is perfect, and you don't have to be to succeed.

en.name: Half-Life 2: Episode One
en.short_description: Half-Life 2 has sold over 4 million copies worldwide, and earned over 35 Game of the Year Awards. Episode One is the first in a series of games that reveal the aftermath of Half-Life 2 and launch a journey beyond City 17. Also features two multiplayer games. Half-Life 2 not required.

tc.name: Half-Life 2: Episode One
tc.short_description: 《戰慄時空 2》全球已經銷售超過四百萬套，並贏得超過 35 個「年度遊戲」獎項。Episode One 是《戰慄時空 2》一系列續章的第一幕，帶您開啟遠離 17 號城市的旅程。同時包含了兩個多人遊戲。不需要《戰慄時空 2》。

en.name: Miscreated
en.short_description: Miscreated is a multiplayer online hardcore survival game set in a post-apocalyptic future. You will need to survive against mutants, players, and even mother nature herself.

tc.name: Miscreated
tc.short_description: Miscreated is a multiplayer online hardcore survival game set in a post-apocalyptic future. You will need to survive against mutants, players, and even mother nature herself.

en.name: Hired Ops
en.short_description: Hired Ops is a session-based online shooter dedicated to fierce conflicts between rival mercenary groups battling on a global scale.

tc.name: Hired Ops
tc.short_description: Hired Ops is a session-based online shooter dedicated to fierce conflicts between rival mercenary groups battling on a global scale.

en.name: Nuclear Throne
en.short_description: Nuclear Throne is a post-apocalyptic roguelike-like top-down shooter. Not 'the final hope of humanity' post-apocalyptic, but 'humanity is extinct and mutants and monsters now roam the world' post-apocalyptic. Can you reach the Nuclear Throne?

tc.name: Nuclear Throne
tc.short_description: 《Nuclear Throne》是一款以末世为背景的俯视角肉鸽射击游戏。这可不是那种“人类存亡之战”的末世。在这里，人类早已灭绝，世界沦为变种与怪物的乐园。你能否成功登上核能王座？

en.name: NGU IDLE
en.short_description: NGU Idle is a Free To Play Idle game that's full of weird humor, tons of upgrades and hundreds of hours of content! Try out NGU Idle today and experience the joy of Numbers Going Up!

tc.name: NGU IDLE
tc.short_description: NGU Idle is a Free To Play Idle game that's full of weird humor, tons of upgrades and hundreds of hours of content! Try out NGU Idle today and experience the joy of Numbers Going Up!

tc.name: Duke Nukem Forever
tc.short_description: The King arrives with an arsenal of over-the-top weapons, giant explosions and pure unadulterated fun!

en.name: Gloria Victis: Medieval MMORPG
en.short_description: Gloria Victis is an MMORPG with an emphasis on realism, set in a low-fantasy medieval open world. Enjoy MMO with skill-based non-target combat, open PVP with territory control, deep crafting system and player-driven economy – all that served with beautiful graphics and an immersive atmosphere.

tc.name: Gloria Victis: Medieval MMORPG
tc.short_description: 《Gloria Victis》是一款侧重真实性的开放世界大型多人在线角色扮演游戏，背景设定为略带魔幻风格的中世纪。本游戏战斗系统无目标锁定机制，依赖玩家操作，玩家可在开放式的PVP战斗中争夺领土控制权。游戏的制造系统有深度而无所不包，经济系统由玩家主导，剧情成熟而宏大，画面写实而绚丽，向玩家呈现沉浸式的游戏体验。 游戏有两大阵营：居住在大草原上的自豪的中土人，以及住在寒冷北方又复仇心切的伊斯米尔人。玩家将选择一方加入，然后奔赴战场！

en.name: This Is the Police
en.short_description: This Is the Police is a strategy/adventure game set in a city spiraling the drain. Taking the role of gritty Police Chief Jack Boyd, you'll dive into a deep story of crime and intrigue. Will Jack reach his retirement with a nice stack of bills, or will he end up broken ... or worse?

With a surprisingly deep crafting system” – GamesRadarYou're shipwrecked on an isolated island, a desperate castaway in a total freakshow world. How will you survive?

We don’t like that undead business here in Louisiana…Survive solo or with friends as you look to fulfill your basic needs of food, water and shelter, crafting your own tools and weapons while you secure your camp and face flesh hungry zombies.

en.short_description: Set forth in a co-op roguelite deckbuilder where every choice matters! Craft decks of breathtaking power. Journey alone or with up to three friends. Amp up the firepower of the Outpost that fights with you. This is an FTD game - FPS, Tower Defense, Base Building and much more all at the same time.

en.name: FPS Chess
en.short_description: Battle a friend in this fast paced 1v1 class-based first-person shooter. Chess takes a back-seat to FPS as you win duel after duel and capture the opponent's pieces until you've beaten their king and won the game.

tc.name: FPS Chess
tc.short_description: Battle a friend in this fast paced 1v1 class-based first-person shooter. Chess takes a back-seat to FPS as you win duel after duel and capture the opponent's pieces until you've beaten their king and won the game.

tc.name: Just Shapes & Beats

en.short_description: Build a fortress and try to help your dwarves survive against a deeply generated world. Keep your dwarves happy, grow their community and beware of digging too deeply. The deepest, most intricate simulation of a world that's ever been created.
