On this sorrowful journey, encounter horrific enemies against whom a moment of inattention could be fatal. Overcome these hardships and seek the truth with the help of fallen knights.

tc.name: ENDER LILIES: Quietus of the Knights
tc.short_description: 因「死亡之雨」而毀滅的王國「盡頭之國」，少女莉莉和不死騎士們的故事將在此拉開序幕。在這款橫向卷軸的動作RPG中，請盡情探索充滿悲劇卻又耽美的世界，但小心中途遭遇的強敵可能會使你喪命。跟隨莉莉與夥伴們一同揭穿這個世界的真相吧。

en.name: NEKOPARA Vol. 1
en.short_description: What's NEKOPARA? Why, it's a cat paradise! Kashou Minaduki, the son of a long line of Japanese confection makers moved out to open his own shop "La Soleil" as a patisserie.

tc.name: NEKOPARA Vol. 1
tc.short_description: 水無月嘉祥離開了經營著具有悠久傳統的和菓子老店的老家， 決心以西點師的身分，獨力開一間自己的蛋糕店"La Soleil"。 但是從老家寄來的搬家行李裡頭， 竟然混進了兩隻以前在老家養的人型貓，巧克力與香草。

en.name: Sonic Generations Collection
en.short_description: Celebrate 20 years of Sonic in an all new adventure that delivers a definitive experience to Sonic fans new and old!

tc.name: Sonic Generations Collection
tc.short_description: Celebrate 20 years of Sonic in an all new adventure that delivers a definitive experience to Sonic fans new and old!

en.name: Return of the Obra Dinn
en.short_description: Lost at sea 1803 ~ The good ship Obra Dinn.

tc.name: Return of the Obra Dinn
tc.short_description: 一代良舶奧伯拉丁號 ~ 1803年於海上失蹤

en.name: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl
en.short_description: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl tells a story about survival in the Zone – a very dangerous place, where you fear not only the radiation, anomalies and deadly creatures, but other S.T.A.L.K.E.R.s, who have their own goals and wishes.

tc.name: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl
tc.short_description: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl tells a story about survival in the Zone – a very dangerous place, where you fear not only the radiation, anomalies and deadly creatures, but other S.T.A.L.K.E.R.s, who have their own goals and wishes.

en.name: Amazing Frog?
en.short_description: Amazing Frog? is an openworld, sandbox, physics game. Grand Frog Auto in Swindon, with farting ragdoll frogs.

tc.name: Amazing Frog?
tc.short_description: Amazing Frog? is an openworld, sandbox, physics game. Grand Frog Auto in Swindon, with farting ragdoll frogs.

en.name: Valiant Hearts: The Great War™ / Soldats Inconnus : Mémoires de la Grande Guerre™
en.short_description: Valiant Hearts : The Great War is the story of 4 crossed destinies and a broken love in a world torn apart. Dive into a 2D animated comic book adventure, mixing exploration, action and puzzles. Lost in the middle of the trenches, play as each of the 4 strangers, relive the War and help a young German soldier find his love.

tc.name: Valiant Hearts: The Great War™ / Soldats Inconnus : Mémoires de la Grande Guerre™
tc.short_description: 《英勇之心：偉大戰役》的故事由四位主角的命運交織而成，訴說了一段迫於大環境而顛沛流離的愛情故事。 踏入2D漫畫風動畫世界，同時享受探險、動作和解謎遊戲的樂趣。 玩家可選擇扮演戰壕中的四位角色，重現第一次世界大戰的戰場。這四位陌生人的命運將會互相交錯，並且幫助一位年輕德國士兵找到他的愛人！

en.name: BATTALION: Legacy
en.short_description: BATTALION: Legacy recaptures the core of classic shooters in the final iteration of Battalion 1944. Return to the simple days of playing first person shooters with your friends. Grab your bolt action rifle in 'rifles only' mode or compete in 5v5 Search and Destroy.

tc.name: BATTALION: Legacy
tc.short_description: BATTALION: Legacy recaptures the core of classic shooters in the final iteration of Battalion 1944. Return to the simple days of playing first person shooters with your friends. Grab your bolt action rifle in 'rifles only' mode or compete in 5v5 Search and Destroy.

en.name: 河洛群俠傳 (Ho Tu Lo Shu ： The Books of Dragon)
en.short_description: Ho Tu Lo Shu: The Books of Dragon offers a highly freedom to play in an wuxia style open world. With realistic art style and rich character development, you can explore a vast wuxia world and create your own adventure with the company of various memorable characters.
developers: 香港商河洛互動娛樂股份有限公司

tc.name: 河洛群俠傳 (Ho Tu Lo Shu ： The Books of Dragon)
tc.short_description: 《河洛群俠傳》繼承了河洛高自由度的遊戲特色，首度嘗試無接縫開放世界，寫實且不失美感的武俠畫風和玩法豐富的角色養成系統讓每個玩家都能夠在各色隊友的陪伴下，精心打造一個與眾不同的武林世界。
developers: 香港商河洛互動娛樂股份有限公司

en.name: LEGO® Worlds
en.short_description: Experience a galaxy of Worlds made entirely from LEGO bricks. EXPLORE gigantic landscapes, DISCOVER countless surprises, and CREATE anything you can imagine by building with LEGO bricks.

tc.name: LEGO® Worlds
tc.short_description: 體驗完全由 LEGO 積木構成的宇宙星系。探索巨大的景觀、發現無數的驚喜，並使用 LEGO 積木創造出你所能想像的任何東西。

en.name: NieR Replicant™ ver.1.22474487139...
en.short_description: The upgraded prequel of NieR:Automata. A kind young man sets out with Grimoire Weiss, a strange talking book, to search for the "Sealed verses" in order to save his sister Yonah, who fell terminally ill to the Black Scrawl.

tc.name: NieR Replicant™ ver.1.22474487139...
tc.short_description: 《NieR Replicant ver.1.22474487139...》是以2010年4月發售的《NieR Replicant》為基礎製作的強化版，描寫2017年2月發售的《NieR:Automata》當中的世界是如何形成的故事。

en.name: The Forever Winter
en.short_description: The Forever Winter is a tactical shooter where you and your squad must loot the dead to survive under the shadow of terrifying and gargantuan war machines locked in a never-ending conflict. Millions of deaths later the war continues with our latest update!

tc.name: The Forever Winter
tc.short_description: 《永恒的冬天》是一款合作战术生存恐怖射击游戏。你和小队必须在可怕巨型的战争机器阴影下，在永无止境的冲突中，掠夺死尸， 搏命生存。

en.name: Inside the Backrooms
en.short_description: Inside the Backrooms is a horror multiplayer game mixed with different mechanics that will make you spend an intense night with friends. Explore, think, interact, but be careful, it is rumored that there are several entities wishing to find you...

tc.name: Inside the Backrooms
tc.short_description: Inside the Backrooms is a horror multiplayer game mixed with different mechanics that will make you spend an intense night with friends. Explore, think, interact, but be careful, it is rumored that there are several entities wishing to find you...

en.name: Mon Bazou
en.short_description: Build your crappy vehicle into a race car, install the parts yourself. Make money by cutting wood, racing at night or delivering pizza. Maybe you want to manage a sugar shack or build yourself a big garage?

tc.name: Mon Bazou
tc.short_description: Build your crappy vehicle into a race car, install the parts yourself. Make money by cutting wood, racing at night or delivering pizza. Maybe you want to manage a sugar shack or build yourself a big garage?

en.name: ENDLESS™ Legend
en.short_description: ENDLESS™ Legend is a 4X turn-based fantasy strategy game by the creators of ENDLESS™ Space and Dungeon of the ENDLESS™. Control every aspect of your civilization as you struggle to save your homeworld Auriga. Create your own Legend!

tc.name: 無盡帝國
tc.short_description: 《ENDLESS™ Legend》是一款4X回合制奇幻策略遊戲，由《ENDLESS™ Space》和《Dungeon of the ENDLESS™》創作團隊悉心打造。一手掌控文明大小事，同時奮力營救自己的家園Auriga。打造您的個人傳奇！

en.name: Isonzo
en.short_description: Ferocious Alpine warfare will test your tactical skills in this authentic WW1 FPS. Battle among the scenic peaks, rugged valleys and idyllic towns of northern Italy. The Great War on the Italian Front is brought to life and elevated to unexpected heights!

tc.name: Isonzo
tc.short_description: 兇猛的阿爾卑斯山地戰將考驗你在這個真實一戰 FPS 中的戰術技巧。在義大利北部風景優美的山峰、崎嶇的山谷和田園詩般的城鎮中作戰。將義大利戰線上的偉大戰爭帶到了生活中，並提升到了意想不到的境界！

en.name: Secret Neighbor: Hello Neighbor Multiplayer
en.short_description: Hello Neighbor Multiplayer. Secret Neighbor is a Multiplayer Social Horror Game where a group of intruders try to rescue their friend from the Neighbor's creepy basement. Only problem is one of the intruders is the Neighbor in disguise.

tc.name: Secret Neighbor: Hello Neighbor Multiplayer
tc.short_description: Hello Neighbor Multiplayer. Secret Neighbor is a Multiplayer Social Horror Game where a group of intruders try to rescue their friend from the Neighbor's creepy basement. Only problem is one of the intruders is the Neighbor in disguise.

en.name: Nightingale
en.short_description: Nightingale is an open world survival crafting game, where you’ll adventure across the mysterious and dangerous Fae Realms. As a daring Realmwalker, you’ll defeat monstrous enemies, survive hostile environments, and build elaborate estates in a visually stunning Gaslamp Fantasy world.

tc.name: 夜鶯傳說
tc.short_description: 歡迎來到奧秘與危險並存的妖靈界域，開啟你的生存與冒險之旅！化身無所畏懼的界域行者，獨自或結伴在風光旖旎的維多利亞式奇幻世界探索、製作、建造和戰鬥！

en.name: Dead Space™ 2
en.short_description: Three years after the Necromorph infestation aboard the USS Ishimura, Isaac Clarke awakens from a coma, confused, disoriented, and on a space station called The Sprawl. Explore this world and its zero-g environments to discover the truth about the Unitology and its role in the Necromorph epidemic.

tc.name: Dead Space™ 2
tc.short_description: Three years after the Necromorph infestation aboard the USS Ishimura, Isaac Clarke awakens from a coma, confused, disoriented, and on a space station called The Sprawl. Explore this world and its zero-g environments to discover the truth about the Unitology and its role in the Necromorph epidemic.

en.name: Cosmoteer: Starship Architect & Commander
en.short_description: Design and simulate the starships of your dreams! Command your ship or fleet in epic battles and manage your crew while exploring a dangerous galaxy. Play alone or with friends, test your ships in online PvP, and let your imagination reach for the stars!

tc.name: Cosmoteer: Starship Architect & Commander
tc.short_description: Design and simulate the starships of your dreams! Command your ship or fleet in epic battles and manage your crew while exploring a dangerous galaxy. Play alone or with friends, test your ships in online PvP, and let your imagination reach for the stars!

en.name: A Little to the Left
en.short_description: A Little to the Left is a cozy puzzle game that has you sort, stack, and organize household items into pleasing arrangements while you keep an eye out for a mischievous cat with an inclination for chaos. Check out this playful and intuitive puzzler with 100+ satisfying messes to tidy.

tc.name: A Little to the Left
tc.short_description: 《靠左一些些》是令人舒心的拼圖遊戲，供您將居家物品分類、堆疊和整理，成為賞心悅目的整齊狀態，同時還得留意一隻調皮的貓咪，經常喜歡搞破壞。快來玩這個有趣又直觀的解謎遊戲，有 100 多種混亂場景可以打理，給人滿滿的成就感。

en.name: ABZU
en.short_description: From the art director of Journey®, ABZÛ is a beautiful underwater adventure that evokes the dream of diving. Immerse yourself in a vibrant hidden world bursting with color and life as you descend into the heart of the ocean. But beware as you swim deeper as dangers lurk in the depths.

tc.name: ABZU
tc.short_description: From the art director of Journey®, ABZÛ is a beautiful underwater adventure that evokes the dream of diving. Immerse yourself in a vibrant hidden world bursting with color and life as you descend into the heart of the ocean. But beware as you swim deeper as dangers lurk in the depths.

en.name: Superflight
en.short_description: Superflight is an intense, easy to learn wingsuit game with an infinite number of beautiful procedurally generated maps. A great game to relax for half an hour and chase your latest highscore!

tc.name: Superflight
tc.short_description: Superflight is an intense, easy to learn wingsuit game with an infinite number of beautiful procedurally generated maps. A great game to relax for half an hour and chase your latest highscore!

en.name: Argo
en.short_description: Jump straight into combat in this official standalone FREE total conversion of Arma 3. Argo is a hardcore tactical first-person shooter, in which you fight across unrestricted terrain, and where a single bullet is all it takes. Master your craft to rank up and become (in)famous on the battlefield.

tc.name: Argo
tc.short_description: 在這款改編自 Arma 3 的官方免費獨立遊戲中您可以直接投入戰鬥。Argo 是一款專業的第一人稱戰術射擊遊戲，在遊戲中，您將在毫無限制的戰區作戰，而所要的僅僅是一發子彈。磨煉您的技能，不斷晉升，讓自己的英名（惡名）傳遍戰場。

en.name: Call of Cthulhu®
en.short_description: 1924. Private Investigator Pierce is sent to look into the tragic death of the Hawkins family. Plunge into a world of creeping madness and cosmic horror. Cryptic clues, shadowy figures, and pure terror bar your way as you fight to retain your sanity and solve an otherworldly mystery.

tc.name: Call of Cthulhu®
tc.short_description: 1924. Private Investigator Pierce is sent to look into the tragic death of the Hawkins family. Plunge into a world of creeping madness and cosmic horror. Cryptic clues, shadowy figures, and pure terror bar your way as you fight to retain your sanity and solve an otherworldly mystery.

en.name: The Universim
en.short_description: Jump straight into managing your own planets as you guide a civilization through the ages. Build the ultimate empire in The Universim, a new breed of God Game in development by Crytivo.

tc.name: The Universim
tc.short_description: 現在就開始通過引導一個文明走過數個世紀，來管理您自己的行星吧。成為《宇宙模擬器》中的終極君王，這是由Crytivo全新開發的上帝類遊戲。

en.name: Machinarium
en.short_description: Machinarium is the award-winning independent adventure game developed by the makers of Samorost series, Botanicula and CHUCHEL. Help Josef the robot save his girlfriend Berta kidnapped by the Black Cap Brotherhood gang!

tc.name: 機械迷城 (Machinarium)
tc.short_description: 《機械迷城（Machinarium）》中每個角色都是機器人,包括我們的小英雄,他將為了對付壞人並解救自己的女朋友展開了一系列的解謎，沒有多餘的對白，遊戲情節和線索皆靠細膩的動畫來表現。

en.name: Half-Life 2: Lost Coast
en.short_description: Originally planned as a section of the Highway 17 chapter of Half-Life 2, Lost Coast is a playable technology showcase that introduces High Dynamic Range lighting to the Source engine.

tc.name: Half-Life 2: Lost Coast
tc.short_description: 《Lost Coast》原本企劃做為《戰慄時空 2》中「17 號高速公路」遊戲章節的一部分，現在則是導入 Source 引擎所加入的高動態範圍光源之技術展示遊戲。

en.name: Backpack Battles
en.short_description: A PvP inventory management auto battler! Buy and craft powerful items, then carefully arrange them in your backpack.

tc.name: 背包亂鬥 Backpack Battles
tc.short_description: 這是一款 PVP 背包物品管理自動戰鬥遊戲！購買和製作稀有物品，仔細擺放，打造強力組合，使用背包跟其他玩家激烈對戰。

en.name: Choo-Choo Charles
en.short_description: Navigate an open-world island in an old train, upgrade it over time, and use it to fight an evil spider train named Charles.

tc.name: Choo-Choo Charles
tc.short_description: 駕駛一輛老火車遍遊一座開放世界島嶼，在過程中升級這輛火車，並用它來對抗名叫查爾斯的邪惡蜘蛛火車。

en.name: The Forgotten City
en.short_description: The Forgotten City is a narrative-driven time loop adventure in ancient Rome. Discover the ruins of an ancient underground city, travel 2000 years into the past, and unravel the mystery of who destroyed it by cleverly exploiting the power to wind back time. The fate of the city is in your hands.

tc.name: The Forgotten City
tc.short_description: 穿越到 2,000 年前，重溫受詛咒的羅馬城最後的歲月，在這裡只要有一人犯罪，所有人都得陪葬。玩家必須利用致命的時間輪迴、向當地人詢問情報、探索並解開謎題，揭開這座城市核心的謎團。羅馬城的命運就掌握在您手中。

en.name: Unheard - Voices of Crime
en.short_description: What if you could hear every word spoken at the scene of a crime? “Acoustic Detectives” wanted for testing our new device! Return aurally to crime scenes and use the voices you hear to identify potential suspects and solve the mysteries. What is it that’s connecting these seemingly unrelated cases?

tc.name: 疑案追聲
tc.short_description: 如果有一種技術，能夠收集來自案發現場的聲音，那就可以輕易找出幕後黑手，解開神秘懸案。但是，用聲音來推理，遠比想象中要困難。為此，我們在為系統尋找合適的使用者——“聲探”！請你回到案發現場，利用聲音跟蹤每個人的行動，告訴我們，在這些看似毫不相關的案件下，是否還隱藏著一個終極秘密。

en.name: WWE 2K22
en.short_description: NOTE: All multiplayer servers for WWE 2K22 will be shutdown as of 12/31/2023. After that time, all game functions requiring online servers will no longer function.

tc.name: WWE 2K22
tc.short_description: 注意：所有《WWE 2K22》的多人遊戲伺服器將於 2023/12/31 關閉。之後所有需要在線伺服器的功能將無法使用。

en.name: 嗜血印 Bloody Spell
en.short_description: This is a martial arts action role-playing game. The core of the game is battle-oriented, and it combines many fighting elements. If you are a player who pursues blood and is brave enough to challenge the limits, it will definitely inspire your adrenaline and bring you the best combat experience.

tc.name: 嗜血印 Bloody Spell
tc.short_description: This is a martial arts action role-playing game. The core of the game is battle-oriented, and it combines many fighting elements. If you are a player who pursues blood and is brave enough to challenge the limits, it will definitely inspire your adrenaline and bring you the best combat experience.

en.name: Salt and Sanctuary
en.short_description: Explore a haunting, punishing island in this stylized 2D action RPG. Salt and Sanctuary combines fast and brutal 2D combat with richly developed RPG mechanics in a cursed realm of forgotten cities, blood-soaked dungeons, and desecrated monuments.

tc.name: Salt and Sanctuary
tc.short_description: Explore a haunting, punishing island in this stylized 2D action RPG. Salt and Sanctuary combines fast and brutal 2D combat with richly developed RPG mechanics in a cursed realm of forgotten cities, blood-soaked dungeons, and desecrated monuments.

en.name: Stronghold Crusader 2
en.short_description: Stronghold Crusader 2 is the long awaited sequel to the original castle sim. After 12 years Stronghold returns to the desert with a new 3D engine and powerful Havok Physics. Crusader 2 recaptures the original game’s addictive, fast-paced gameplay and authentic castle simulation.

tc.name: Stronghold Crusader 2
tc.short_description: Stronghold Crusader 2 is the long awaited sequel to the original castle sim. After 12 years Stronghold returns to the desert with a new 3D engine and powerful Havok Physics. Crusader 2 recaptures the original game’s addictive, fast-paced gameplay and authentic castle simulation.

en.name: Atomic Heart
en.short_description: In a mad and sublime utopian world, take part in explosive encounters. Adapt your fighting style to each opponent, use your environment and upgrade your equipment to fulfill your mission. If you want to reach the truth, you'll have to pay in blood.

tc.name: 原子之心
tc.short_description: 歡迎進入美妙瘋狂的烏托邦世界。生死之戰，一觸即發。針對獨特敵人制定最佳戰術，升級裝備，利用環境條件完成任務。想要揭開真相？那就做好流血的準備吧！

en.name: Shop Titans
en.short_description: Shop Titans is the ultimate RPG shopkeeper simulation. Craft powerful equipment, stock your shop and sell to aspiring heroes… at a markup! Hire heroes and explore dungeons to gather valuable materials to craft with. There’s never a dull moment in the world of Shop Titans!

tc.name: 傳奇商店
tc.short_description: 沉浸於在3D遊戲環境中，踏上冒險旅程，建造和自訂一間商店吧！經由製作史詩般的武器和配件來賺取獎勵，成為大亨。替商品訂個好價格、附加額外費用，或是拒絕交易！打造裝扮屬於你的獨一無二的英雄，並帶領他們開始新的冒險！

en.name: Danganronpa 2: Goodbye Despair
en.short_description: Jabberwock Island—You and your classmates were ready for fun in the sun until Monokuma returned to restart his murderous game! Trapped in a kill-or-be-killed situation, your only hope rests in solving the island’s mysteries.

tc.name: 超級槍彈辯駁2 再會了絕望學園
tc.short_description: Jabberwock Island—You and your classmates were ready for fun in the sun until Monokuma returned to restart his murderous game! Trapped in a kill-or-be-killed situation, your only hope rests in solving the island’s mysteries.

en.name: Virtual Cottage
en.short_description: Virtual Cottage gives you a comfy place to rest and be productive without any distractions. Open the game, set yourself a goal and enjoy the atmosphere.

tc.name: Virtual Cottage
tc.short_description: Virtual Cottage gives you a comfy place to rest and be productive without any distractions. Open the game, set yourself a goal and enjoy the atmosphere.

en.name: F.E.A.R. 3
en.short_description: F.E.A.R. 3 delivers all the hallmarks that define the F.E.A.R. brand: terrifying paranormal experience, frenetic combat and a dramatic storyline.

tc.name: F.E.A.R. 3
tc.short_description: 《F.E.A.R. 3》囊括所有《F.E.A.R.》系列的重點特色：駭人的異常體驗、瘋狂的戰鬥與高潮迭起的劇情。

en.name: Living With Sister: Monochrome Fantasy
en.short_description: When your father goes off on an adventure, it's up to you to keep the lights on and take care of your sister.

tc.name: 妹相隨～黑白世界的繽紛冒險～
tc.short_description: When your father goes off on an adventure, it's up to you to keep the lights on and take care of your sister.

en.name: Nova Drift
en.short_description: Nova Drift distills the mechanical depth and strategy of an ARPG into classic arcade space combat. Control an endlessly evolving bio-mechanical ship, face legions of strange and deadly foes, and ride the wake of a dying star across the void.

tc.name: Nova Drift
tc.short_description: Nova Drift 萃取出 ARPG 中的機制深度與策略，加入到經典的太空作戰街機遊戲之中。　你將操作一台無限演化的生物力學飛船，面對千奇百怪而致命的敵機軍團，並乘著垂死恆星的波動深入虛空之中。

en.name: Project CARS 2
en.short_description: THE ULTIMATE DRIVER JOURNEY! Project CARS 2 delivers the soul of motor racing in the world’s most beautiful, authentic, and technically-advanced racing game.

tc.name: Project CARS 2
tc.short_description: 終極車手之旅 《Project CARS 2》是一款全球最美麗、最逼真，技術最先進的賽車遊戲，為玩家獻上貨真價實的專業賽車手體驗。你可以體驗多樣化的比賽種類、登峰造極的賽車技術、根據動態變化即時改變的賽道等等，豐富的遊戲模式。

en.name: Streets of Rogue
en.short_description: Fight, sneak, and hack your way through randomly generated cities. It's like Nuclear Throne meets Deus Ex, mixed with the anarchy of GTA. Rogue-lite meets immersive sim, and goes completely insane.

tc.name: Streets of Rogue
tc.short_description: Fight, sneak, and hack your way through randomly generated cities. It's like Nuclear Throne meets Deus Ex, mixed with the anarchy of GTA. Rogue-lite meets immersive sim, and goes completely insane.

en.name: Red Dead Redemption
en.short_description: Experience the story of former outlaw John Marston as he tracks down the last remaining members of the notorious Van der Linde Gang in the PC debut of the critically acclaimed predecessor to Red Dead Redemption 2.

tc.name: Red Dead Redemption
tc.short_description: 這款廣受好評的 Red Dead Redemption 2 前作首度登陸 PC。親身體驗昔日亡命之徒約翰．瑪斯頓的故事，並隨著這個角色一起追殺惡名昭彰的范特林幫的殘存成員。

en.name: Baba Is You
en.short_description: Baba Is You is a puzzle game where the rules you have to follow are present as blocks you can interact with. By manipulating them, you can change how the game works, repurpose things you find in the levels and cause surprising interactions!

tc.name: Baba Is You
tc.short_description: 《Baba Is You》是一款益智遊戲，玩家必須遵循的規則都以方塊的形式呈現，且玩家可以和這些方塊互動。只要操控這些方塊，就能改變遊戲的運作方式，重新定義關卡中各種物體的意義，並創造出意想不到的互動！

en.name: Crucible Beta
en.short_description: Crucible is a free-to-play team-based PvP action shooter. Pick an alien, human, or robot hunter to fight in 4v4 matches.

tc.name: Crucible Beta
tc.short_description: Crucible is a free-to-play team-based PvP action shooter. Pick an alien, human, or robot hunter to fight in 4v4 matches.

en.name: Kingdom Heroes 8
en.short_description: The " Kingdom Heroes" series is a classic horizontal battle single-player game developed by Userjoy, which has been released seven generations since 1998. The latest sequel, " Kingdom Heroes 8", will feature a new look and exciting battles, interpreting the magnificent era of the Three Kingdoms.

tc.name: 三國群英傳8
tc.short_description: 《三國群英傳》系列是宇峻奧汀開發的經典橫向戰鬥視角單機遊戲，由1998年至今，已推出七部單機作品。 2007年推出《三國群英傳VII》後一直沒有單機續作問世，最新續作《三國群英傳 8》將以全新面貌，激昂的戰鬥，詮釋恢弘的三國群英爭霸時代。

en.name: Rise of Nations: Extended Edition
en.short_description: Rise of Nations is back! Play the updated classic with full Steamworks integration and enhanced features!

tc.name: Rise of Nations: Extended Edition
tc.short_description: Rise of Nations is back! Play the updated classic with full Steamworks integration and enhanced features!

en.name: Rising Storm 2: Vietnam
en.short_description: Red Orchestra Series' take on Vietnam: 64-player MP matches; 20+ maps; US Army & Marines, PAVN/NVA, NLF/VC; Australians and ARVN forces; 50+ weapons; 4 flyable helicopters; mines, traps and tunnels; Brutal. Authentic. Gritty. Character customization. And napalm in the morning.

tc.name: Rising Storm 2: Vietnam
tc.short_description: Red Orchestra Series' take on Vietnam: 64-player MP matches; 20+ maps; US Army & Marines, PAVN/NVA, NLF/VC; Australians and ARVN forces; 50+ weapons; 4 flyable helicopters; mines, traps and tunnels; Brutal. Authentic. Gritty. Character customization. And napalm in the morning.

en.name: UBOAT
en.short_description: UBOAT is a simulator of a submarine from WWII era. It is a survival sandbox with crew management mechanics while its primary theme is life of German sailors. The boat is their home, but it can become their grave at any time.

tc.name: UBOAT
tc.short_description: UBOAT is a simulator of a submarine from WWII era. It is a survival sandbox with crew management mechanics while its primary theme is life of German sailors. The boat is their home, but it can become their grave at any time.

en.name: Divinity: Original Sin (Classic)
en.short_description: Gather your party and get ready for a new, back-to-the-roots RPG adventure! Discuss your decisions with companions; fight foes in turn-based combat; explore an open world and interact with everything and everyone you see. Join up with a friend to play online in co-op and make your own adventures with the powerful RPG toolkit.

tc.name: Divinity: Original Sin (Classic)
tc.short_description: Gather your party and get ready for a new, back-to-the-roots RPG adventure! Discuss your decisions with companions; fight foes in turn-based combat; explore an open world and interact with everything and everyone you see. Join up with a friend to play online in co-op and make your own adventures with the powerful RPG toolkit.

en.name: Battle Brothers
en.short_description: Lead a mercenary company in this tactical RPG set in a medieval fantasy world. Chase fame and fortune as you choose where to go, who to recruit, which contracts to pursue, and how to train and equip your men in a procedurally generated open world campaign.

tc.name: 戰場兄弟 Battle Brothers
tc.short_description: 在這款戰術RPG遊戲中，你將進入一個逼真的中世紀幻想世界，帶領你的雇傭兵團。在這個隨機變幻莫測的殘酷世界里，兵團將去往何處、戰隊要雇傭何人、接受怎樣的合同、如何訓練和裝備戰隊等等，一切興衰存亡都將由你裁定。

en.name: Resident Evil 0
en.short_description: Before the mansion, before the destruction of Raccoon City, there was Resident Evil 0. Now remastered with improved visuals and sounds, as well as the all-new Wesker Mode, there's never been a better time to experience the origins of the Resident Evil story.

tc.name: Resident Evil 0
tc.short_description: 重製版之Resident Evil 0包括令人驚嘆的HD畫面、可選擇之現代化控制及更多的新元素。

en.name: My Time at Sandrock
en.short_description: Travel to the desert community of Sandrock and take on the role of a fledgling Builder. Use your trusty toolset to gather resources, construct machines, and turn your run-down workshop into a well-oiled production facility to save the town from the jaws of economic ruin!

tc.name: My Time at Sandrock
tc.short_description: 荒漠小城沙石鎮誠摯而迫切地邀請您約上好友，一起建設美好家園，通過經營工坊讓沙石鎮重返往日繁華，同時收穫到親情友情甚至是愛情。

en.name: Game Dev Tycoon
en.short_description: In Game Dev Tycoon you replay the history of the gaming industry by starting your own video game development company in the 80s. Create best selling games. Research new technologies and invent new game types. Become the leader of the market and gain worldwide fans.

tc.name: Game Dev Tycoon
tc.short_description: In Game Dev Tycoon you replay the history of the gaming industry by starting your own video game development company in the 80s. Create best selling games. Research new technologies and invent new game types. Become the leader of the market and gain worldwide fans.

en.name: The Test
en.short_description: You will answer a series of questions that will reveal truths from deep within. These questions may make you uncomfortable, but with great knowledge comes great sacrifice. Can you make it all the way through The Test, and if you do, are you sure you want the answers you seek?

tc.name: The Test
tc.short_description: You will answer a series of questions that will reveal truths from deep within. These questions may make you uncomfortable, but with great knowledge comes great sacrifice. Can you make it all the way through The Test, and if you do, are you sure you want the answers you seek?

en.name: Undisputed
en.short_description: Become Undisputed in the most authentic boxing game to date! Featuring true to life visuals, bone-jarring action, and more licensed boxers than ever before, Undisputed gives you unprecedented control to master every inch of the ring.

tc.name: Undisputed
tc.short_description: Become Undisputed in the most authentic boxing game to date! Featuring true to life visuals, bone-jarring action, and more licensed boxers than ever before, Undisputed gives you unprecedented control to master every inch of the ring.

en.name: Train Simulator Classic
en.short_description: The ultimate railway hobby for more than 15 years! From historic steam locomotives to modern high-speed and heavy freight trains, and routes around the world, Train Simulator Classic is the simulation made by railfans for railfans.

tc.name: Train Simulator Classic
tc.short_description: The ultimate railway hobby for more than 15 years! From historic steam locomotives to modern high-speed and heavy freight trains, and routes around the world, Train Simulator Classic is the simulation made by railfans for railfans.

en.name: Chrono Ark
en.short_description: Chrono Ark is a singleplayer roguelike that combines elements from deckbuilders and party-based RPGs. Recruit, train, and build a team of unique Investigators to restore the Twisted World!

tc.name: 超時空方舟
tc.short_description: 超時空方舟是一款混合了組隊RPG、卡牌構築、Roguelike要素於一體的單機遊戲。通過招募擁有特殊能力的隊員並學習各種技能，組成最強的隊伍，最終拯救扭曲的世界。

en.name: Sifu
en.short_description: Sifu is a realistic third-person brawler with tight Kung Fu combat mechanics and cinematic martial arts action embarking you on a path for revenge.

tc.name: Sifu
tc.short_description: 《Sifu》是一款寫實風格的第三人稱格鬥遊戲，緊湊的功夫戰鬥系統與電影式的武打動作體驗，將帶領你踏上復仇的征途。

en.name: Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon® Breakpoint
en.short_description: Become a Ghost, fighting against a rogue spec ops faction called the Wolves, in the latest Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon®!

tc.name: Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon® Breakpoint
tc.short_description: 在最新的《火線獵殺》中成為魅影，與叛變的特種部隊陣營「影狼」決一死戰！

en.name: Far Cry® 2
en.short_description: You are a gun for hire, trapped in a war-torn African state, stricken with malaria and forced to make deals with corrupt warlords on both sides of the conflict in order to make this country your home. You must identify and exploit your enemies' weaknesses, neutralizing their superior numbers and firepower with surprise, subversion,...

tc.name: Far Cry® 2
tc.short_description: You are a gun for hire, trapped in a war-torn African state, stricken with malaria and forced to make deals with corrupt warlords on both sides of the conflict in order to make this country your home. You must identify and exploit your enemies' weaknesses, neutralizing their superior numbers and firepower with surprise, subversion,...

en.name: Quantum Break
en.short_description: From Remedy Entertainment, the masters of cinematic action games, comes Quantum Break, a time-amplified suspenseful blockbuster. The Quantum Break experience is part game, part live action show—where decisions in one dramatically affect the other.

tc.name: Quantum Break
tc.short_description: 繼電影般的動作遊戲之後，Remedy Entertainment推出全新力作「Quantum Break」。這款精彩的遊戲大作，透過融合電玩與真人影集，讓操弄時間的動作場面和懸疑的故事劇情在玩家眼前上演。

en.name: Evil West
en.short_description: A dark menace consumes the Old West. In solo or coop, fight with style in visceral, explosive combat against bloodthirsty monstrosities. Eradicate the vampiric hordes with your lightning-fueled gauntlet and become a Wild West Superhero.

tc.name: Evil West
tc.short_description: 黑暗的威脅吞噬了舊西部。單打獨鬥或合力作戰，在血肉橫飛的驚爆戰鬥中對抗嗜血的怪物。用注滿閃電威能的鐵手套殲滅成群的吸血鬼，成為狂野西部的超級英雄。

en.name: Learn to Fly 3
en.short_description: Build your spaceship from scratch, earn funds and invest them into building a bigger, better spaceship as you try and fly your way up to space!

tc.name: Learn to Fly 3
tc.short_description: Build your spaceship from scratch, earn funds and invest them into building a bigger, better spaceship as you try and fly your way up to space!

en.name: The Day Before
en.short_description: The Day Before offers players a uniquely reimagined journey into post-apocalyptic open-world MMO survival set in the present day on the US East Coast following a deadly pandemic.

tc.name: The Day Before
tc.short_description: 《The Day Before》為玩家提供了一個經過重新構想的獨特末世後開放世界 MMO 遊戲生存之旅，背景設定為一場致命疫情後的美國東海岸。

en.name: GROUND BRANCH
en.short_description: From one of the developers behind the original Rainbow Six® and Ghost Recon® games, comes a thinking-man's first-person shooter featuring in-depth character and weapon customization. Take your time. Think ahead. Get the job done.

tc.name: GROUND BRANCH
tc.short_description: From one of the developers behind the original Rainbow Six® and Ghost Recon® games, comes a thinking-man's first-person shooter featuring in-depth character and weapon customization. Take your time. Think ahead. Get the job done.

en.name: Breathedge
en.short_description: Survive in outer space! Together with your immortal chicken, discover the truth behind your sudden spaceship crash. Craft tools, pilot vehicles, and even control space stations to survive and explore the wreckage.

tc.name: 呼吸边缘
tc.short_description: Survive in outer space! Together with your immortal chicken, discover the truth behind your sudden spaceship crash. Craft tools, pilot vehicles, and even control space stations to survive and explore the wreckage.

en.name: Sands of Salzaar
en.short_description: Bringing you to an exotic desert where you’ll recruit, train, and guide your troops into battle against rival cities and factions. Embark on an adventure that’s uniquely yours; Customizable characters, professions, and factions. The land is filled with a variety of hidden secrets.

tc.name: 部落与弯刀 Sands of Salzaar
tc.short_description: 這是一款帶著异域沙漠色彩的開放世界角色扮演遊戲。日蝕戰爭後，整片大地陷入黑暗與混亂，你可以在這個世界中扮演各種角色，用你自己的管道來决定世界的走向。

en.name: CrossCode
en.short_description: A retro-inspired 2D Action RPG set in the distant future. CrossCode combines 16-bit SNES-style graphics with butter-smooth physics, a fast-paced combat system, and engaging puzzle mechanics, served with a gripping sci-fi story.

tc.name: CrossCode
tc.short_description: A retro-inspired 2D Action RPG set in the distant future. CrossCode combines 16-bit SNES-style graphics with butter-smooth physics, a fast-paced combat system, and engaging puzzle mechanics, served with a gripping sci-fi story.

en.name: FAR: Lone Sails
en.short_description: Traverse a dried-out seabed littered with the remains of a decaying civilization. Keep your unique vessel going, overcome numerous obstacles and withstand the hazardous weather conditions. How far can you make it? What will you find?

tc.name: FAR: Lone Sails
tc.short_description: 在散佈著衰落文明遺跡的乾涸海床上穿行。讓自己獨特的小車不斷前行，克服重重的障礙，抵禦危險的天氣。你能行多遠？你能找到什麼？

en.name: Torchlight III
en.short_description: In Torchlight III, Novastraia is again under threat of invasion and it’s up to you to defend against the Netherim and its allies. Gather your wits and brave the frontier to find fame, glory, and new adventures!

tc.name: Torchlight III
tc.short_description: 《火炬之光 2》的事件已經過去了一個世紀，燼石帝國進入衰退期。在《火炬之光 3》中，諾瓦特拉亞再一次陷入遭到侵略的危機之中，你必須挺身而出抵擋冥裔和它們的幫兇。打起十二分精神，勇敢地在前線中戰鬥，贏取聲望、榮譽，並體驗新的冒險！

en.name: eFootball PES 2021 SEASON UPDATE
en.short_description: Celebrate 25 years of PES with the eFootball PES 2021 Season Update* - available at a special anniversary price!

tc.name: eFootball PES 2021 SEASON UPDATE
tc.short_description: eFootball PES 2021 Season Update*伴你歡慶PES系列25週年 - 特別紀念優惠價！

en.name: My Friend Pedro
en.short_description: My Friend Pedro is a violent ballet about friendship, imagination, and one man’s struggle to obliterate anyone in his path at the behest of a sentient banana.

tc.name: My Friend Pedro
tc.short_description: 我的朋友佩德羅是一場關於友情、幻想的血色芭蕾，講述了一個男人如何在一個會說話的香蕉的引導下人擋殺人、佛擋殺佛

en.name: Call of Duty®: Modern Warfare®
en.short_description: Experience a visceral Campaign or assemble your team in the ultimate online playground with multiple Special Ops challenges and a mix of Multiplayer maps and modes.

tc.name: Call of Duty®: Modern Warfare®
tc.short_description: 体验激动人心的剧情战役，或组队踏入终极在线战场，其中包含多个特别行动、多人地图及模式。

en.name: The WereCleaner
en.short_description: Kyle is a Janitor. He's also a Werewolf. And now he's got the night shift. Try not to kill anyone while working to get your paycheck - in a stealth-comedy game with surprises around every corner.

tc.name: The WereCleaner
tc.short_description: Kyle is a Janitor. He's also a Werewolf. And now he's got the night shift. Try not to kill anyone while working to get your paycheck - in a stealth-comedy game with surprises around every corner.

en.name: Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader
en.short_description: Made in a close partnership with Games Workshop, Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader is a story-rich classical RPG from Owlcat Games, developers of the critically acclaimed game, Pathfinder: Wrath of the Righteous.

tc.name: Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader
tc.short_description: Made in a close partnership with Games Workshop, Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader is a story-rich classical RPG from Owlcat Games, developers of the critically acclaimed game, Pathfinder: Wrath of the Righteous.

en.name: A Total War Saga: THRONES OF BRITANNIA
en.short_description: From the multi-award-winning strategy series, A Total War Saga: Thrones of Britannia combines huge real-time battles with engrossing turn-based campaign, set at a critical flashpoint in history. Anglo-Saxons, Gaelic clans and Viking settlers clash for control. What Kingdom will you build?

tc.name: 全軍破敵傳奇：不列顛王座
tc.short_description: 榮獲多項大獎的戰略遊戲系列《Total War》推出全新作品《A Total War Saga: Thrones of Britannia》結合規模浩大的即時戰鬥與引人入勝的回合制戰役，並以歷史上一大關鍵緊張時刻為背景。盎格魯薩克遜人、蓋爾氏族與維京開拓者互不相讓，角逐統治地位。您會打造出什麼樣的王國呢？

en.name: Monster Hunter Stories 2: Wings of Ruin
en.short_description: A new adventure awaits you in this second installment of the turn-based RPG series set in the world of Monster Hunter! Become a Rider and form bonds with friendly monsters known as Monsties to fight alongside them as you take part in an epic story.

tc.name: Monster Hunter Stories 2: 破滅之翼
tc.short_description: 《MONSTER HUNTER STORIES》是一款RPG遊戲，玩家將會成為與魔物建立羈絆、加以培育並與之共存的「騎士」，在「Monster Hunter」的世界中冒險。本作為系列第二彈，有關羈絆的全新故事將會揭開帷幕。

en.name: Armello
en.short_description: Armello is a grim fairy-tale board game come to life, with every match combining deep, tactical card play, rich tabletop strategy and RPG elements. Leverage subterfuge, spells and careful strategy to wrangle control of the game's chaotic odds as you quest for the throne.

tc.name: Armello
tc.short_description: 愛門羅是一款嚴肅且風格奇幻，栩栩如生的棋盤遊戲。充滿著虛張聲勢並結合了深度策略的冒險，戰術性紙牌行動，豐富的棋盤策略與RPG要素。進行史詩般單人模式或多人對戰模式，施放咒術，雇用特務，並且準備好毒藥與計謀來追求寶座任務吧！

en.name: Little Misfortune
en.short_description: Led by her new friend, Mr. Voice, Misfortune ventures into the woods, where mysteries are unraveled and a little bad luck unfolds.

tc.name: Little Misfortune
tc.short_description: Led by her new friend, Mr. Voice, Misfortune ventures into the woods, where mysteries are unraveled and a little bad luck unfolds.

en.name: LOCKDOWN Protocol
en.short_description: A first person social deduction game, combining real time action and communication, playable up to 16 players. While most players will cooperate to complete objectives to ensure victory, a small portion of dissidents will try their best to stop them at all cost, without being caught.

tc.name: LOCKDOWN Protocol
tc.short_description: A first person social deduction game, combining real time action and communication, playable up to 16 players. While most players will cooperate to complete objectives to ensure victory, a small portion of dissidents will try their best to stop them at all cost, without being caught.

en.name: Assetto Corsa EVO
en.short_description: Assetto Corsa EVO redefines the realism and features of one of the most popular multiplatform driving simulations ever developed. Featuring cars and tracks from different classes spanning across years of motoring history.

tc.name: 《神力科莎出賽準備：進化》Assetto Corsa EVO
tc.short_description: 《神力科莎出賽準備：進化》重新定義了這款業界高人氣多平台駕駛模擬遊戲的真實性和特色。本作擁有跨越多年汽車歷史的不同級別名車和賽道。

en.name: Injustice™ 2
en.short_description: Build and power up the ultimate version of your favourite DC legends in INJUSTICE 2. This is your Legend. Your Journey. Your Injustice.

tc.name: Injustice™ 2
tc.short_description: 在 INJUSTICE 2 建立並啟動您最愛的 DC 傳奇終極版。這是您的傳奇、您的旅程、您的不義。

en.name: VillageRhapsody
en.short_description: Farming, logging, fishing, farm role-playing games to help widows and wives improve their lives

tc.name: 乡村狂想曲
tc.short_description: 一款休閒種地、伐木、釣魚、幫助寡婦人妻改善生活的遊戲

en.name: Crime Scene Cleaner
en.short_description: Once you get tangled with the mob, you will forever be a part of the mob. At least they pay a decent salary and all you have to do is clean up after their dirty work, but you know what you’re doing. So clean crime scenes, earn as much money as you can, and get ready for the next mission.

tc.name: Crime Scene Cleaner
tc.short_description: 一旦被黑道牽扯上，你就永遠擺脫不了。好在他們薪水還算不錯，你只需要幫他們善後，不過這些你都駕輕就熟。清理犯罪現場，賺取更多報酬，為下一個任務做好準備吧。

en.name: Tiny Bunny
en.short_description: Tiny Bunny is a non-linear horror visual novel. Those, who have heard the voice of the forest, are beyond help.

tc.name: Tiny Bunny
tc.short_description: Tiny Bunny is a non-linear horror visual novel. Those, who have heard the voice of the forest, are beyond help.

en.name: Duck Game
en.short_description: Enter the futuristic year of 1984, an age where ducks run wild in a frantic battle for glory. Blast your friends with Shotguns, Net Guns, Mind Control Rays, Saxophones, Magnet Guns, and much, much more. This is DUCK GAME. Don't blink.

tc.name: Duck Game
tc.short_description: Enter the futuristic year of 1984, an age where ducks run wild in a frantic battle for glory. Blast your friends with Shotguns, Net Guns, Mind Control Rays, Saxophones, Magnet Guns, and much, much more. This is DUCK GAME. Don't blink.

en.name: Naval Action
en.short_description: Or were you deaf or were you blind when you left your two fine legs behind, Or was it sailing on the sea when you got the cannonball to your knee, I too was young and I was slim and I had a leg for every limb, But now I’ve got no legs at all, they were both shot away by a cannonball.

tc.name: Naval Action
tc.short_description: Or were you deaf or were you blind when you left your two fine legs behind, Or was it sailing on the sea when you got the cannonball to your knee, I too was young and I was slim and I had a leg for every limb, But now I’ve got no legs at all, they were both shot away by a cannonball.

en.name: DDNet
en.short_description: Want to play the hardest cooperative 2D platformer ever? Want to finish no map ever? Want to be in pain for hours and cry, getting nothing in return? Come play DDNet with a large community of other sufferers!

tc.name: DDNet
tc.short_description: Want to play the hardest cooperative 2D platformer ever? Want to finish no map ever? Want to be in pain for hours and cry, getting nothing in return? Come play DDNet with a large community of other sufferers!

en.name: Shadows of Doubt
en.short_description: Take on the role of a private investigator in this immersive detective simulator. Solve murders and other crimes in a procedurally generated and persistent city where every NPC lives and breathes their own independent lives. Find the killer quickly… or they will kill again!

tc.name: Shadows of Doubt
tc.short_description: 這是一款沉浸式沙盒偵探潛行遊戲，故事背景是模擬出來的犯罪腐敗城市，具有科幻及黑色電影的風格。化身成為私家調查偵探，進行任務賺取現金，並最終找到連環殺人魔。如果你不抓住對方，那個殺人魔就會再次犯案……

en.name: Crypt of the NecroDancer
en.short_description: Crypt of the NecroDancer is an award winning hardcore roguelike rhythm game. Move to the music and deliver beatdowns to the beat! Groove to the epic Danny Baranowsky soundtrack, or select songs from your own MP3 collection!

tc.name: Crypt of the NecroDancer
tc.short_description: 「《節奏地牢》是一款獲獎的硬派節奏類Rogue遊戲。隨著音樂移動，並跟著節拍進行猛攻。玩家必須按節奏移動，穿越隨機生成的地牢，同時與跳舞的骷髏、僵屍、龍等進行戰鬥，與此同時隨著屢獲殊榮的丹尼·巴拉諾夫斯基（Danny Baranowsky）的原聲帶搖擺起來！你甚至可以在本地合作模式中與朋友組隊！

en.name: Mini Metro
en.short_description: Mini Metro is a strategy simulation game about designing a subway map for a growing city. Draw lines between stations and start your trains running. As new stations open, redraw your lines to keep them efficient. Decide where to use your limited resources. How long can you keep the city moving?

tc.name: Mini Metro
tc.short_description: Mini Metro 是關於在城市規劃中設計地鐵線路的策略模擬遊戲。通過在地鐵站之間連線讓列車通過，還要隨著新地鐵站的建設和開放，不斷調整線路。你需要利用有限的資源做出最好的設計。你的城市地鐵能運營多長時間？

en.name: Escape Simulator
en.short_description: First-person puzzler you can play solo or in an online co-op. Explore a set of highly interactive escape rooms. Move furniture, pick up and examine everything, smash pots and break locks! Play thousands of community-made rooms through the level editor.

tc.name: 密室逃脫模擬器
tc.short_description: 密室逃脫模擬器是一款第一人稱解謎遊戲。你可以單人遊玩，或是線上多人合作（最好是2～3人，但是多一些人也無妨）。探索一個接著一個的互動式密室。你可以移動家具、打碎各種瓶子、解開各種鎖、把你所能看到的東西全部撿起來仔細查看！也支援社區利用關卡編輯器製作的各種密室。

en.name: Wasteland 3
en.short_description: Following the critically acclaimed 2014 Game of the Year winner Wasteland 2, the RPG series that pioneered the post-apocalyptic genre in video games returns with Wasteland 3.

tc.name: Wasteland 3
tc.short_description: Following the critically acclaimed 2014 Game of the Year winner Wasteland 2, the RPG series that pioneered the post-apocalyptic genre in video games returns with Wasteland 3.

en.name: Hitman: Blood Money
en.short_description: Money Talks. Silence Pays. Prepare to Make a Killing. When assassins from Agent 47's contract agency, The ICA, are eliminated in a series of hits, it seems a larger, more powerful agency has entered the fray. Sensing he may be a target, 47 travels to America, and prepares to make a killing.

tc.name: Hitman: Blood Money
tc.short_description: Money Talks. Silence Pays. Prepare to Make a Killing. When assassins from Agent 47's contract agency, The ICA, are eliminated in a series of hits, it seems a larger, more powerful agency has entered the fray. Sensing he may be a target, 47 travels to America, and prepares to make a killing.

en.name: Guild Wars 2®
en.short_description: Guild Wars 2 is an award-winning online roleplaying game with fast-paced action combat, deep character customization, and no subscription fee required. Choose from an arsenal of professions and weapons, explore a vast open world, compete in PVP modes and more. Join over 16 million players now!

tc.name: Guild Wars 2®
tc.short_description: Guild Wars 2 is an award-winning online roleplaying game with fast-paced action combat, deep character customization, and no subscription fee required. Choose from an arsenal of professions and weapons, explore a vast open world, compete in PVP modes and more. Join over 16 million players now!

en.name: DiRT Rally 2.0
en.short_description: DiRT Rally 2.0 dares you to carve your way through a selection of iconic rally locations from across the globe, in the most powerful off-road vehicles ever made, knowing that the smallest mistake could end your stage.

tc.name: DiRT Rally 2.0
tc.short_description: 《DiRT Rally 2.0》讓你能夠挑戰駕駛史上最強大的越野車，在世界各地的一系列經典拉力賽地點中闖出自己的一片天，而稍有不慎就會在這舞台謝幕退場。

en.name: Creativerse
en.short_description: A sandbox adventure game as big as your imagination.

tc.name: Creativerse
tc.short_description: 與你的想像力同樣宏大的冒險旅程。

en.name: Detention
en.short_description: Detention is an atmospheric horror game set in 1960s Taiwan under martial law. Incorporated religious elements based in Taiwanese/Chinese culture and mythology, the game provided players with unique graphics and gaming experience.

tc.name: 返校
tc.short_description: 以一九六零年代的台灣為原型的架空劇情。 獨特的插畫拼貼風格，以及精心編製的原創音樂。 在令人屏息的緊張感中，解開一個又一個秘密。 孤獨的學生，殘酷的校園，以及讓人無力面對的真相。

en.name: The Surge
en.short_description: Welcome to CREO, the megacorporation saving the world! A catastrophic event has knocked you out during the first day on the job… you wake up equipped with a heavy-grade exoskeleton, in a destroyed section of the complex.

tc.name: The Surge
tc.short_description: Welcome to CREO, the megacorporation saving the world! A catastrophic event has knocked you out during the first day on the job… you wake up equipped with a heavy-grade exoskeleton, in a destroyed section of the complex.

en.name: The Red Strings Club
en.short_description: The Red Strings Club is a cyberpunk narrative experience about fate and happiness featuring the extensive use of pottery, bartending and impersonating people on the phone to take down a corporate conspiracy.

tc.name: The Red Strings Club
tc.short_description: 紅弦俱樂部是一款關於命運與幸福的賽博朋克風格游戲，需要玩家運用陶藝、調酒和在電話中模仿他人聲音等手段破解一個驚天秘密。

en.name: Dead Island Definitive Edition
en.short_description: Welcome to the zombie apocalypse experience of a lifetime – and now more beautiful than ever. Caught in the midst of an epic zombie outbreak on the tropical island of Banoi, your only thought is: Survive!

tc.name: Dead Island Definitive Edition
tc.short_description: Welcome to the zombie apocalypse experience of a lifetime – and now more beautiful than ever. Caught in the midst of an epic zombie outbreak on the tropical island of Banoi, your only thought is: Survive!

en.name: Kingdom Rush  - Tower Defense
en.short_description: Get ready for an epic journey to defend your kingdom against hordes of orcs, trolls, evil wizards and other nasty fiends using a vast arsenal of towers and spells at your command!Fight on forests, mountains and wastelands, customizing your defensive strategy with different tower upgrades and specializations!

tc.name: Kingdom Rush  - Tower Defense
tc.short_description: 準備踏上一段史詩之旅，保衛王國，使用各種防禦塔和法術，抵禦成群的獸人和巨魔，還有邪惡的巫師與其他卑鄙的惡魔！在森林、山地和荒野中戰鬥，用不同的防禦塔升級和特技，定制你的防禦戰略！用槍林彈雨對抗敵人，召喚援軍，指揮部隊，招募精靈戰士，正面對抗傳奇怪物，從黑暗力量中拯救王國！遊戲特色： 史詩級防禦戰鬥，讓你沉浸數小時！ 高清畫面與精緻美術！ 指揮你的士兵，看他們展開卡通版肉搏戰！ 8種防禦塔特別升級，可定制你的戰略！這裡有超威野蠻人、奧術巫師、森林遊俠等等。 超過18種防禦塔技能！讓你的巫師召喚土元素，向敵人施變形術！ 超過61種不同的敵人，從哥布林到邪靈，他們都有各自的技能！（小心山巨魔！） 塔防遊戲中前所未有的激烈頭目戰鬥！ 13個英雄：選擇你的勇士，帶領部隊取得勝利！

en.name: Terminator: Resistance
en.short_description: Terminator: Resistance, is a first-person shooter set during the 'Future War' scenario that was only glimpsed at in the iconic films, 'THE TERMINATOR' and 'T2: JUDGMENT DAY'. The machines are destined to lose, but at what cost?

tc.name: Terminator: Resistance
tc.short_description: 體驗導致人類命運最終戰的事件。 《Terminator: Resistance》是前兩部《魔鬼終結者》電影中簡短展示的“未來戰爭”場景中的第一人稱射擊遊戲。

en.name: Dark and Light
en.short_description: Dark and Light is a vast sandbox survival RPG set in a world dominated by powerful elemental forces. Find your way in a meticulously crafted world, featuring breathtaking landscapes, a wide variety of mythical creatures, and limitless possibility to craft, build, and unlock dozens of powerful weapons, spells, and skills.

tc.name: Dark and Light
tc.short_description: 12年情懷力作，借助全新的虛幻4引擎打造的一款沙箱類生存競技魔幻網遊。在這片奇幻的開放世界中，你將獲得無與倫比的感官體驗。神秘詭異的天體氣候系統，廣袤多樣的大世界環境，種類豐富的奇幻生物帶你體驗最驚豔的生存之旅。高自由度建造系統，自訂魔法研習科技，馴養、採集、製作等全方位經營體系，大規模陣營對抗和超自由魔法作戰將為你帶來最獨特的遊戲體驗。生存、探索、協作、征服，究竟是成為異域的開拓者，還是家園的守護者，這片世界的黑暗與光明，將由你來決定。

en.name: Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War - Anniversary Edition (Classic)
en.short_description: All of Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War in one glorious package. Play the genre-defining classic real time strategy game in all its blood-soaked glory, including four complete campaigns and nine full-fledged factions.

tc.name: 《Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War》週年紀念版
tc.short_description: 《Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War II》所有內容集結成一套輝煌的組合包。遊玩這款經典即時戰略遊戲龍頭浴血華麗的完整形態，包含四場完整戰役和九個充分發展的陣營。

en.name: Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy
en.short_description: Fire up a wild ride across the cosmos with a fresh take on Marvel’s Guardians of the Galaxy. In this action-adventure game, you are Star-Lord leading the unpredictable Guardians from one explosion of chaos to the next. You got this. Probably.

tc.name: Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy
tc.short_description: 《漫威星際異攻隊》將帶你踏上盪氣迴腸、驚險萬分的星際之旅，透過令人耳目一新的視角任你馳騁星際、縱橫宇宙。玩家將在這部動作冒險遊戲扮演星爵，率領一言不合就爆走的星際異攻隊，闖過一場又一場昏天暗地的大混戰。你沒問題的。應該啦。

en.name: Infestation: The New Z
en.short_description: The New Z is a FREE TO PLAY multi-game mode experience. SURVIVE with friends and gather loot, stash and trade. Go into wars against other groups in a massive OPEN WORLD or face them 5 v 5 in COMPETITIVE.

tc.name: Infestation: The New Z
tc.short_description: The New Z是一個免費體驗多種遊戲模式的經驗。與朋友一起生存，收集戰利品，存儲和交易。在一個大開放的世界與其他團體進行戰爭。三種不同的獨立遊戲模式全在一個遊戲裡。

en.name: The Banner Saga
en.short_description: Live through an epic role-playing Viking saga where your strategic choices directly affect your personal journey. Make allies as you travel with your caravan across this stunning yet harsh landscape. Carefully choose those who will help fight a new threat that jeopardizes an entire civilization.

tc.name: The Banner Saga
tc.short_description: Live through an epic role-playing Viking saga where your strategic choices directly affect your personal journey. Make allies as you travel with your caravan across this stunning yet harsh landscape. Carefully choose those who will help fight a new threat that jeopardizes an entire civilization.

en.name: Risk of Rain (2013)
en.short_description: Risk of Rain is an action platformer with roguelike elements. With permanent death as a primary feature, players will have to play their best to get as far as possible. Fight on a mysterious planet with randomly spawning enemies and bosses, either alone or with 3 friends in online co-op.

tc.name: Risk of Rain (2013)
tc.short_description: Risk of Rain is an action platformer with roguelike elements. With permanent death as a primary feature, players will have to play their best to get as far as possible. Fight on a mysterious planet with randomly spawning enemies and bosses, either alone or with 3 friends in online co-op.

en.name: Workers & Resources: Soviet Republic
en.short_description: Build a soviet republic from an impoverished country into a rich industrial superpower in a city builder with intricate production chains and a fully simulated global economy. Manage the lives of your citizens from education to work and party loyalty to criminal activity.

tc.name: 工人與資源：蘇維埃共和國 Workers & Resources: Soviet Republic
tc.short_description: 在擁有精密生產鏈且完整模擬全球經濟的城市建造遊戲中，將蘇維埃共和國脫離窮苦國家之列，成為富有的工業強權。管理國民生活中的方方面面，從教育到工作、對黨的忠誠以及犯罪活動一個也不放過。

en.name: GWENT: The Witcher Card Game
en.short_description: Command mighty Witcher-world heroes in epic online PvP card battles!

tc.name: GWENT: The Witcher Card Game
tc.short_description: 号令《巫师》世界的英雄儿女，征战史诗级 PVP 卡牌战役！

en.name: Turmoil
en.short_description: Drill for oil like it's 1899! Turmoil offers players a visually charming, tongue-in-cheek take on the simulation genre inspired by the 19th century oil rush in North America.

tc.name: Turmoil
tc.short_description: Drill for oil like it's 1899! Turmoil offers players a visually charming, tongue-in-cheek take on the simulation genre inspired by the 19th century oil rush in North America.

en.name: Transistor
en.short_description: Discover the world of Transistor, a sci-fi-themed action RPG from the creators of Bastion.

tc.name: Transistor
tc.short_description: Discover the world of Transistor, a sci-fi-themed action RPG from the creators of Bastion.

en.name: Strange Brigade
en.short_description: Embark on an exotic journey into danger in this rip-roaring 1930s third person adventure for 1-4 players! Encounter pulse-pounding action, treacherous traps and tales of derring-do!

tc.name: Strange Brigade
tc.short_description: 巫后賽泰吉再次捲土重來，只有一支由英勇無畏的英雄組成的部隊才有膽量與她手下的木乃伊畸形部隊抗衡。他們就是：奇異小隊！

en.name: Chants of Sennaar
en.short_description: In this award-winning puzzle adventure game, play as the Traveler on a quest to reunite the Peoples of the Tower. Observe, listen, and decipher ancient languages in a fascinating universe inspired by the Myth of Babel.

tc.name: Chants of Sennaar
tc.short_description: 在這款獲獎的解謎冒險遊戲中，化身為團結通天塔諸族的旅人。漫遊靈感源自巴別塔傳說的迷人世界，觀察、聆聽、破譯多種古老語言。

en.name: The Riftbreaker
en.short_description: The Riftbreaker is a solo or Co-op base-building, survival game with Action-RPG elements for up to 4 players. Hack & slash countless hordes of enemies. Build up your base, craft powerful weapons and research new inventions to survive.

tc.name: The Riftbreaker
tc.short_description: 《銀河破裂者》是一款支持最多4人合作的基地建造生存遊戲，融合刺激的動作RPG元素。並肩作戰，揮砍劈殺無盡的敵潮，建立固若金湯的基地，鍛造強力武器，研究尖端科技，只為在這片危機四伏的異星上求得生機與勝利。

en.name: Dead Space (2008)
en.short_description: You are Isaac Clarke, an engineer on the spacecraft USG Ishimura. You're not a warrior. You're not a soldier. You are, however, the last line of defense for the remaining living crew.

tc.name: 《絕命異次元》 (2008年)
tc.short_description: You are Isaac Clarke, an engineer on the spacecraft USG Ishimura. You're not a warrior. You're not a soldier. You are, however, the last line of defense for the remaining living crew.

en.name: CRSED: Cuisine Royale
en.short_description: CRSED: Cuisine Royale – is a brutal MMO last-man-standing shooter with realistic weaponry, elements of lethal mystic forces and incredible superpowers!

tc.name: CRSED: Cuisine Royale
tc.short_description: 《CRSED：Cuisine Royale》是款暴力的多人線上大逃殺射擊遊戲，主打寫實武器、致命神秘力量和驚人超能力！

en.name: BioShock® 2
en.short_description: Set approximately 10 years after the events of the original BioShock, the halls of Rapture once again echo with sins of the past. Along the Atlantic coastline, a monster has been snatching little girls and bringing them back to the undersea city of Rapture.

tc.name: BioShock® 2
tc.short_description: Set approximately 10 years after the events of the original BioShock, the halls of Rapture once again echo with sins of the past. Along the Atlantic coastline, a monster has been snatching little girls and bringing them back to the undersea city of Rapture.

en.name: Gothic® 3
en.short_description: A nameless hero becomes a legend! Myrtana, a world in upheaval: overrun by orcs from the dark lands in the north, King Rhobar is defending Vengard, the former stronghold of the humans, with his last troop of followers.

tc.name: Gothic® 3
tc.short_description: A nameless hero becomes a legend! Myrtana, a world in upheaval: overrun by orcs from the dark lands in the north, King Rhobar is defending Vengard, the former stronghold of the humans, with his last troop of followers.

en.name: F1® 2020
en.short_description: F1® 2020 allows you to create your F1® team for the very first time and race alongside the official teams and drivers. Alternatively, challenge your friends in new split-screen with casual race options for more relaxed racing. Compete on 22 circuits, with current and classic content.

tc.name: F1® 2020
tc.short_description: F1® 2020 首次讓你建立自己的 F1® 車隊，跟官方車隊和車手一起比賽。或者，在全新的螢幕分割模式中選擇休閒比賽選項，挑戰你的好友，以來一場更輕鬆的比賽。在 22 款賽道中，以當代和經典內容比賽。

en.name: OpenTTD
en.short_description: OpenTTD is a business simulation game in which players earn money by transporting passengers and cargo via road, rail, water, and air. It is an open-source remake and expansion of the 1995 Chris Sawyer video game Transport Tycoon Deluxe.

tc.name: OpenTTD
tc.short_description: OpenTTD是一款商業模擬遊戲。玩家可以透過公路、鐵路、海運、空運等方式運輸乘客與貨物以賺取利潤。OpenTTD是1995年由Chris Sawyer所製作的遊戲Transport Tycoon Deluxe的開源復刻與擴增版本。

en.name: Spelunky
en.short_description: Spelunky is a unique platformer with randomized levels that offer a challenging new experience each time you play. Journey deep underground and explore fantastic places filled with all manner of monsters, traps, and treasure.

tc.name: Spelunky
tc.short_description: Spelunky is a unique platformer with randomized levels that offer a challenging new experience each time you play. Journey deep underground and explore fantastic places filled with all manner of monsters, traps, and treasure.

en.name: Rivals of Aether
en.short_description: RIVALS OF AETHER is an indie fighting game where warring civilizations summon the power of Fire, Water, Air, and Earth. Play with up to four players either locally or online.

tc.name: Rivals of Aether
tc.short_description: RIVALS OF AETHER is an indie fighting game where warring civilizations summon the power of Fire, Water, Air, and Earth. Play with up to four players either locally or online.

en.name: THE KING OF FIGHTERS XIII STEAM EDITION
en.short_description: [[i]i]“THE KING OF FIGHTERS XIII”[/i], SNK PLAYMORE’s flagship 2D versus fighting title returns in an ultimate version on Steam!!

tc.name: THE KING OF FIGHTERS XIII STEAM EDITION
tc.short_description: [[i]i]“THE KING OF FIGHTERS XIII”[/i], SNK PLAYMORE’s flagship 2D versus fighting title returns in an ultimate version on Steam!!

en.name: RAGE
en.short_description: Powered by id’s revolutionary id Tech® 5 technology, RAGE is an intense first-person shooter with breakneck vehicle combat, an expansive world to explore, and jaw-dropping graphics!

tc.name: RAGE
tc.short_description: Powered by id’s revolutionary id Tech® 5 technology, RAGE is an intense first-person shooter with breakneck vehicle combat, an expansive world to explore, and jaw-dropping graphics!

en.name: CPUCores :: Maximize Your FPS
en.short_description: Maximize your FPS :: Use CPUCores to isolate and constrain OS + non-game processes and dedicate CPU resources to be used exclusively for your games! CPUCores fully integrates with all Steam games!

tc.name: CPUCores :: Maximize Your FPS
tc.short_description: 最大化您的FPS ::使用CPUCores隔離和限制OS +非遊戲進程，並專門為您的遊戲使用CPU資源！ CPUCores完全集成了Steam遊戲。

en.name: DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE
en.short_description: DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE revisits famous battles from the series through your custom Avatar and other classic characters. New features include the mysterious Toki Toki City, new gameplay mechanics, new animations and many other amazing features!

tc.name: DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE
tc.short_description: DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE revisits famous battles from the series through your custom Avatar and other classic characters. New features include the mysterious Toki Toki City, new gameplay mechanics, new animations and many other amazing features!

en.name: Legion TD 2 - Multiplayer Tower Defense
en.short_description: An infinitely replayable multiplayer and single-player tower defense. Defend against waves of enemies and destroy the enemy's king before they destroy yours. Legion TD 2 is a one-of-a-kind game of tactics, teamwork, and prediction. Party as 1-8 players.

tc.name: Legion TD 2 - Multiplayer Tower Defense
tc.short_description: 可無限重玩的單人以及多人塔防遊戲。抵禦一波又一波的敵人，先下手為強消滅敵方國王。《軍團戰爭 2》是一款集戰略、團隊合作、預判為一體的獨一無二的遊戲。支援 1-8 人團隊。

en.name: I Love You, Colonel Sanders! A Finger Lickin’ Good Dating Simulator
en.short_description: Welcome to the most delicious dating simulator ever created. Do you have what it takes to be the business partner of and win the heart of the most famous chicken salesman of all time? Play to find out! Go ahead, Colonel Sanders is waiting.

tc.name: I Love You, Colonel Sanders! A Finger Lickin’ Good Dating Simulator
tc.short_description: Welcome to the most delicious dating simulator ever created. Do you have what it takes to be the business partner of and win the heart of the most famous chicken salesman of all time? Play to find out! Go ahead, Colonel Sanders is waiting.

en.name: XCOM®: Chimera Squad
en.short_description: XCOM: Chimera Squad delivers an all-new story and turn-based tactical combat experience in the XCOM universe.

tc.name: XCOM®: Chimera Squad
tc.short_description: XCOM: Chimera Squad delivers an all-new story and turn-based tactical combat experience in the XCOM universe.

en.name: Starship Troopers: Extermination
en.short_description: Starship Troopers: Extermination is a 16-player co-op FPS that puts you on the far-off frontlines of an all-out battle against the Bugs! Squad up, grab your rifle, and do your part as an elite Deep Space Vanguard Trooper to take back planets from the Arachnid threat!

tc.name: Starship Troopers: Extermination
tc.short_description: 《星河艦隊：滅絕》是一款16人合作的第一人稱射擊遊戲，在與蟲子全面作戰的遙遠前線上，集合，拿起你的步槍，盡你的一份力量！ 加入精英彙集的深空探索部隊，準備奪回被阿拉奇蟲族威脅的行星！

en.name: WolfQuest: Anniversary Edition
en.short_description: Live the life of a wild wolf in a realistic ecological simulation set in Yellowstone National Park.

tc.name: WolfQuest: Anniversary Edition
tc.short_description: Live the life of a wild wolf in a realistic ecological simulation set in Yellowstone National Park.

en.name: PlateUp!
en.short_description: Cook and serve your dishes, design and decorate your restaurants, and expand your culinary kingdom with new unlocks, abilities and dishes in procedurally-generated locations. Classic cooking action with permanent roguelite progression. Hire your friends - or do it all yourself!

tc.name: 速速上菜！
tc.short_description: 精心規劃你的餐廳，你將一手包辦上菜、設計和裝潢，並隨著遊戲進度逐漸解鎖新的技能和菜色，一步步擴大你的廚藝王國！這是一款融合rougelite元素的經典餐廳模擬遊戲。你可以選擇雇用朋友一同經營——又或者「是自己的餐廳自己來」！

en.name: Age of History II
en.short_description: Age of History II is a grand strategy wargame that is simple to learn yet hard to master.Your objective is to use military tactics and cunning diplomacy to either unify the world, or conquer it.Will the world bleed out or bow before you? The choice is yours..

tc.name: Age of History II
tc.short_description: Age of History 是一款容易上手卻難以精通的宏偉戰略遊戲。 你的目標是藉助軍事策略與狡猾的外交手段以聯合或征服全世界。世界會因你而生靈塗炭，或是因你而得以聯合？一切都取決於你...

en.name: The Walking Dead: A New Frontier
en.short_description: After society was ripped apart by undead hands, pockets of civilization emerge from the chaos. But at what cost? Can the living be trusted on this new frontier?

tc.name: The Walking Dead: A New Frontier
tc.short_description: 死屍摧毀世界四年後，零星的文明在混亂中出現。但代價為何？這新疆域的人值得信任嗎？

en.name: Dungeons 3
en.short_description: At last, the Dungeon Lord has successfully united the forces of evil and established his dark empire. Time for the next step in his most diabolical quest: expansion!

tc.name: Dungeons 3
tc.short_description: At last, the Dungeon Lord has successfully united the forces of evil and established his dark empire. Time for the next step in his most diabolical quest: expansion!

en.name: not available
en.short_description: You are a young teenage Jackie from the ghetto who wants to get out of poverty and embark on a journey of learning about the world and yourself. The world has definitely gone crazy, though it has never been normal, but maybe now is the chance for you. Crisis is a time for action and decisive steps...

tc.name: not available
tc.short_description: 你是一位來自貧民窟的青少年傑基，他想要擺脫貧困，踏上了解世界和自己的旅程。 這個世界肯定已經瘋了，雖然從來沒有正常過，但也許現在就是你的機會。 危機是採取行動和果斷步驟的時候……只是它很可怕，因為每一步都可能讓你倒退很多。 有時很難選擇正確的道路，但不要害怕，你總是可以重複，我們從錯誤中學習。 傑基必須明白，為了到達一個新的地方，你必須首先跳躍並離開地面，不知道未來會發生什麼...... 武士沒有目標，只有一條路，堅忍、耐心和狡猾將幫助你到達頂峰，但你永遠不知道那裡等待著什麼...... 向前？ “只有UP！ “Only UP！” 靈感來自童話故事“傑克和豆莖”，類似於平台遊戲。 你必須經歷與傑克相同的神話之路，才能取得比攀登頂峰更多的成就。

en.name: Nuclear Nightmare
en.short_description: Venture forth as part of a specialized team of fellow players tasked with retrieving classified materials, evading the black goo virus, and the nightmarish entities it has spawned. With time running out before the US government initiates a devastating nuclear strike to contain the spreading menace.

tc.name: Nuclear Nightmare
tc.short_description: Venture forth as part of a specialized team of fellow players tasked with retrieving classified materials, evading the black goo virus, and the nightmarish entities it has spawned. With time running out before the US government initiates a devastating nuclear strike to contain the spreading menace.

en.name: Cyber Manhunt
en.short_description: Cyber Manhunt is a story-oriented puzzle game focusing on big data, hacking, citizen privacy, and social workers. It focuses on social issues such as cyber violence and privacy breaches.

tc.name: 全網公敵
tc.short_description: 《全網公敵》是一款結合了網絡安全、大數據、隱私洩露等社會問題的劇情向解謎遊戲。作為一名頂尖黑客，你將接受一系列任務，使用各種社工技巧，完成目標，找出事件真相。

en.name: Phantasy Star Online 2 New Genesis
en.short_description: Phantasy Star Online 2 New Genesis is a free-to-play action MMO. Join players around the world to explore the planet Halpha and fight in epic battles as ARKS Defenders! Unleash your imagination with our ultimate character creation experience and creative spaces to create your own phantasy.

tc.name: Phantasy Star Online 2 New Genesis
tc.short_description: Phantasy Star Online 2 New Genesis is a free-to-play action MMO. Join players around the world to explore the planet Halpha and fight in epic battles as ARKS Defenders! Unleash your imagination with our ultimate character creation experience and creative spaces to create your own phantasy.

en.name: Arma 2: Operation Arrowhead
en.short_description: Three years after the conflict in Chernarus, portrayed in the original Arma 2, a new flashpoint explodes in the Green Sea Region. Coalition forces led by the US Army are deployed to Takistan to quickly restore peace and prevent further civilian casualties.

tc.name: Arma 2: Operation Arrowhead
tc.short_description: Three years after the conflict in Chernarus, portrayed in the original Arma 2, a new flashpoint explodes in the Green Sea Region. Coalition forces led by the US Army are deployed to Takistan to quickly restore peace and prevent further civilian casualties.

en.name: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Call of Pripyat
en.short_description: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Call of Pripyat is the direct sequel of the S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl. As a Major Alexander Degtyarev you should investigate the crash of the governmental helicopters around the Zone and find out, what happened there.

tc.name: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Call of Pripyat
tc.short_description: 《潜行者：普里皮亚季的召唤》是《潜行者：切尔诺贝利的阴影》的直接续作。你将扮演亚历山大捷格加廖夫少校，奉命调查政府直升机在封锁区周围坠毁一案，并探索隐藏的真相。

en.name: Dinkum
en.short_description: Dinkum is a survival life simulation game set on an island inspired by the rugged Australian outback. Farm, hunt, mine, fish, and forage to gather resources, expand your town, and discover what makes Dinkum so special—either solo or with friends.

tc.name: Dinkum(金墾小鎮)
tc.short_description: Dinkum 以原始的澳洲內陸為靈感，是一款島嶼生活與生存的模擬遊戲。 玩家需透過務農、狩獵、採礦、捕魚和囤糧以收集資源、擴大城鎮，並發現 Dinkum 如此特別的原因——可與朋友一起，或獨自進行。

en.name: MapleStory
en.short_description: Join over 260 million players worldwide in MapleStory, the world’s biggest 2D MMORPG adventure! Play now for free.

tc.name: MapleStory
tc.short_description: Join over 260 million players worldwide in MapleStory, the world’s biggest 2D MMORPG adventure! Play now for free.

en.name: Drunken Wrestlers 2
en.short_description: Drunken Wrestlers 2 is a funny physics-based multiplayer fighting game. Features include character customization and a powerful mod editor integrated with Steam Workshop.

tc.name: Drunken Wrestlers 2
tc.short_description: Drunken Wrestlers 2 is a funny physics-based multiplayer fighting game. Features include character customization and a powerful mod editor integrated with Steam Workshop.

en.name: Age of Wonders III
en.short_description: Age of Wonders III is the long anticipated sequel to the award-winning strategy series. Delivering a unique mix of Empire Building, Role Playing and Warfare, Age of Wonders III offers the ultimate in turn-based fantasy strategy for veterans of the series and new players alike!

tc.name: Age of Wonders III
tc.short_description: Age of Wonders III is the long anticipated sequel to the award-winning strategy series. Delivering a unique mix of Empire Building, Role Playing and Warfare, Age of Wonders III offers the ultimate in turn-based fantasy strategy for veterans of the series and new players alike!

en.name: Mechabellum
en.short_description: Command massive armies in this epic mech auto-battler. Draft your troops, customize your units, master your formations, and crush enemies in spectacular 3D battles. All strategy, no clickfest. Outsmart opponents in 1v1, 2v2, free-for-all, or Survival Mode.

tc.name: Mechabellum
tc.short_description: 在這款機甲自走棋遊戲中，你將指揮鋼鐵洪流主宰未來戰場！整編部隊，研發科技，排兵佈陣，掌控全局，率領您專屬的鋼鐵雄師在戰場上粉碎強敵！！全程策略，拒絕無腦點擊。1v1 巔峯對決；2v2 攜手破敵；4人混戰廝殺；生存模式挑戰極限；時空裂隙征服未知！以智取勝，總有一個戰場適合你！

en.name: Against the Storm
en.short_description: A dark fantasy city builder where you must rebuild civilization in the face of apocalyptic rains. As the Queen’s Viceroy, lead humans, beavers, lizards, foxes, and harpies to reclaim the wilderness and secure a future for civilization's last survivors.

tc.name: 風暴之城 Against the Storm
tc.short_description: 這是一款暗黑奇幻風格的城市建造遊戲。玩家在遊戲中面對災變的同時，還須擔起重建文明的使命。身為女王的總督，你將帶領人類、海狸、狐狸、蜥蜴與鳥身女妖們開疆拓土，為文明的遺民們建構嶄新的未來。

en.name: Death's Door
en.short_description: Reaping souls of the dead and punching a clock might get monotonous but it's honest work for a Crow. The job gets lively when your assigned soul is stolen and you must track down a desperate thief to a realm untouched by death - where creatures grow far past their expiry.

tc.name: Death's Door
tc.short_description: 打卡上下班收取亡者靈魂的日子雖然過得單調，但對烏鴉來說是務實的工作。當你分配到的靈魂被偷走了，這工作就變得鮮活起來，你必須追捕鋌而走險的 小偷進入未受死亡眷顧的領域– 那裡的生物都活得比壽命長很多，充滿了貪婪與力量。

en.name: Assetto Corsa Competizione
en.short_description: Assetto Corsa Competizione, the official GT World Challenge videogame. Thanks to the extraordinary quality of simulation, you will experience the atmosphere of the GT3 championship. Compete against official drivers, teams, cars and official circuits reproduced to the highest quality ever seen.

tc.name: 神力科莎出賽準備: 競爭 Assetto Corsa Competizione
tc.short_description: 《神力科莎出賽準備: 競爭 Assetto Corsa Competizione》是全新的 GT 世界挑戰系列賽官方遊戲。 本遊戲出色的模擬品質將讓你得以透過官方車手、車隊、賽車和賽道共同組成的賽車模擬，在以最高的準確度還原賽事中體驗 GT3 錦標賽的真實氛圍

en.name: The Talos Principle
en.short_description: The Talos Principle is a first-person puzzle game in the tradition of philosophical science fiction. Made by Croteam and written by Tom Jubert (FTL, The Swapper) and Jonas Kyratzes (The Sea Will Claim Everything).

tc.name: The Talos Principle
tc.short_description: 《塔羅斯的法則》是第一視角解謎遊戲，由《重裝武力》系列製作組Croteam打造，並由Tom Jubert (FTL《超越光速》，The Swapper《交易者》) 以及Jonas Kyratzes (The Sea Will Claim Everything)聯合打造劇本。

en.name: The Awesome Adventures of Captain Spirit
en.short_description: Have you ever dreamt of being a superhero? Meet Chris, a creative and imaginative 9 year old boy who escapes reality with fantastical adventures as his alter ego, the Awesome Captain Spirit! Captain Spirit is a free demo set in the Life is Strange universe. Contains links to Life is Strange 2

tc.name: The Awesome Adventures of Captain Spirit
tc.short_description: Have you ever dreamt of being a superhero? Meet Chris, a creative and imaginative 9 year old boy who escapes reality with fantastical adventures as his alter ego, the Awesome Captain Spirit! Captain Spirit is a free demo set in the Life is Strange universe. Contains links to Life is Strange 2

en.name: State of Decay: YOSE
en.short_description: Make your stand against the collapse of society in the ultimate zombie survival-fantasy game. Explore an open world full of dangers and opportunities that respond to your every decision. Recruit a community of playable survivors, each with their own unique skills and talents.

tc.name: State of Decay: YOSE
tc.short_description: Make your stand against the collapse of society in the ultimate zombie survival-fantasy game. Explore an open world full of dangers and opportunities that respond to your every decision. Recruit a community of playable survivors, each with their own unique skills and talents.

en.name: Rayman® Legends
en.short_description: Michel Ancel, the celebrated creator of Rayman®, Beyond Good & Evil®, and the Raving Rabbids®, returns to unleash his innovative creativity on this new entry into the Rayman® franchise.When Rayman, Globox, and the Teensies discover a mysterious tent filled with captivating paintings, they are suddenly transported to a series of...

tc.short_description: Michel Ancel, the celebrated creator of Rayman®, Beyond Good & Evil®, and the Raving Rabbids®, returns to unleash his innovative creativity on this new entry into the Rayman® franchise.When Rayman, Globox, and the Teensies discover a mysterious tent filled with captivating paintings, they are suddenly transported to a series of...

en.name: Darksiders II Deathinitive Edition
en.short_description: The ultimate DARKSIDERS II experience! 1080p native resolution. Reworked and tuned game balancing and loot distribution. Improved Graphic Render Engine for even higher visual quality, lighting and shadows. Improved and reworked level, character and environment graphics.

tc.name: Darksiders II Deathinitive Edition
tc.short_description: The ultimate DARKSIDERS II experience! 1080p native resolution. Reworked and tuned game balancing and loot distribution. Improved Graphic Render Engine for even higher visual quality, lighting and shadows. Improved and reworked level, character and environment graphics.

en.name: Ranch Simulator: Build, Hunt, Farm
en.short_description: Builder. Farmer. Hunter. Trader. Ranching certainly isn’t your average job. Think you have the skills to turn your family’s rundown homestead into the most prosperous ranch in the valley? Then it’s time to head out into the wilderness in this captivating single and multiplayer open-world simulator.

tc.name: Ranch Simulator: Build, Hunt, Farm
tc.short_description: 建築工人。農夫。獵人。商人。經營牧場當然不是普通的工作。你認為自己有能力將家族留下的破舊家園變成山谷中最繁榮的牧場嗎？那就進入這個迷人的單人與多人開放世界模擬遊戲，徜徉在曠野之中吧。

en.name: Boundary
en.short_description: Boundary is a multiplayer tactical space-based shooter game, engaging in fierce team vs team zero gravity firefights and executing low-gravity operations on orbiting space installations against other enemy astroperators and other entities.

tc.name: 邊境
tc.short_description: 《邊境》是一款近未來太空題材的第一人稱射擊遊戲，帶您領略真正的無重力戰術射擊體驗。形形色色的太空操作員在近軌道相遇，打破常規束縛，讓失重成為你的武器！

en.name: Walking Zombie 2
en.short_description: Zombie singleplayer shooter in modern polygon graphics with rich RPG elements.

tc.name: Walking Zombie 2
tc.short_description: 多邊形圖形殭屍單人離線射擊遊戲，具有RPG元素。

en.name: Heroes® of Might & Magic® III - HD Edition
en.short_description: The most popular Heroes® title of all time is back in HD! Fifteen years later, rediscover the epic tale of Queen Catherine Ironfist, as she re-embarks on her critically acclaimed quest to unite her ravaged homeland and re-conquer the kingdom of Erathia.

tc.name: Heroes® of Might & Magic® III - HD Edition

en.name: BIOMUTANT
en.short_description: BIOMUTANT® is an open-world, post-apocalyptic Kung-Fu fable RPG, with a unique martial arts styled combat system allowing you to mix melee, shooting and mutant ability action.
